Neartail - Order form Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount. You are a store owner who wants your customers to order online. You use Google Forms™ to take orders. But, it lacks key features to calculate order amount and accept payment. Use Neartail's Order form addon to enhance Google Forms™ with calculation and payment collection. Create order forms that are fully functional and easy-to-use for your customers. 

If you haven’t started on your form yet, you can use the prebuilt Neartail templates to create your order form. If you have already created your form in Google Forms™, then you can use the AI powered Neartail addon to automatically convert the questions in Google Forms™ into relevant products with prices and fields to collect customer details in your order form.

❇️ How Neartail leverages AI to convert your google form into order form?

When you customize the form using the Neartail addon, you can enable the Format prices option that:
➤ automatically identifies questions with prices and converts them into products to be sold by quantity, weight or with variants.
➤ converts simple question types into products that allows you to add product specific attributes such as description, tax, available stock & more.
➤ adds the formula to calculate the order amount based on the product prices in the form and displays an order summary in the bill format. 
➤ transforms responses into order line items to create aggregate reports for sales by product, customer & view sales trends by week or month.

❇️ Features: Calculate order amount in Google Forms™

➤ Dynamically calculate the total amount for the products ordered by the user and display it in your form in real time.
➤ Add coupon codes option in your order form to offer your customers a percentage discount, fixed amount discount or free shipping discount.
➤ Write formulas to enforce minimum order amount, offer free shipping for orders exceeding specified order amount threshold & more.
➤ Offering curbside pickup & delivery options? Add a delivery details section with the available options and the delivery fees for each option.

❇️ Features: Accept online payment in Google Forms™

➤ Collect payments before customers submit the form and fully automate your payment process.
➤ Accept fully automated payments such as credit or debit cards, Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Bancontact, iDeal, Paynow directly on Google Forms™.
➤ Accept peer to peer payment methods such as Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Paynow, Zelle, Lydia or UPI with zero transaction fees.
➤ Allow users to place orders without making payments by enabling offline payment methods such as cash on delivery, cheque, bank transfer.


❇️ Features: Customize order form for your needs

➤ Show a summary of the products ordered by the user so that they can review their order before they submit it for processing.
➤ Send order confirmation emails to your customers and get email notifications for new orders
➤ Choose the preferred layout: Compact (3 column card layout), comfortable (2 column list layout) or the default form layout
➤ Close your form to stop accepting orders and add a custom message to let your users know when they can order next.


❇️ Use case: Tailor-made for your business

Restaurants, Canteens, Meal prep: Whether you have a set menu or an a la carte menu or a daily menu, easily create your restaurant order form and start accepting online orders from your customers. Simply choose from our pre-designed restaurant templates to get started.

Bakery: Are you a bakery taking custom cake orders, selling a selection of cupcakes or doughnut boxes, or offering a wide range of products such as cookies, pastries, bagels etc? You can create an online order form that exactly meets your business needs.

Clubs, Apparel stores: Does your business sell apparel? You can now easily create a visually appealing and elegant apparel order form that works equally well for products without any variants, products with only color or size variants, and products with both color & size variants.

Grocery stores, Supermarkets, Farms: Sell daily essentials such as vegetables, fruits, grains, meat, baby care, personal care products and more by creating an online order form using our pre-designed grocery order form templates. Let your customers order products easily from the comforts of their home.

Once your customer submits the form, you can manage orders with Google Sheets™ or Google Forms™, you are comfortable with. Gain your customers' trust with a professional ordering experience, while still using G Suite™ / Google Workspace™.

❇️ Pricing:

Neartail's Order form addon is a paid product with a 7-day trial. You get the first 20 responses free during this trial period. If you would like to collect more than 20 responses or use Neartail after the trial ends, you can subscribe to the paid plan.

➤ $18 for 100 orders per month
➤ $28 for 200 orders per month
➤ $38 for 300 orders per month

You can either choose the monthly or annual subscription. For details, refer to the pricing page. For higher volumes, Business Tools

Customer Support Ops.docx.description: Send unlimited bulk and personalized WhatsApp messages from your own number. Free customer support. Free to try.
Customer Support Ops.docx.search_text:
Walution - Send Personalized WhatsApp Messages Send unlimited bulk and personalized WhatsApp messages from your own number. Free customer support. Free to try. ✔️ The best Google add-on/extension to send unlimited personalized unique WhatsApp messages directly from Google Sheets. ✔️ No sign-up required. ✔️ Free and fast customer service. ✔️ Free from advertising or branding.  ✔️ Send messages without saving numbers or contacts to your phone. ✔️ Ideal for marketing.

👇 Read more about our features, help, tutorials and pricing.


𝍁 HOW DOES THIS BULK WHATSAPP SENDER  FOR G SHEETS WORK?

➤ Start the add-on from Google Sheet > Extensions > Walution > Start
➤ Make sure the first row in your sheet contains column names. Such as ‘Fullname’, ‘Address’, ‘Phone’, ‘Email’,  etc.
➤ To be able to merge you need to have at least one row of data under your column names.
➤ These column names will be used as *|Merge Fields|* into your message.
➤ From the Sidebar Select the Sheet tab you want to merge data from.
➤ Select the ‘WhatsApp Number' Column. This will be the column in your sheet which contains a list of mobile numbers. Typically this is a column name called ‘Mobile’. All values in this column must have a valid phone number. If the phone number does not have a country code (such as +1) the default country code will be used. To set the Default Country code go to Extensions > Walution > Default Country Code
➤ Write the content of your message in the box provided and insert Personalized Fields wherever you want in the message. For example: Dear *|Fullname|*,
➤ When ready click ‘Send Test’ to send a message to any number you want. The test merge will merge data from the 1st row of data. That is row 2 since row 1 only contains column headers.
➤ Once you’re happy with how your message looks you can go ahead with a full merge.
➤ A column called ‘Message Status’ is automatically created for you by the add-on. This will be automatically populated with the date and time the row was successfully merged. If you want to re-send/merge the row, just delete the content of that cell under the ‘Message  Status’ column. If there is text in all the data rows for the ‘‘Message Status’ column you will get an error when you attempt to merge telling you that there are no rows to merge.

 
🎯 HOW IS THIS GOOGLE SHEETS EXTENSION FOR WA USEFUL?

No need to download any software. A bulk WhatsApp sender online, powered by Google Workspace. Whether it’s for personal, education or other professional business use, this is a simple and powerful tool for sending mass personalized WhatsApp messages. Easily insert place holders (or Merge Fields) in your message and you are ready to go. 

★ Unlimited usage for a fixed cheap price. Send messages with out limits.
★ Send WhatsApp message directly without adding contact to your phone.
★ Send messages from your own phone number. This way you can get replies directly to you.
★ It does not use a generic phone number to send messages.
★ Personalize WhatsApp messages to send unique messages to your contacts.
★ Broadcast your message with this 
hatsApp sender and test for free.
★ Send a test message to get a good idea on how your text message will look like.
★ Opt to merge only selected/filtered rows of data.
★ Operate online over the web without hassle.
★ No limit to how many merge fields you can enter.
★ Track which rows have been merged.
★ Messages can be sent to all platforms: Apple iOS (iPhone) and Google Android.

➤ Inviting people to an event such as a webinar, wedding, job-dating, fair, conference, meetup.

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace. GearChain: Smart Inventory Management for Google Sheets™

Turn your everyday Google Sheets™ into a powerful, automated inventory management system. With GearChain, you can track items, scan barcodes, manage assets, and collaborate with your team directly inside the tools you already use. No new software to learn. No coding. Simply connect GearChain to Google Sheets™ and start managing inventory the smart way.

Why Choose GearChain

Most businesses already use Google Sheets™ for stock tracking because it is simple, accessible, and flexible. But as your inventory grows, manual updates, missing entries, and inconsistent data become unavoidable. GearChain upgrades your spreadsheet into a live inventory platform that connects your team, processes, and assets in real time. You keep the simplicity of Google Sheets™ but gain the automation, accuracy, and power of a modern inventory system.

Real Time Inventory Sync

Every scan, update, or adjustment instantly syncs to your connected Google Sheet. There is no double entry and no delayed reporting. You get accurate, real time inventory data that is accessible anywhere, on any device.

Barcode and NFC Scanning

Identify and update items instantly using 1D or 2D barcodes or NFC tags. Use your mobile device or camera to check in assets, adjust quantities, verify stock, or view item history on the spot. It also supports external barcode scanners.

Custom Fields for Any Workflow

Track the data that matters most to your operations. GearChain supports customizable fields for serial numbers, GPS location, timestamps, suppliers, item conditions, and more. Whether you are in retail, warehousing, healthcare, events, education, or manufacturing, you can tailor GearChain to your workflow.

Seamless Team Collaboration

Share your inventory workspace with team members, clients, or vendors in a few clicks. Role based permissions ensure every user sees only what they need. You stay in full control of changes, access, and data visibility.

AI Powered Insights and Forecasting

GearChain’s intelligent analytics help you understand usage patterns, forecast restock needs, detect anomalies, and prevent shortages before they happen. Instead of reacting to problems, you can plan with confidence.

Blockchain Transparency and Secure Data Logging

Every transaction can be logged on blockchain for traceability and compliance. This gives you an extra layer of transparency and data integrity while still managing everything inside Google Sheets™.

How GearChain Works

Step1. Connect GearChain to Google Sheets™:
Install the app and link it to your existing spreadsheet or start with a ready to use template.

Step 2. Scan and Track in Real Time:
Use your phone or desktop device to scan barcodes or NFC tags. All updates appear instantly in your connected Sheet.

Step 3. Collaborate With Your Team:
Assign roles, set permissions, and manage inventory together from anywhere.

Step 4. Analyze and Automate:
Use built in dashboards, AI analysis, and smart recommendations to optimize stock and reduce waste.

It is simple, fast, and requires no technical setup or training.

Who Uses GearChain

- Retailers managing products across stores and warehouses
- Event planners tracking equipment and supplies
- Healthcare facilities managing medical devices and assets
- Schools and universities tracking IT equipment and lab items
- Manufacturers monitoring materials and finished goods
- Service providers managing tools and field equipment

If you can list it, scan it, or count it, GearChain can manage it.

Core Value You Get

- Save hours of manual work every week
- Reduce stock discrepancies and errors
- Empower your team to update inventory from any device
- Eliminate the need for expensive, complex ERP systems
- Get enterprise level tracking with the simplicity of Google Sheets™

Simple, Scalable, and Secure

Whether you are running a small business or managing assets across multiple locations, GearChain grows with your needs. Start free, upgrade as you scale, and always stay in control of your inventory data within your Google Workspace™. GearChain is built for modern teams that need automation, transparency, and control without leaving Google Sheets™.

Ready to Transform Your Spreadsheet

Join thousands of businesses who have already turned Google Sheets™ into a real time, automated inventory management system.

Install GearChain Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ and experience effortless inventory control from barcode to balance sheet.

No coding. No complex setup. Just instant inventory clarity. Utilities

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Signature in Google Forms by Bolo | Sign PDF Sign-on-screen signatures for your Google Forms | Take signatures inside Google Forms and store them in Google Sheets | Sign PDF BoloSign is here to elevate your Google Forms experience by adding seamless e-signature capabilities, making it a fantastic tool for small businesses. If you rely on Google Forms to collect data and manage workflows, BoloSign is about to make your life a lot easier! Let’s explore how this powerful add-on can transform the way you use Google Forms.

Key Features-

- Seamless Integration 🌐Adding BoloSign to your Google Forms is a breeze! Just head to the Google Workspace Marketplace to get started. With this integration, you can include signature fields directly in your forms, allowing respondents to sign documents electronically with ease.
- Real-Time Collaboration 🤝Collaborate with your team effortlessly! BoloSign allows everyone involved to work together in real-time, ensuring that the form's progress is always up-to-date and contributions are easily shared.
- Customizable Fields 🛠️Tailor your forms to fit your specific needs by adding custom fields. This flexibility means you can gather the precise information and signatures that matter most for your business.
- Bulk Send and Reminders 📧Need to send forms to multiple recipients? No problem! BoloSign lets you send forms in bulk and set up automated reminders for those who haven’t responded yet, ensuring timely completion without the hassle of manual follow-ups.

Advanced Features- 

1. Conditional Logic: Create dynamic workflows that adjust based on how recipients fill out form fields. Imagine a contract that changes based on user selections, making the process smoother and more efficient.
2. Pre-fill Information: Save time by automatically filling in form fields with relevant data from your contacts or other sources.
3. Branding and Customization: Make the signing experience uniquely yours by adding your logo, colors, and personalized messages.
4. Automated Follow-Up Emails: Set up reminder emails for signers who are lagging behind based on triggers you define.
5. API Integrations: Connect BoloSign with other tools like CRMs and marketing platforms for a seamless flow of data.

Security and Compliance

1. Legally Binding E-Signatures: BoloSign ensures compliance with eIDAS, UETA, and HIPAA regulations, giving you maximum legal validity for your signatures.
2. Secure Document Storage: Your documents are safeguarded with 256-bit encryption in the cloud, providing complete peace of mind.
3. Audit Trails: Keep a detailed record of every action taken on your documents for enhanced transparency and accountability.

Use Cases from Small Businesses with BoloSign for Google Forms

1. Contract Management 📑- Streamline sends and receives signed contracts by integrating e-signatures directly into your Google Forms. This approach saves time and reduces costs compared to traditional paper methods.
2. Event Registrations and Approvals 🎉- Manage event registrations effortlessly by collecting necessary permissions through Google Forms. The e-signature feature ensures all approvals are obtained quickly and securely.
3. Customer Feedback and Surveys 📝- Enhance feedback collection by incorporating e-signatures into surveys, ensuring responses are verified and actionable for informed business decisions.
4. Employee Onboarding 👨‍💼- Simplify the onboarding process by having new employees sign essential documents digitally through Google Forms, saving time while ensuring accuracy.
5. Supplier Agreements 📃- Improve procurement processes by collecting digital signatures on supplier agreements, ensuring all parties are aligned promptly.
6. Volunteer Agreements 🤲- Manage volunteer agreements for events or community initiatives efficiently using e-signatures in Google Forms.
7. Membership Forms 📋- Facilitate membership registration for clubs or organizations by incorporating digital signatures into Google Forms for a user-friendly experience.
8. Internal Approvals ✔️- Streamline internal workflows with digital signatures for approval processes like leave requests or expense reimbursements, reducing paperwork and speeding up decision-making.

With BoloSign, managing document signing within Google Forms becomes straightforward and efficient, saving you time while ensuring a smooth experience for both you and your clients! Ready to transform how you handle signatures? Let’s get started! 🚀 Utilities

PerformFlow - Form Approvals Workflow & Publisher Automate form approval workflow like invoice with form approvals & convert form to PDF via form publisher. Automate form approval workflow like leave requests, invoice requests, and booking forms with form approvals & convert form to PDF via form publisher. This approval workflow software will help you streamline your workflow approval process instantly.

Select one of the four modes to automate your work flow and works as document generator that are approved for you:
1. Create approval workflow only:  send form approvals workflow requests, and recipients can approve via email.

2. Generate PDF/document only: auto-generate forms to PDF & document, convert Google Forms™ to Docs™, Google Forms™ to Sheets™ every time a submission is sent to your form.

3. Generate & send PDF/document only: auto-generate forms to PDF & document when someone submits a request and send the generated file to your specified recipients.

4. Combine all modes: do both generate PDF & send documents (as form publisher) and create approval workflow!
--------------------------

- Multi-level Workflow: Set multi-level form approvals workflow and let static & dynamic recipients approve anytime, anywhere.

- Create & send generated PDF / Google Docs™: convert form to PDF/document and send generated PDF automatically. Select the templates of your PDF as you want.

- Add conditions to each recipient: Set conditions to each recipient in your workflow so that they can only give approval or receive generated documents / PDF files when specified conditions are met.

- Add form respondent to the flow: get result email when workflow ends or ask to edit answers.

- One-click approve on email: Save more time by giving approval with one click on the approval email.

- Resend all pending requests: Resend emails to recipients with missed emails on form approvals & form publishers.

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Coefficient: Salesforce, HubSpot Data Connector GPT powered 2-way connector to your CRM, Accounting tools, ERP, BI tool, database, or any other API to Google Sheets™. Sync and analyze data faster than ever with AI. No coding required! Coefficient is a no-code productivity solution that connects your spreadsheets to your company systems to accelerate your work. Use our 2-way spreadsheet sync when you need to pull data from or write back data to critical systems like your CRM and database. 

Couple live data connectivity with your very own AI Sheets Assistant—an always-on copilot inside your spreadsheet that helps you write formulas, create charts, and answer questions using your data—and you’ll be empowered to build the reports and dashboards you need in the fastest and most flexible way.

Easily sync Google Sheets™ to business systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Looker™, Tableau, Airtable, Notion, any JSON API, SQL databases, and data warehouses. Then, use AI to speed up your analysis. Ask Sheets Assistant to explain what’s in your data, recommend visuals, or guide your next move—all directly from your spreadsheet.

Using Coefficient you can automatically import all of your data into one place in Google Sheets™, and easily summarize it, filter it, create pivot tables or cloud pivot tables, chart it, and integrate it with other data. You can build custom dashboards and reports, alters, query, join, sync, and manipulate your data.  No more manual cutting and pasting CSV files, importrange or other difficult ways like Apps Script to combine data and spreadsheets. Coefficient offers the easiest path to data extraction. You can import from Excel files as well.

Plus, with Sheets Assistant, you can skip the setup altogether—just ask for what you need in plain language and get a working report, chart, or insight instantly.

Anyone pulling data into a spreadsheet can find value in Coefficient. The most impactful professionals leveraging Coefficient include Sales Leaders, RevOps, Sales Operations, and Marketing Operations professionals, Performance Marketers, FP&A and Financial Operations teams, and Data teams.

-------------------------------------------

► 1-Click Connections
Connect to your systems in one click and pull your data instantly into Google Sheets™.

• Sync with systems like Salesforce, Hubspot, Wordpress, Google Analytics™ (UA and GA4), Chargebee, Stripe, Zendesk, Outreach and more. See the list of categories below.
• Pull from CSV and Excel files and other Google Sheets™

► Customizable Imports
Work with only the data you need. Filter, sort, segment & limit any data set. Built for G Suite

• Leverage existing reports or build a custom report using data from any system
• Use Coefficient filters to work with only the data you need

► Auto-Refreshes
Never build the same analysis twice. Automatically refresh your data connector on any schedule. Google Sheets™ automation at its finest.

• Live refreshes at the click of a button
• Schedule data to update hourly, daily or weekly
• Share any report and let team members refresh data across your organization

► Data Snapshots
Snapshots allow you to capture the exact moment in time you need for deeper insights. Select your snapshot mode, either tab-level or range level, select the amount of snapshots you need, and choose your snapshot frequency.

• Track changes in your sales pipeline
• Monitor marketing trends
• Analyze financial data month-over-month
• Maintain a history of deal statuses for analysis

► 2-way Sync
Push Back Data to Your CRM or Database without ever leaving your spreadsheet

• Currently supported for CRMs, including Pipedrive, and Databases like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redshift, Snowflake and more

► Alerting
Track the signals you care about. Trigger Slack & email notifications to your team on any changes in your spreadsheet or any connector

• Choose any cell or range of cells to trigger a notification when data changes
• Trigger a notification when new data is added, such as a new signup
• Send a daily or weekly digest of the changes you care about

► Pre-Built Report Dashboards
Instant insights out of the box. Leverage pre-built Google Sheets™ report dashboards to effortlessly monitor and analyze your data.

• Customizable to your data and needs, and drill down to company, team, individual, region, and more
• Sales and revenue dashboards for your CRM
• Financial and accounting dashboards for systems like Quickbooks, Netsuite, Xero and Stripe
• Paid marketing dashboards for ads performance on the networks of Google, Facebook, Microsoft Bing, Linkedin and more
• Organic marketing reports for insights on engagement and pages on Instagram, Twitter, Youtube and more

► Sheets Assistant, your AI auto analyst
Sheets Assistant combines the power of GPT-4 with live spreadsheet data to handle your requests instantly.

• Ask questions about your data
• Get formulas, charts, and pivot tables generated for you
• Use spreadsheet context to get smarter answers
• Make faster decisions without writing a single formula

► Cloud Pivot Tables
Pivot on data in your cloud systems. Visualize real-time data in a pivot table directly from your systems. Refresh it on any schedule.

• Aggregate and visua Business Tools

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Timer + AI Proctor Limiter for Forms | Quilgo Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring. Overview

• Transform Google Forms™ into a proctored testing powerhouse with Quilgo— the trusted choice of over 30 million+ online assessments.
• Free to try, easy to set up, Quilgo’s innovative countdown timer and AI-driven proctoring ensure a secure, reliable testing experience.
• Bring ultimate integrity to your exams with Quilgo today!

⏱️ Test management and setup

→ Timer. Enable time limit in your tests. Perfect for online assessments and exams
→ Exam Mode. Schedule a date and time for your test and turn it into an online assessment.
→ Deadlines. Set a start time and time frames for your assignment.
→ Access Control. Restrict your quiz to specific people or enable registration.
→ Auto Close. Automatically turn the quiz off and stop once the time is over.
Easy Delivery. Send personal test links via email or post a group link.

🧑‍💻 Cheating Prevention

→ Camera Tracking. Reduce cheating by capturing the faces of test-takers
Screen Recording. Track the screen activity for increased cheating protection.
→ Enforce Tracking. Require all selected tracking methods to start a session.
→ Behaviour Analysis. Track suspicious actions like tab switch or multiple faces.
→ Trust Score. Get a single trust score based on click, screen and camera tracking.

📊 Analytics & Data-Driven Insights

→ Team Collaboration. Collaborate on forms and share results and reports.
→ Analytics & Reports. See the score, marked confidence levels and responses. Export in PDF.
→ Excel Export. Export reports in Excel or Spreadsheets for further analytics.
→ Single Dashboard. Use a secure real-time dashboard to manage your online tests.
→ Notifications. Receive real-time updates in your dashboard.

🔒 Security & Compliance

→ Secure Tests. Ensure your respondents cannot use the same test twice.
→ Secure. Keep the data secure and in compliance with GDPR.
→ Compliance. Screen and camera tracking mechanisms require explicit approval from test-takers.

✨ Brand Customization & Ease of Use

→ Simple. Quilgo works like native Google Forms™ on any device and browser.
→ Branding. Add your custom logo and customize colors to your test.
→ No additional software. Quilgo is software as a service and does not require any additional software installation.
→ User-friendly. Quilgo provides all needed instructions and tutorial videos to respondents.
→ Support. Speak with our team if you have any questions.

⚙️ HOW TO SETUP

Watch this video: https://youtu.be/6TBXa2y4k5k

1. Install this add-on
2. Go to your Google Forms™ form, click the "puzzle" icon and choose "Quilgo". Click "Configure".
3. Click "Enable Quilgo", then "Go to your Dashboard".

Free trial. No card is required.

🧑‍🏫 WHO USES QUILGO?

Quilgo supports secure proctoring for organizations of all sizes—from small businesses to leading institutions. It’s trusted by educators, corporate teams, training providers, recruiters, government agencies, and certification bodies to assess students, employees, candidates, and external participants.

Key Use Cases:

• Educational Institutions: Secure testing for schools and top universities like Harvard, MIT, and Oxford.
• Businesses and Recruiters: Candidate assessments and employee training in companies like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon.

From private practices to large enterprises, Quilgo scales to meet diverse assessment needs.

💎 COMPARE QUILGO TO OTHERS

Watch this video to compare to Boloforms, Extended Forms, Autoproctor, Form Limiter, Presenter, AddonForge and other similar extensions:

https://youtu.be/GmmTHMpSJAg?feature=shared

Here’s what makes Quilgo the ultimate choice:

• Unlimited Team Size: Perfect for organizations of any scale.
• Comprehensive Quiz Bank: Organize and store all your assessments in one place.
• Automatic Submission: Never miss a submission deadline.
• Detailed Reporting: Access both individual and group reports with ease.

• Built for Scale: Seamlessly host exams for thousands, from 1,000 up to 10,000+ users.
• Compliance & Security: GDPR-compliant, with data stored securely in Google for Google Forms users.

📎 USEFUL LINKS

Compliance and DPA: https://quilgo.com/dpa

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Form Publisher
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Generate templated documents with Google Forms™. Generate PDF, Google Docs™, Sheets™, Slides™, Microsoft Word, Excel, Powerpoint customized documents. Get them approved and signed.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Form Publisher Generate templated documents with Google Forms™. Generate PDF, Google Docs™, Sheets™, Slides™, Microsoft Word, Excel, Powerpoint customized documents. Get them approved and signed. Form Publisher works with either Google Forms™ or Google Sheets™. With Google Forms™, documents are generated one by one on each form submission. With Google Sheets™, you can mass generate documents in bulk.

Easily create customized documents from Google Forms™ by turning form submission data or spreadsheet rows into beautifully designed PDFs, Google™, or Office documents. With the Google Forms™ add-on, you can also send them via email to be approved and signed online.

You can use 3 formats of document templates:
- Google Docs™ template for easy templating
- Google Sheets™ template for more control of structure
- Google Slides™ template for presentations

Streamline tedious business processes through automated document generation workflows. Generate and send invoices, quotes, waivers, certificates, and many other documents through simple form submissions. Store all generated documents on Google Drive™. 

More details on https://form-publisher.com
This add-on is made by Talarian https://talarian.io

GETTING STARTED

Get started in a few easy steps after installing the Form Publisher add-on:

➤ Form Publisher in Google Forms™
1. Create a document template (can be Google Docs™, Sheets™, or Slides™), and add custom markers based on your form questions.
2. Configure your document recipients to decide who will receive which documents, in which formats, with what permissions. Optionally, you can set up an approval workflow and a signature request.
3. Form Publisher automatically generates documents from your Google Form™ responses, stores them in Google Drive™, and sends them to recipients via email, for approval and/or for a signature. 

➤ Form Publisher in Google Sheets™:
1. Create a document template (can be Google Docs™, Sheets™, or Slides™), and add custom markers based on your spreadsheet columns.
2. Form Publisher mass generates documents from your Google Sheets™ data and stores them in Google Drive™. 


USE CASES

Automate and simplify the creation of the most tedious business processes using Form Publisher. 
➤ Purchase/Quote requests: automatically generate documents like purchase requests or quotes based on information provided by your customers. 
➤ Invoices: automatically mass generate invoices for all your customers at the end of the month. You can then easily send them by a email with Yet Another Mail Merge (YAMM)
➤ Waiver/Consent forms: whether you’re running an event or need consent for use of information, Form Publisher makes the document creation and signature collection process easy. 
➤ Leave/Time-off requests: simply have your employees fill out the request in a Google Form™ and you will have it all documented in a Google Drive™. Optionally you can set up an approval workflow so that the documents are sent to the appropriate people for approval. 
➤ SOAP notes: allow medical professionals to track patient information just by filling out a form. 
➤ Service/Maintenance requests: keep customers and renters happy by digitizing the maintenance request process. 
➤ Intake/Assessment/Release forms: whether you are a medical professional or personal trainer, create workflows to collect form information and generate documents for each step of client interaction.
➤ Incident report forms: digitize the incident reporting process. Have your team members fill in incident reports via a Google Form™ and have it documented and escalated based on the submission.  
➤ Agreements (BAA, DPA..): create agreements that can be sent out, signed, and retrieved automatically. 
➤ Audit/Evaluation forms: turn feedback information into manageable documents that can be easily reviewed. 
➤ Lesson plans: have customized lesson plans generated and sent to your students or clients based on the information they provide. 
➤ Invitation/Registration forms: automatically turn registration information into proper documents for your records. 
➤ Attendance/Enrollment certificates: create certificates for your students, running events, bootcamp and have them be automatically sent to the attendees. 

Our users come from all types and sizes of organizations, industries, and locations. 

MAIN BENEFITS AND FEATURES

➤ Document merge: merge documents into many file formats such as PDF, Google Docs™, Sheets™, or Slides™ and Microsoft Word, Excel, or PowerPoint. 
➤ Custom templates: create personalized templates with Google Docs™, Sheets™, or Slides™.
➤ Store files in Google Drive™: choose a folder where your generated documents will be stored. Works with Shared Drives. 
➤ Define a file naming convention for generated files
Google Sheets™ only:
➤ Mass generates personalized documents in bulk.
Google Forms™ only:
➤ Approval workflows: set up simple approval workflows for your documents. Let reviewers approve or reject with a comment.
➤ Personalized email notifications: configure the emails that get sent to the recipient or approvers list with merge markers.
➤ Automated sharing: automatically share documents with dynamic lists of users and approver Social & Entertainment

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Formesign - Signature workflow
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Collect multiple signatures in Google Forms™. Setup approval workflow for signatures.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Formesign - Signature workflow Collect multiple signatures in Google Forms™. Setup approval workflow for signatures. Google Forms™ allows you to easily create forms and collect responses from your users. But it doesn’t offer a native electronic signature feature. With Formesign's Signature workflow addon (Mailrecipe), you can accept legally binding electronic signatures directly from Google Forms™. This add-on simplifies the process of obtaining multiple signatures on important documents, contracts, and agreements.

❇️ Features

➤ Create your signature workflow in minutes with our setup wizard
➤ Get legally binding signatures in Google Forms™
➤ Incorporate multiple signatures into your form effortlessly
➤ Collect notes and other additional details from the approvers
➤ Conveniently sign forms on any device including mobiles and tablets
➤ Design a professional looking form by customizing the layout, fonts, colors
➤ Customize the title for signature field and add description
➤ Mark signatures fields as required, optional, hidden or for office use
➤ View responses in Google Forms™ or sync it to Google Sheets™
➤ Convert the form responses into a signed document
➤ Automatically sync the signed documents to your Google Drive™
➤ Rename the synced files to include the respondent name or email
➤ Email signed documents to form respondents as well as collaborators

❇️ How to add signature workflow?

Open your form in Google Forms™ > click on the addon icon > click Signature workflow> click Configure e-signature > Setup wizard will be displayed > Enable the e-signature option and click Next > E-signature widget will be automatically added before the Submit button > click Add approval signature > Email approver setup wizard will be displayed > select the approver email field > update the subject, click Next > update the email, click Next > You can click on Add another approver or preview the form and test the approval workflow.

❇️ Benefits

➤ Legally binding signatures
Our eSignature feature ensures that signatures collected through Google Forms™ are legally binding, enabling users to sign contracts, agreements, and other legal documents online.

➤ Easy to use
Signature workflow simplifies the process of collecting multiple signatures, making it easy for users to obtain signatures without the need for complex software or third-party services.

➤ Saves time and money
Signature workflow eliminates the need for printing, scanning, and mailing documents, saving users time and money. The signed documents can be accessed and shared instantly, increasing efficiency.

❇️ Use cases for forms with signature workflow

HR: Onboarding and exit process requires collecting signatures on various documents from the employees and their supervisor, HR manager. For example, employment contracts, confidentiality agreements, performance appraisal, employee handbook and policies, time off requests, employee survey and feedback, training acknowledgement and more

Operations: Operations within an organization involve a wide range of processes that can benefit from the implementation of signature workflows. For example, internal audits and compliance checks, safety inspections and quantity assurance, change orders and service requests, work orders for equipment maintenance and repairs, vendor/supplier contracts and more

Finance: Signature workflows are essential in Finance to streamline process, enhance security and compliance. For example, expense reimbursements, loan and mortgage application forms, customer onboarding and KYC, vendor contracts etc

❇️ Pricing

Formesign's Signature workflow is a paid product with a 7-day trial.
➤ $38 for 100 responses per month
➤ $58 for 200 responses per month
➤ $98 for 300 responses per month

You can either choose the monthly or annual subscription. For details, refer to the pricing page. For higher volumes, write to us using the support link below. Communication

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Awesome Table
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Export data from Salesforce, Quickbooks, and many other sources to Google Sheets™. No technical skill required.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Awesome Table Export data from Salesforce, Quickbooks, and many other sources to Google Sheets™. No technical skill required. Awesome Table has two products:

➤ Connectors: schedule data exports from applications such as Salesforce, Quickbooks, Hubspot, Facebook Ads, Zendesk or databases like MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL or BigQuery (~40 different sources), into Google Sheets™ in a few clicks with the add-on for Google Sheets™

➤ Apps: Make your spreadsheet data accessible and searchable in a website or intranet as interactive catalogs, directories, FAQs, maps for Google Maps™, or Gantt charts with the app creation tool at app.awesome-table.com

Forget copy/paste and csv hell, focus on building reports and dashboards.

 
GETTING STARTED WITH CONNECTORS

After installing our add-on for Google Sheets™:
1) Connect to a data source you want to import data from
2) Choose the data you want to extract
3) Customize your spreadsheet columns and preview before importing
4) Run your request
In a matter of seconds, your data appears in your spreadsheet!

We integrate with roughly 40 sources. The full list is available here:
https://awesome-table.com/connectors/help/export-to-google-sheets

Instantly connect, integrate & sync with, export & pull reports from:

✅ Accounting, Tax, Finance Ops

🔹QuickBooks - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export any report (including Balance Sheet, Profit and Loss, Statement of Cash Flows, and other segmented, detailed or summary reports) or raw data (including Accounts, Bills, Customers, Employees, Invoices, Items, Payments, and Vendors).

✅ CRM, Customer Support, Customer Service, Customer Success, RevOps

🔹HubSpot - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export your Contacts, Companies, Deals, Products, Properties, Quotes, and Tickets.
🔹Salesforce - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export your Reports, build sales funnels, and understand your sales performance.
🔹Zendesk - Export and monitor Support Tickets, and Comments on Posts and Articles.

✅ Developer and Design tools, DevOps, REST API

🔹Any REST API - Connect to your favorite API using an API key or your username and password, and use a table to configure your query instead of editing long URL paths. Query like a pro using JMESPath and your pagination method of choice. 
🔹Figma - Keep track of comments, components, and frames by file and monitor your team components, projects, and styles.
🔹GitHub - Integrate with Google Sheets™ to sync your own or public repository issues, comments, commits and pull requests.
🔹Jira - Integrate with Google Sheets™ and export issues, comments, projects, and user details. Search through issues using Jira Query Language (JQL). Analyze your team’s performance and productivity.
🔹Unsplash - Easily log in with Unsplash and use Awesome Table’s intuitive API interface to get stats on photos, users, and collections.
🔹Vercel - Use OAuth 2 to connect to Vercel and query any endpoint.

✅ Productivity, project management

🔹Google Maps™ Geocode - Convert addresses into geographic coordinates and vice versa.

✅ Google Workspace™

🔹Google Contacts™ - Export and keep track of your contacts, groups, and directories.
🔹Google Drive™ - Search using advanced filters and export lists of files and folders to keep track of file changes, ownership, and permissions.
🔹Google Photos™ - Export details of all your photos and albums.
🔹Google Sheets™ - No more IMPORTRANGE, keep spreadsheets synced between themselves and your stakeholders up to date with what’s relevant to them.
🔹Google Tasks™ - Get a birds-eye view of all your todos and analyze your productivity.

✅ Marketing, agencies, Marketing Ops, performance marketing

🔹Facebook Ads - Export data related to your advertising campaigns, ad sets, and individual ads.
🔹Google Analytics 4™ - Run analytics, including pageviews, sessions, and users. Additionally, segment the data by device type, country, and page.
🔹Google Analytics 3™ - Run analytics, including pageviews, sessions, and users. Additionally, segment the data by device type, country, and page.
🔹Google Search Console™ - Run analytics, including clicks, impressions, CTR, and position by device, country, page, search query, or type. Keep track of changes to your site maps.
🔹Google Trends™ - Explore and analyze the popularity of search terms on Google Search over time and across different geographic regions.
🔹Youtube - Put Youtube’s API to work and monitor comments for individual videos or across your channel or other channels, export and analyze lists of videos, subscriptions, and more.
🔹YouTube Analytics - Run analytics and access videos and playlist reports from your channels.

✅Databases


🔹Google BigQuery - Input an SQL query and get the data directly in your spreadsheet
🔹MySQL - Export data from tables, databases, and query results in various formats, including SQL, CSV (Comma-Separated Values), and XML.
🔹PostgreSQL - Export data from tables, databases, and query results in various formats, including SQL, CSV (Comma-Separated Values), and other text-based formats.
🔹SQL server - Export data from tables, databases, views, and query results in various formats, inc Productivity

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Zoho Connect
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Employee experience app to level up your work culture.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Zoho Connect Employee experience app to level up your work culture. Giving employees the ability to express themselves is very empowering. By doing this, employees naturally learn to trust the organization and form a connection with peers and the company's values, creating a pleasant environment for all employees and the organization as a whole.

But how can companies empower employees this way? The answer is simple: Zoho Connect is a platform built for this. With familiar social features and dedicated tools for internal communication, employee recognition, knowledge sharing, file management, automation, and advanced admin functions, Connect is the perfect solution for elevating the employee experience in your organization.  

Our main goal is to help organizations build an informed workforce and assist teams and employees across hierarchies at every step along the way to achieve individual and collective goals.  


Features

Communication for dynamic teams 
With familiar social-media themed Feeds, you can start conversations with co-workers, @mention users, or groups; like, comment, share, and follow co-workers; or start a poll to find out what your team thinks.

Use the Company Wall to stay up-to-date with the latest developments, announcements from company executives, company events, and important news. 

Additionally, create meetings, view team schedules, and hold video conferences with your team members.

Collaborative spaces to streamline work
Organize teams into groups, discuss, share ideas, and work together. Use the built-in apps or integrations to ensure your team has what they need to accomplish their goals.

A bird's eye view of everything important
Use the customizable Dashboard to keep everything important in one place. Choose from an array of widgets to create an information architecture that's easy on the eye, relevant, and accessible for all employees. 

Recognition where it is due
With our peer-to-peer recognition module, you can recognize peers and managers for their contribution. A simple "Good Job" or a "Thank You" can go a long way in making anyone's day, and with Connect, you have the option to award badges to each other and let gratitude drive your interactions with other members of the organization.

Company-wide live broadcasts, simplified
Use live broadcast to elevate employee engagement and internal communications. From company-wide updates to interactive Q&A sessions with the leadership, to internal training, reach 10,000 plus employees in one go. Ensure that all your employees feel like they belong in the organization, helping you build a more cohesive company culture.

Easily accessible information
Use the built-in knowledge management and document repository to share policies, guides, goals, and values. Build an archive for employees to draw on when needed.

Bridging the gap 
Use Town Halls and Live Broadcasts to conduct regular AMAs with company leadership or topic experts. Cultivate transparency, build trust, and co-create a healthy company culture.

Exclusive space for idea sharing 
Inspiration can come from anywhere. Using the Ideas module in Zoho Connect, employees have a platform to share ideas and tap into their collective potential. Users can vote on and comment to show support for an idea, making it easier to plan, prioritize, and implement it. 

Work plans help you get ahead
Whether it's a team project or a personal to-do list, you can create a work plan using Kanban-style task Boards. Break complex projects into smaller tasks, assign them to the right people, set priority levels, and track the progress of work, so you and your team can focus on what's important.

Create positive feedback loops
Run employee surveys to take the pulse of your organization. Get an understanding of what employees require, and incorporate their feedback to ensure they're engaged and happy at work.
	
A schedule that you can carry anywhere
From personal appointments and team meetings to the office football tournament, you can create events in Connect's calendar and invite colleagues. Track who will be attending using the RSVP feature. 

Automate work to improve productivity
Build custom apps to solve use cases such as work-related bookings and travel, register details of new hires, or gather the details on the volunteers for your charity programs. Through Workflows and Schedulers, you can automate regular and repetitive work.

Bring your apps together
Get the Zoho advantage. Connect integrates with multiple apps within the Zoho ecosystem to provide you with a seamless experience. Through integrations with popular apps like Zapier, Trello, Google Drive, and more, you can keep track of what's going on without switching tabs. 

Advanced admin capabilities
Decentralize admin responsibilities and assign them to employees using custom roles, automate adding users to groups/boards using workflow-based dynamic membership, and gain insights on your intranet performance with richer analytics.

Never miss an update, but don't let them overwhelm you
With push notifica Communication

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: ONE UP
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: ONE UP is the ONE-STOP app for running your business. All-in-one invoicing, accounting, inventory, CRM and expenses.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
ONE UP ONE UP is the ONE-STOP app for running your business. All-in-one invoicing, accounting, inventory, CRM and expenses. “Automating accounting, inventory, and customer relationships (CRM) has truly changed the work we do. We are so excited to have our sales orders turn into invoices, our invoices turn into payments, and for our customers, COGS, income and credit card fees to be managed in one place.” 
- Devron Sternke, Founder, RedSword T-Shirts

Start your free, 30-day trial today to see how you can:

• AUTOMATE ACCOUNTING - Sync your bank to ONE UP, validate suggested entries, and your books are done. Automate 90% or more of your regular small business bookkeeping. Can be set-up for U.S. Sales Tax or Worldwide VAT.

• INVOICE EFFORTLESSLY - Flexible options for invoicing your customers. Full invoices and sales orders system with beautiful, customizable templates. And, it only takes one click to email an invoice to your customer, so you get paid on time.  

• AUTOMATE INVENTORY - Automate Purchase Orders, receive inventory with 1 click, and update stock levels. Easily track and adjust product levels on your phone, tablet, or desktop computer. 

• ACCESS SMART, REAL-TIME REPORTS - See your Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet reports in real-time to help you stay on top of your cash. Easily export data to Excel. 

• CLOSE MORE SALES - Smart, simple CRM helps you track your sales opportunities and to-do’s. Customize and email quotes easily with ONE UP, set follow-ups, and quickly close sales. Once you’ve gained a new customer, it’s easy to start sending invoices, tracking payments, and delivering products and services.

• GET YOUR PROJECTS DONE FASTER -  Collaborate and be more productive. Track tasks and time-sheets for your employees and contractors. Use that information to bill your clients’ projects with the 1-click “Bill Time” feature.

• MAKE YOUR PURCHASING EASY - Automated your purchasing / supply chain management. ONE UP keeps your products in stock by generating POs from Sales orders. Keep your suppliers + vendors happy, and never miss another bill payment. 

• FLEXIBLE TAX MANAGEMENT- ONE UP supports sales tax, VAT, and TVA (For United Kingdom, France, China, and other countries). Close your tax period and run tax reports at any point for income tax filing.

• TRUSTWORTHY - ONE UP is one of the most popular applications for Google Apps, used by thousands of small businesses all over the world.

• INTEGRATIONS - Interact with ONE UP directly in your Gmail inbox with ONE UP Smart Notifications. Since ONE UP is installed inside your Google Apps account, you get contacts sync and quick access to Google Meetings and Google Apps email directly inside ONE UP.

• ONE UP GROWS WITH YOU- With affordable plans starting at $9 for a single user, up to an unlimited account, ONE UP scales well with your growing business.

• MOBILE BUSINESS - ONE UP is as good on your mobile device as on your desktop. Take your business anywhere with the most complete mobile business app. ONE UP is perfect for Android, iPhone, iPad and other tablets and smartphones.

• HIGHEST GRADE SECURITY AND BACKUPS - Full 256-bit SSL encryption and multiple storage locations keep your information safe and secure.

• ALWAYS AVAILABLE - Guaranteed 99.8% uptime ensures you access to your information, anytime, anywhere.
  
ONE UP is supported in any country with the following languages: English, French, Chinese


ABOUT ONE UP

ONE UP empowers thousands of successful small business owners across the globe. Our goal is to help you run your business with a simple, powerful app that automates invoicing, accounting, inventory, CRM, projects, expenses, and more. 

We heard business owners say that invoicing should be as easy as one click or touch, so we’ve done things like make it simple to create an invoice from a sales order or sales opportunity. We heard small business owners say they wanted their accounting to take minutes instead of dozens of hours each month, so we automated bookkeeping and made it easy to validate debits, credits, and expenses at the touch of a button on a mobile device or desktop. We heard our customers say that inventory and products needed to be automated, so we’ve made it simple for you to keep track of your stock and reorder / replenish your inventory with the touch of a button.

Funded since 2010 by Siparex, Altos Ventures and angels - we’ve evolved from myERP.com and are now recognized as a major partner with Google Apps, Square, and Wix. Business Tools

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Team Time Tracker
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: 📆 Keep projects profitable with automatic project time tracking and budgets for Google Calendar™. 📊 Categorize, label, and calculate time directly from Google Calendar events.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Team Time Tracker 📆 Keep projects profitable with automatic project time tracking and budgets for Google Calendar™. 📊 Categorize, label, and calculate time directly from Google Calendar events. Boost project profitability and gain full transparency into your time costs with TimeNavi. TimeNavi reads your calendar and finds events with project codes or colors to categorize automatically. Effortlessly track billable hours and manage project costs by categorizing and calculating time from Calendar events. Here are the key benefits:


➤ Increased Profitability 🤑 : Rank your projects by value - see which clients are your most and least profitable. Boost your project's profitability by accurately tracking time and setting budgets.

➤ Budgeting and Planning 📊 : Set accurate budgets based on detailed historical time tracking data. Reduce costs by staying within budget - keep watch on which clients and projects take up the most time.

➤ Resource Management 🔍 : Transparency on internal hours burned. Decide whether clients are a large enough profit margin.

➤ Accurate Billing 🎉: Ensure precise billing for future projects with detailed time tracking data - understand how long the project took last time to create the correct proposal for the next project.

➤ Significant Cost Savings 💸: Save tens of thousands of dollars by eliminating guesswork in project budgets and timelines.

➤ Business Transparency 👀 : Gain full transparency into your real-time project timelines and budgets.



With TimeNavi, you can eliminate the need for manual timesheets and streamline your workflow by automatically categorizing time directly from your calendar events. Keep your projects on track, profitable, and transparent with the power of TimeNavi’s AI-driven time tracking.

Here’s what some of our customers say: 

➤ Less work tracking time: “[TimeNavi] is so much less work. You don’t have to remember to do your start and stop time, it just brings it in on a system that we’re already using [Google Calendar].” 

➤ Full time transparency: “We were kind of making our best guess in a lot of instances of what things should cost or how much time we think something is going to take but it benefited us to actually be able to look at numbers and say like, “Oh! We spent way more time on this, we need to charge more, or whatever the case might be.”

➤ Increased profitability: “TimeNavi is proving to be really valuable for our business, and a total game changer for anyone that is using Google Calendar to track time for billing or productivity. As a business that needs to track multiple projects, with differing chargeable rates this App has absolutely nailed it! Great work” 

➤ C-Suite Management: “TimeNavi has been an amazing tool for me.  In fact, so good that I have hooked up my entire executive and management time with it.  The time insights we get from TimeNavi have helped us focus on what matters most and have allowed us all to become more effective and productive with our time.  I highly recommend this tool!”


Getting Started
---

1. Open TimeNavi in the sidebar of your Google Calendar™.
2. Complete the onboarding process and create your first project to track employee time.
3. Set a project budget and manage your team to monitor progress and stay within budget.
4. Gain valuable insights into time allocation, identify potential budget overruns, and enhance your business profitability.


Use Cases
---

Whether for personal or professional use, TimeNavi has something for everyone to save time calculating time.

➤ Digital Marketing and Creative Agencies: Track time across multiple calendars for a single project—TimeNavi automates hours of manual tracking in seconds. Add an hourly rate to ensure your project is profitable and see if you’re breaking even.

➤ Sales teams: Track the performance time of your sales team. Teams track the number of new sales meetings, the time spent on account management and other performance metrics. Export your own or their Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Managers: Track time and measure the performance of your team by choosing a metric and calculating how much time they have spent on those key metrics. Export that data from your Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or export your Google Calendar™ to Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Tutoring companies: Calculate the time and the pay of tutors by calculating the number of hours and adding a $/hour to the project. You can see the number of hours worked and the money they've made.

➤ Lawyers: Calculate your time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting time and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to calculate your bills.

➤ Freelancers: Track time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting hours and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to see if you broke even on your project.

➤ Construction businesses: Contracting employees and need to calculate their time? TimeNavi calculates your events in Google Calendar™ events quickly and easily. It is a low-tech, simple solution for businesses that want to Project Management

Finance Legal & Admin.docx.name: Neartail - Order form
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.description: Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount.
Finance Legal & Admin.docx.search_text:
Neartail - Order form Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount. You are a store owner who wants your customers to order online. You use Google Forms™ to take orders. But, it lacks key features to calculate order amount and accept payment. Use Neartail's Order form addon to enhance Google Forms™ with calculation and payment collection. Create order forms that are fully functional and easy-to-use for your customers. 

If you haven’t started on your form yet, you can use the prebuilt Neartail templates to create your order form. If you have already created your form in Google Forms™, then you can use the AI powered Neartail addon to automatically convert the questions in Google Forms™ into relevant products with prices and fields to collect customer details in your order form.

❇️ How Neartail leverages AI to convert your google form into order form?

When you customize the form using the Neartail addon, you can enable the Format prices option that:
➤ automatically identifies questions with prices and converts them into products to be sold by quantity, weight or with variants.
➤ converts simple question types into products that allows you to add product specific attributes such as description, tax, available stock & more.
➤ adds the formula to calculate the order amount based on the product prices in the form and displays an order summary in the bill format. 
➤ transforms responses into order line items to create aggregate reports for sales by product, customer & view sales trends by week or month.

❇️ Features: Calculate order amount in Google Forms™

➤ Dynamically calculate the total amount for the products ordered by the user and display it in your form in real time.
➤ Add coupon codes option in your order form to offer your customers a percentage discount, fixed amount discount or free shipping discount.
➤ Write formulas to enforce minimum order amount, offer free shipping for orders exceeding specified order amount threshold & more.
