Marketing & Sales Automation.docx.search_text:
Shared Contacts for Google Calendar™ This add-on lets you view and share contact info with your team right from Google Calendar™. It also allows you to add notes to your contacts, keeping everyone in sync. Easily see who you’re collaborating with and share their contact details to your entire team — right from Google Calendar™. It also allows you to add notes to your contacts.

Shared Contacts for Google Calendar™ brings smart contact sharing and management into your Docs™ experience. Whether you’re sharing a folder with teammates or collaborating on a document with external partners, this add-on helps you instantly see, comment and share  the contact information of everyone involved.

What you can do with Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

✅ Share and sync contacts effortlessly

• Share any Google Contact™ label (list) with individuals or Google Groups

• Instantly sync shared contacts to Gmail™, Google Contacts™, mobile devices (iPhones, Android, Google phones), Calendar™, Drive™, and more

• Keep your team’s contact list consistent and centralized across the company


✅ Control permissions and visibility

• Set permission levels: “View Only, Can Edit, Can Share, Can Delete”

• Hide sensitive contact fields from unauthorized users

• Ensure data sharing complies with internal privacy and security policies


✅ Centralize and manage your Google Workspace™ directory

• Sync your Google Workspace™ Directory and LDAP with users’ devices (iPhones, Android, Google Phones)

• Let employees update their own directory profiles

• Build and manage a unified, always up-to-date company address book


✅ Access shared contacts everywhere

• Your users can access shared contacts in Gmail™, Google Contacts™, Android, iPhone, and CRMs 

• No installation required on user devices — sync happens in real time

• Enable autocomplete in Gmail™ and other Google apps


✅ Comments, Notes and notifications

• Add internal notes or comments to contacts directly from Gmail™

• Mention teammates in notes using @mentions — they’ll get notified instantly

• With the help of notifications, you can revert any edits made on the contact list


✅ Custom Fields to personalize your contact cards

• Set custom fields like “Customer ID,” “Plan Type,” “Onboarding Date,” “Birthday” or anything your team needs

• You can define custom contact fields using free text input or dropdown menus with preset options

• Then when your contacts are created or updated by your users or the AI, custom fields can be filled out manually or selected from predefined dropdown menus

• Structure contacts based on your workflow or industry - set custom fields like “Customer Type,” “Sales Region,” or “Project Name” to organize your contacts in a way that fits your industry — whether you’re in sales, education, healthcare, or real estate. This makes your contact lists more useful and easier to manage

• Improve searchability and categorization of shared contacts - categories like "Millennials”, “Buyer  Priority,” “Renewal Due,” or “Favourite colour - Blue” so your team can quickly find the right contacts. This improves search results and helps everyone stay organized.


✅ Search, filter, and organize contacts

• Use advanced search to find contacts by company, location, job title, or tags

• Filter by custom fields, roles, teams, clients, or vendors

• Organize your database your way with flexible labeling and grouping options


✅ History logs : 

• Track every change made to a contact, including who edited what and when

• Revert edit of the contact data from notifications

• Improve transparency and audit readiness


✅ Unlimited Backup/Restore

• Restore deleted contacts anytime — no time limits

• With Shared Contacts admin logs, track any update made in contacts by your users.

• Use multi-criteria search to run investigations , revert updates and restore in one click any deleted contact.


✅ Integrate with the tools you already use
• Works natively with Gmail™ and Google Contacts™

• Synchronize contacts from your Active Directory, CRM, ERP, and mobile devices — all in one place

• Connect with CRMs 

• Integrate with helpdesks, IP phone systems, and 3,000+ apps via Zapier or our Public API




Why Choose Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is one of the top-rated solutions for sharing and managing Google Contacts™ across your team or organization. Whether you’re using Gmail™ or Google Workspace™ (formerly G Suite), you can easily create and share contact labels (also known as contact groups) with internal and external users including free Gmail™ accounts. It’s trusted by thousands of teams as a better alternative to tools like Shared Contacts Manager, ContactBook, Shared Groups, and others.

Contacts are auto-captured from emails, calls, forms, and files. With just a few clicks, you can assign flexible permissions like View Only, Can Edit, Can Share, or Can Delete. You don’t need to leave Gmail™ — you can view, edit, and share contacts directly from your inbox or Google Contacts™. Contacts sync everywhere and no more duplicate entry or update work needed. Every member of your team gets the right contact instantly, with full context and notes. The app a Creativity

Marketing & Sales Automation.docx.name: Mail Merge with Attachments
Marketing & Sales Automation.docx.description: Send personalized emails with Gmail™ Mail Merge. Include different file attachments, schedule emails for sending later, CC and BCC recipients, create drafts, track email opens, clicks, and bounces.
Marketing & Sales Automation.docx.search_text:
Mail Merge with Attachments Send personalized emails with Gmail™ Mail Merge. Include different file attachments, schedule emails for sending later, CC and BCC recipients, create drafts, track email opens, clicks, and bounces. Send personalized emails with Mail Merge for Gmail™. Each email is unique and tailored to your recipient, so everyone receives your intended message as if it were sent solely to them. The built-in email tracking lets you know when people have read your email message.

The mail merge addon is developed by Google Developer Expert and Google Cloud Champion.

You can use Gmail™ Mail Merge for sending mass emails easily. Whether you're sending holiday greetings, event invites, school assignments, press releases, or email newsletters, Mail Merge has got you covered. You can even schedule birthday messages in advance or reach existing customers with upcoming store offers.

Mail Merge works with Gmail™ and Google Workspace™ accounts. You can send merged emails immediately or use the built-in scheduler and send emails at a later date and time.

Create email templates inside Gmail™ or use the built-in visual HTML editor to create rich text emails using HTML and CSS. Gmail™ now supports media CSS queries in addition to inline CSS styles, making it easy to create beautiful emails. Mail Merge even supports email aliases, so you can send emails on behalf of someone else, like your office secretary.

Mail Merge is actively used by organizations worldwide to send email updates to their remote employees during the COVID-19 crisis. With Mail Merge, you can quickly and easily send personalized messages to your contacts, no matter where they are.

## Mail Merge Features

➩ One-click importing of Google Contacts™ for sending personalized emails
➩ Import contacts from Hubspot, Salesforce, Google Contacts, Mailchimp, PayPal, Stripe customers, Typeform responses, and more.
➩ Insert different file attachments for each email recipient.
➩ Included emojis and animated GIF images in the message body and emoji in the subject
➩ Skip sending emails to rows that are hidden in the sheet or filtered.
➩ Upload files from your computer or select existing documents from your Google Drive™
➩ Send merged emails immediately or schedule messages for sending later.
➩ Automatically CC or BCC every email message to your CRM or any other email address.
➩ Send emails on behalf of any other email address that is configured as an alias in Gmail™.
➩ Write your messages in plain text, rich HTML, or use an existing Gmail™ draft as an email template.
➩ No Mail Merge branding included in email footer
➩ Rich text formatting of spreadsheet cells preserved in emails
➩ Automatically create drafts in Gmail™ from Mail Merge
➩ Track your email opens (read receipts) and clicks on links
➩ Add an unsubscribe link to your email campaigns, view unsubscribes report
➩ The email bounced reports show messages that were not delivered
➩ Give your contacts an option to unsubscribe from your mail list
➩ Embed QR Code and Barcode images in email messages
➩ Send a test email to verify your Mail Merge campaign setting before sending the email blast to all recipients
➩ Set the Mail Merge Status column to SKIP if you would like to skip merging certain rows in the current batch.

The email subject line and the message body can be personalized for each recipient. Email messages can also be CC'ed or BCC'ed to one or more people.

You can include different attachments from Google Drive™ for each person and the email messages can be either in plain text or include rich-text (HTML) formatting. You can write the emails in HTML directly inside the Google Spreadsheet™ or you can create a draft message inside your Gmail™ account and use that as a template for Mail Merge.

The Mail Merge program includes optional tracking -it adds a 1x1 tracking image to the message body and if the recipient has enabled image downloads in their email client, the open activity is recorded.

Mail Merge can import Google Contacts™ into the sheet so you don't have to manually type the email addresses of your contacts. If a person has multiple email addresses, the Merge app gets the primary email address and if not available, it gets the Work email or the Home email.

Each message you send out has the same information but certain parts of the email are unique and each person in the mailing list is addressed individually.

## How many emails can I send per day?

All Mail Merge users can send 25 email recipients per day. You can upgrade to Premium Edition https://digitalinspiration.com/buy?sku=GA01 to increase your daily email quota to up to 1500 email recipients per day.

Go to the Google Sheets™ > Extensions > Mail Merge with Attachments > Show Email Quota to know your daily email quota that will be available after you upgrade to Mail Merge Premium. The quota is:

Mail Merge for Gmail™ Accounts - 400
Mail Merge for Google Workspace™ accounts - 1500

Google™ will automatically reset your daily quota around 1 PM PST.

## Attachment Size Limits

For email drafts, the maximum attachment size limit is 15 MB.
For email messages, the maximum file attachment size is 15 MB for Google Workspace™ and Gmail™ accounts.

Marketing & Sales Automation.docx.search_text:
Mergo Mail Merge Send personalized mass emails and track your results on Gmail™ Mergo Mail Merge
Send personalized mass emails. Mergo helps you write better emails and track your results effortlessly, powered by Gemini.

Mergo is a powerful mail merge add-on for Gmail™ , Google Sheets and ™Google Docs™, that helps you send personalized mass emails with ease, while tracking opens, clicks, and replies, and sending automated follow-ups to boost engagement. It uses Gemini AI to enhance your subject lines and content. Mergo also works with Microsoft Excel and CSV files, and lets you design beautiful newsletters.

Use Cases
-Lead Generation & Sales Prospecting: Import contacts from Google Contacts, CRM exports (Salesforce, HubSpot, Copper), or CSV files. Send targeted, personalized emails to prospects and manage your pipeline easily.
-Event Invitations & Reminders: Schedule and send personalized invites with attachments for corporate events, meetups, or product launches. Automate reminders to boost attendance.
-Promotions & Newsletters: Share promotions, discounts, and regular newsletters while tracking opens, clicks, and responses to improve customer engagement.
-Internal Communications: Streamline updates between managers, teams, HR, and parents, adding CC/BCC recipients to ensure no one misses critical information.
-Customer Feedback: Send satisfaction surveys and collect valuable insights to improve your services.
-PR & Media Campaigns: Share news with journalists, bloggers, and influencers to increase awareness.
-Greetings & Personal Messages: Easily send personalized greetings for holidays, birthdays, or thank-yous.
Features
-Send emails in bulk in no time to hundreds of recipients
-Personalize your email using merge fields like {{First Name}} in your Gmail™ template or in your Google Sheets™ contact list.
-Track opens, clicks, replies, bounces, and unsubscribes in real time.
-Automate follow-ups in the same email thread to increase response rates.
-Schedule campaigns for the best time to reach your audience.
-Use Gemini AI to enhance your subject lines and content for better engagement.
-Add personalized attachments, CC/BCC, reply-to, and use Gmail™ aliases.
-Turn Google Docs into Gmail™ drafts and send beautiful newsletters.
-Automatically import your contacts from Google Contacts
-Send a test email to yourself so you can preview its formatting, links, and images.

Pricing
➤ Freemium: first campaign 100% free, then free for up to 30 emails / campaign.
➤ Plans start at $1.50 / month. 
➤ Monthly, yearly & lifetime plans available.
➤ Team plans available for Google Workspace domains.
https://pricing.mergo.app/

Need Support?
Contact support@mergo.app and our team will get back to you shortly!
Or visit our help center: https://help.mergo.app/

Why Choose Mergo?
➤ Built for Security
Mergo keeps your data private by ensuring your recipient lists stay in your Google Sheets™ and your email content remains in Gmail™. As a next-generation Google add-on, Mergo’s code runs securely on Google’s infrastructure, without injecting custom scripts that could compromise your data. We also undergo annual security assessments to maintain the highest security standards.
To learn more check our Privacy Policy page: https://www.mergo.app/privacy-policy
➤ Gmail™, Sheets & Docs Integration
Unlike other mail merge tools, Mergo fully integrates with Gmail™ and Google Sheets™, allowing you to send campaigns directly from Gmail™ drafts, while managing and tracking your contacts from Google Sheets™.You can also use Google Docs™ to create and manage beautiful email templates for your campaigns with Mergo.
➤Enhanced with Gemini AI
Mergo uses Gemini AI to optimize your subject lines and content, helping you get more opens and responses

Support Mergo
If you enjoy Mergo, please consider leaving a review on this page to help us continue improving! 
You may also want to try our other apps like Folgo (https://www.folgo.app/) and Publigo (https://www.publigo.app/).

About Mergo 
Romain is also the creator of Yet Another Mail Merge (YAMM), Awesome Table & Form Publisher. He is not involved in those products anymore (they are now maintained by Talarian).
Romain is a member of the Google Developer Expert (GDE) program and has been working on Google Apps Script and Google APIs for more than 10 years. Creativity

Zoho CRM Zoho CRM is a flexible cloud-based CRM for your business that helps you attract, retain and delight customers. The Most used CRM software with Google Workspace

Zoho CRM empowers more than 150,000 businesses of all sizes and types to build great customer relationships and improve customer retention. 
Businesses can convert more leads to deals, interact with prospects and customers from within the cloud-based platform and grow their revenue. Businesses and industries can conduct their sales and marketing and customer support activities through streamlined processes, policies and managing people all from within a single platform. 

Zoho CRM for Google Workspace helps you bring all your emails, files, calendar appointments and tasks together in one place. 

Nurture leads, close more deals, and engage with customers across every stage of the customer life-cycle. Easily automate your sales process and let Zoho CRM take care of your regular sales activities and follow-ups so that you get more time to sell. 
 
FEATURES 
Customize your CRM layout using Canvas, a built-in drag and drop layout builder or just pick from a list of industry specific layouts 
Use workflows and save time spent on reptitive sales tasks with Salesforce automation 
Make AI powered data-driven decisions with in-depth Analytics tools, detect anomalies, build customizable reports across modules and get consolidated data at your fingertips 
Track, manage and sort sales performance data across teams and region using Sales Performance tracker
Omnichannel communication to keep conversations streamlined and across various channels like email, telephony, social media.
Run powerful targeted marketing campaigns and generate quality leads, convert and import them directly into the CRM using Sales and Marketing automation tools 
Take all of the above features on-the-go with the top rated mobile app

BENEFITS 
● Get a 360-degree view of your customer interactions. 
● Track leads, prospects, and business opportunities. 
● Customize Zoho CRM to specific industry needs.
● Get real-time notifications about customer actions. 
● Build and automate your sales and marketing processes.

Pricing

Why Google Workspace and Zoho CRM go well together
* Stop juggling between email and CRM

* Easily share files
Attach files from Google Docs in Zoho CRM, and share documents that open online and work on any platform.

Add tasks from Zoho CRM to Google Tasks. Plan your work time, never miss your deadlines, and ensure important work doesn’t fall through the cracks.

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Zoho Connect
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Employee experience app to level up your work culture.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Zoho Connect Employee experience app to level up your work culture. Giving employees the ability to express themselves is very empowering. By doing this, employees naturally learn to trust the organization and form a connection with peers and the company's values, creating a pleasant environment for all employees and the organization as a whole.

But how can companies empower employees this way? The answer is simple: Zoho Connect is a platform built for this. With familiar social features and dedicated tools for internal communication, employee recognition, knowledge sharing, file management, automation, and advanced admin functions, Connect is the perfect solution for elevating the employee experience in your organization.  

Our main goal is to help organizations build an informed workforce and assist teams and employees across hierarchies at every step along the way to achieve individual and collective goals.  


Features

Communication for dynamic teams 
With familiar social-media themed Feeds, you can start conversations with co-workers, @mention users, or groups; like, comment, share, and follow co-workers; or start a poll to find out what your team thinks.

Use the Company Wall to stay up-to-date with the latest developments, announcements from company executives, company events, and important news. 

Additionally, create meetings, view team schedules, and hold video conferences with your team members.

Collaborative spaces to streamline work
Organize teams into groups, discuss, share ideas, and work together. Use the built-in apps or integrations to ensure your team has what they need to accomplish their goals.

A bird's eye view of everything important
Use the customizable Dashboard to keep everything important in one place. Choose from an array of widgets to create an information architecture that's easy on the eye, relevant, and accessible for all employees. 

Recognition where it is due
With our peer-to-peer recognition module, you can recognize peers and managers for their contribution. A simple "Good Job" or a "Thank You" can go a long way in making anyone's day, and with Connect, you have the option to award badges to each other and let gratitude drive your interactions with other members of the organization.

Company-wide live broadcasts, simplified
Use live broadcast to elevate employee engagement and internal communications. From company-wide updates to interactive Q&A sessions with the leadership, to internal training, reach 10,000 plus employees in one go. Ensure that all your employees feel like they belong in the organization, helping you build a more cohesive company culture.

Easily accessible information
Use the built-in knowledge management and document repository to share policies, guides, goals, and values. Build an archive for employees to draw on when needed.

Bridging the gap 
Use Town Halls and Live Broadcasts to conduct regular AMAs with company leadership or topic experts. Cultivate transparency, build trust, and co-create a healthy company culture.

Exclusive space for idea sharing 
Inspiration can come from anywhere. Using the Ideas module in Zoho Connect, employees have a platform to share ideas and tap into their collective potential. Users can vote on and comment to show support for an idea, making it easier to plan, prioritize, and implement it. 

Work plans help you get ahead
Whether it's a team project or a personal to-do list, you can create a work plan using Kanban-style task Boards. Break complex projects into smaller tasks, assign them to the right people, set priority levels, and track the progress of work, so you and your team can focus on what's important.

Create positive feedback loops
Run employee surveys to take the pulse of your organization. Get an understanding of what employees require, and incorporate their feedback to ensure they're engaged and happy at work.
	
A schedule that you can carry anywhere
From personal appointments and team meetings to the office football tournament, you can create events in Connect's calendar and invite colleagues. Track who will be attending using the RSVP feature. 

Automate work to improve productivity
Build custom apps to solve use cases such as work-related bookings and travel, register details of new hires, or gather the details on the volunteers for your charity programs. Through Workflows and Schedulers, you can automate regular and repetitive work.

Bring your apps together
Get the Zoho advantage. Connect integrates with multiple apps within the Zoho ecosystem to provide you with a seamless experience. Through integrations with popular apps like Zapier, Trello, Google Drive, and more, you can keep track of what's going on without switching tabs. 

Advanced admin capabilities
Decentralize admin responsibilities and assign them to employees using custom roles, automate adding users to groups/boards using workflow-based dynamic membership, and gain insights on your intranet performance with richer analytics.

Never miss an update, but don't let them overwhelm you
With push notifica Communication

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Shared Contacts AI Auto-Updater for Gmail™
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Shared Contacts AI Auto-Updater for Gmail™ AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox. Keep all your  contacts always up to date automatically with the help of AI.
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is the simplest way to share, manage and sync Google™ Contacts across your entire organization directly from Gmail™ and other apps and devices. Whether you’re a small team or a large enterprise, this tool ensures that every employee has instant access to the latest contact information, anywhere, anytime.

🧠 Empowered by AI automation:
Once this Gmail™ Add-on is installed, its Smart AI Contact Updater runs in the background. It reads your emails and finds names, phone numbers, job titles, and more (email signature),  then automatically creates or updates contacts with the new information. It even writes helpful notes, like summarising your email conversation and updates custom fields (like customer ID, birth date, favourite colour).

🌐 One install — complete  access: 
Installing the Gmail™ Add-on also gives you access to the full Shared Contacts management platform. That means all shared contact management, advanced permission controls, custom fields & filters, directory sync, and integrations are at your fingertips from day one. 

What you can do with Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

✅Share and sync contacts effortlessly

Share any Google™ Contact label (list) with individuals or Google™ Groups

Instantly sync shared contacts to Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, mobile devices (iPhones, Android, Google phones), Calendar, Drive, and more

Keep your team’s contact list consistent and centralized across the company

✅Automate updates with AI

Detect contact info from emails and create and update contacts automatically

Reduce contact duplication, outdated records, and manual edits

Create new contacts from audio notes, email signatures, and messages

✅Control permissions and visibility

Set permission levels: “View Only, Can Edit, Can Share, Can Delete”

Hide sensitive contact fields from unauthorized users

Ensure data sharing complies with internal privacy and security policies

✅Centralise and manage your Google™ Workspace directory

Sync your Google™ Workspace Directory and LDAP with users’ devices (iPhones, Android, Google Phones)

Let employees update their own directory profiles

Build and manage a unified, always up-to-date company address book

✅Access shared contacts everywhere

Your users can access shared contacts in Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, Android, iPhone, Outlook, WhatsApp, Zoom, and CRM.

No installation required on user devices — sync happens in real time

Enable autocomplete in Gmail™ and other Google™ apps

✅Comments, Notes and notifications

Add internal notes or comments to contacts directly from Gmail™

Mention teammates in notes using @mentions — they’ll get notified instantly

With the help of notifications, you can revert any edits made on the contact list

✅Custom Fields to personalize your contact cards

Set custom fields like “Customer ID,” “Plan Type,” “Onboarding Date,” “Birthday” or anything your team needs

You can define custom contact fields using free text input or dropdown menus with preset options

Then when your contacts are created or updated by your users or the AI, custom fields can be filled out manually or selected from predefined dropdown menus

Structure contacts based on your workflow or industry - set custom fields like “Customer Type,” “Sales Region,” or “Project Name” to organize your contacts in a way that fits your industry — whether you’re in sales, education, healthcare, or real estate. This makes your contact lists more useful and easier to manage

Improve searchability and categorization of shared contacts - categories like "Millennials”, “Buyer  Priority,” “Renewal Due,” or “Favourite colour - Blue” so your team can quickly find the right contacts. This improves search results and helps everyone stay organized.

✅Search, filter, and organize contacts

Use advanced search to find contacts by company, location, job title, or tags

Filter by custom fields, roles, teams, clients, or vendors

Organize your database your way with flexible labeling and grouping options

✅History logs : 

Track every change made to a contact, including who edited what and when

Revert edit  of the contact data from notifications

Improve transparency and audit readiness

✅Unlimited Backup/Restore

Restore deleted contacts anytime — no time limits

With Shared Contacts admin logs, track any update made in contacts by your users.

Use multi-criteria search to run investigations , revert updates and restore in one click any deleted contact.

✅Integrate with the tools you already use

Works natively with Gmail™ and Google™ Contacts

Synchronize contacts from your Active Directory, CRM, ERP, and mobile devices — all in one place

Connect with CRMs

Integrate with helpdesks, IP phone systems, and 3,000+ apps via workflow automations or our Public API


Why Choose Shared Contacts for Gmail™?
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is one of the top-rated solutions for sharing and managing Google™ Contacts ac Creativity

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Timer + AI Proctor Limiter for Forms | Quilgo
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Timer + AI Proctor Limiter for Forms | Quilgo Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring. Overview

• Transform Google Forms™ into a proctored testing powerhouse with Quilgo— the trusted choice of over 30 million+ online assessments.
• Free to try, easy to set up, Quilgo’s innovative countdown timer and AI-driven proctoring ensure a secure, reliable testing experience.
• Bring ultimate integrity to your exams with Quilgo today!

⏱️ Test management and setup

→ Timer. Enable time limit in your tests. Perfect for online assessments and exams
→ Exam Mode. Schedule a date and time for your test and turn it into an online assessment.
→ Deadlines. Set a start time and time frames for your assignment.
→ Access Control. Restrict your quiz to specific people or enable registration.
→ Auto Close. Automatically turn the quiz off and stop once the time is over.
Easy Delivery. Send personal test links via email or post a group link.

🧑‍💻 Cheating Prevention

→ Camera Tracking. Reduce cheating by capturing the faces of test-takers
Screen Recording. Track the screen activity for increased cheating protection.
→ Enforce Tracking. Require all selected tracking methods to start a session.
→ Behaviour Analysis. Track suspicious actions like tab switch or multiple faces.
→ Trust Score. Get a single trust score based on click, screen and camera tracking.

📊 Analytics & Data-Driven Insights

→ Team Collaboration. Collaborate on forms and share results and reports.
→ Analytics & Reports. See the score, marked confidence levels and responses. Export in PDF.
→ Excel Export. Export reports in Excel or Spreadsheets for further analytics.
→ Single Dashboard. Use a secure real-time dashboard to manage your online tests.
→ Notifications. Receive real-time updates in your dashboard.

🔒 Security & Compliance

→ Secure Tests. Ensure your respondents cannot use the same test twice.
→ Secure. Keep the data secure and in compliance with GDPR.
→ Compliance. Screen and camera tracking mechanisms require explicit approval from test-takers.

✨ Brand Customization & Ease of Use

→ Simple. Quilgo works like native Google Forms™ on any device and browser.
→ Branding. Add your custom logo and customize colors to your test.
→ No additional software. Quilgo is software as a service and does not require any additional software installation.
→ User-friendly. Quilgo provides all needed instructions and tutorial videos to respondents.
→ Support. Speak with our team if you have any questions.

⚙️ HOW TO SETUP

Watch this video: https://youtu.be/6TBXa2y4k5k

1. Install this add-on
2. Go to your Google Forms™ form, click the "puzzle" icon and choose "Quilgo". Click "Configure".
3. Click "Enable Quilgo", then "Go to your Dashboard".

Free trial. No card is required.

🧑‍🏫 WHO USES QUILGO?

Quilgo supports secure proctoring for organizations of all sizes—from small businesses to leading institutions. It’s trusted by educators, corporate teams, training providers, recruiters, government agencies, and certification bodies to assess students, employees, candidates, and external participants.

Key Use Cases:

• Educational Institutions: Secure testing for schools and top universities like Harvard, MIT, and Oxford.
• Businesses and Recruiters: Candidate assessments and employee training in companies like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon.

From private practices to large enterprises, Quilgo scales to meet diverse assessment needs.

💎 COMPARE QUILGO TO OTHERS

Watch this video to compare to Boloforms, Extended Forms, Autoproctor, Form Limiter, Presenter, AddonForge and other similar extensions:

https://youtu.be/GmmTHMpSJAg?feature=shared

Here’s what makes Quilgo the ultimate choice:

• Unlimited Team Size: Perfect for organizations of any scale.
• Comprehensive Quiz Bank: Organize and store all your assessments in one place.
• Automatic Submission: Never miss a submission deadline.
• Detailed Reporting: Access both individual and group reports with ease.
• AI-Enhanced Quiz Creation: Generate questions with GPT for faster test prep.
• AI Proctoring Across Devices: Available on Android, with iOS support coming soon.
• Flexible Access Modes: Public and restricted options to match your needs.
• Unlimited Monthly Testing: No cap on proctored assessments.
• Built for Scale: Seamlessly host exams for thousands, from 1,000 up to 10,000+ users.
• Compliance & Security: GDPR-compliant, with data stored securely in Google for Google Forms users.

📎 USEFUL LINKS

Installation Guide - https://quilgo.com/google-forms-integration
Privacy Policy: https://quilgo.com/privacy
Compliance and DPA: https://quilgo.com/dpa

Our team would love to see you on board!

All Yours,
Quilgo Team

Why Choose Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is one of the top-rated solutions for sharing and managing Google Contacts™ across your team or organization. Whether you’re using Gmail™ or Google Workspace™ (formerly G Suite), you can easily create and share contact labels (also known as contact groups) with internal and external users including free Gmail™ accounts. Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Shared Contacts Manager for Google Contacts™
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Shared Contacts Manager for Google™ enables team members to share contacts in one click & access them from any device. Set user-level permissions. Auto-sync across devices instantly.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Shared Contacts Manager for Google Contacts™ Shared Contacts Manager for Google™ enables team members to share contacts in one click & access them from any device. Set user-level permissions. Auto-sync across devices instantly. Yes, you can share Google Contacts now. Enjoy flawless Gmail contact sharing in a few clicks, just like you work with Docs. Is it quick, secure, and effective? The answer is "Yes" to all!

Google Contacts is a great app, but it wasn’t originally built for teams. When you add a contact to your Gmail, it belongs to you only, and your coworkers are left in the dark. That means every time you try to collaborate on the same contacts, everyone ends up with outdated info or wastes time looking for a functional solution. Look no further - a perfect tool for Google Workspace shared contacts is here.

Features and benefits

✓ Share Google Contact labels with individuals, Google Workspace Groups, or share contacts in Gmail with individual account owners

✓ Synchronize your company's LDAP directory

✓ Enjoy automatic 2-way sync with Google Contacts or run it manually

✓ Connect the app to your CRM

✓ Benefit from cross-domain sharing

✓ Diverse control permissions: view-only, edit, or reshare

✓ Transfer contact label ownership for flexibility.

✓ Appoint team members to delegate your managerial duties

✓ Create or edit contacts and contact labels directly in the dashboard

✓ Access Google shared contacts across Gmail, Google Calendar, Drive, chats, messengers, and various phone apps regardless of your OS or device

✓ Get access to a vast knowledge base and comprehensive FAQ section.

✓ Receive online support. 

Google Shared Contacts Manager is designed to share contacts on Google for schools and colleges, sales teams, customer support, HR departments, real estate, construction, and landscaping firms, and any organization that needs Google contacts sharing and consistent contact information across users and devices. Educational and non-profit companies can benefit from a special discount for annual subscriptions.   

Privacy and security

You’re protected against data breaches. Shared Contacts Manager has passed all required security and privacy verifications by Google. It complies with GDPR and other major privacy regulations, giving your organization peace of mind - your contacts stay centralized and securely stored. Need to remove a contact for compliance? DPO requests are supported.

How to get started:

Step 1

Install the app from Workspace Marketplace and go to https://sharedcontactsmanager.com/app

Step 2

In the left panel, hover the mouse over a contact label (group) you want to share. Click on a "share" icon near that label.

Step 3

In the new window, add users you want to share a label with.
Select appropriate permissions: "view", "edit", "reshare", "owner".
Сlick Share label and all selected users will receive access to that label.

Pricing

- 14 days free unlimited trial
- $2 per user/month (billed annually)
- $3 per user/month (billed monthly)
https://sharedcontactsmanager.com/#pricing 

Use cases

Centralize contacts across multiple domains

Shared Contacts Manager enables users to create a unified directory of contacts from different Google Workspace domains. Various teams can always access this contact list directly in Gmail, Google Drive, and other integrated applications. 

Maintain a dynamic shared directory for teams

Keep sales, support, and HR teams connected thanks to a real-time shared address book. When one team member updates a contact, the changes reflect for everyone. 

Share contact information with external partners securely

Shared Contacts Manager creates new collaborative opportunities. The app allows you to provide access to your contacts to agencies, freelancers, or other contractors by granting them selective permissions without adding them to your domain. Share only the contacts you need and keep sensitive contact details private. 

Sync Google Workspace LDAP contacts

Manage LDAP-based contact directories from separate Workspace domains into a single global address list (GAL). Employees across all domains can search, access, and auto-complete contacts in Gmail, Google Meet, Calendar, and other applications. 

Two-way Google Contacts Sync

With Shared Contacts Manager, changes made in Google Contacts automatically sync to your company’s shared directories. Users stick to their familiar working Google environment without even logging in to a separate app. Sales departments, HR, and remote teams always have the latest contact details. Social & Entertainment

Signature in Google Forms by Bolo | Sign PDF Sign-on-screen signatures for your Google Forms | Take signatures inside Google Forms and store them in Google Sheets | Sign PDF BoloSign is here to elevate your Google Forms experience by adding seamless e-signature capabilities, making it a fantastic tool for small businesses. If you rely on Google Forms to collect data and manage workflows, BoloSign is about to make your life a lot easier! Let’s explore how this powerful add-on can transform the way you use Google Forms.

Key Features-

- Seamless Integration 🌐Adding BoloSign to your Google Forms is a breeze! Just head to the Google Workspace Marketplace to get started. With this integration, you can include signature fields directly in your forms, allowing respondents to sign documents electronically with ease.
- Real-Time Collaboration 🤝Collaborate with your team effortlessly! BoloSign allows everyone involved to work together in real-time, ensuring that the form's progress is always up-to-date and contributions are easily shared.
- Customizable Fields 🛠️Tailor your forms to fit your specific needs by adding custom fields. This flexibility means you can gather the precise information and signatures that matter most for your business.
- Bulk Send and Reminders 📧Need to send forms to multiple recipients? No problem! BoloSign lets you send forms in bulk and set up automated reminders for those who haven’t responded yet, ensuring timely completion without the hassle of manual follow-ups.

Advanced Features- 

1. Conditional Logic: Create dynamic workflows that adjust based on how recipients fill out form fields. Imagine a contract that changes based on user selections, making the process smoother and more efficient.
2. Pre-fill Information: Save time by automatically filling in form fields with relevant data from your contacts or other sources.
3. Branding and Customization: Make the signing experience uniquely yours by adding your logo, colors, and personalized messages.
4. Automated Follow-Up Emails: Set up reminder emails for signers who are lagging behind based on triggers you define.
5. API Integrations: Connect BoloSign with other tools like CRMs and marketing platforms for a seamless flow of data.

Security and Compliance

1. Legally Binding E-Signatures: BoloSign ensures compliance with eIDAS, UETA, and HIPAA regulations, giving you maximum legal validity for your signatures.
2. Secure Document Storage: Your documents are safeguarded with 256-bit encryption in the cloud, providing complete peace of mind.
3. Audit Trails: Keep a detailed record of every action taken on your documents for enhanced transparency and accountability.

Use Cases from Small Businesses with BoloSign for Google Forms

1. Contract Management 📑- Streamline sends and receives signed contracts by integrating e-signatures directly into your Google Forms. This approach saves time and reduces costs compared to traditional paper methods.
2. Event Registrations and Approvals 🎉- Manage event registrations effortlessly by collecting necessary permissions through Google Forms. The e-signature feature ensures all approvals are obtained quickly and securely.
3. Customer Feedback and Surveys 📝- Enhance feedback collection by incorporating e-signatures into surveys, ensuring responses are verified and actionable for informed business decisions.
4. Employee Onboarding 👨‍💼- Simplify the onboarding process by having new employees sign essential documents digitally through Google Forms, saving time while ensuring accuracy.
5. Supplier Agreements 📃- Improve procurement processes by collecting digital signatures on supplier agreements, ensuring all parties are aligned promptly.
6. Volunteer Agreements 🤲- Manage volunteer agreements for events or community initiatives efficiently using e-signatures in Google Forms.
7. Membership Forms 📋- Facilitate membership registration for clubs or organizations by incorporating digital signatures into Google Forms for a user-friendly experience.
8. Internal Approvals ✔️- Streamline internal workflows with digital signatures for approval processes like leave requests or expense reimbursements, reducing paperwork and speeding up decision-making.

With BoloSign, managing document signing within Google Forms becomes straightforward and efficient, saving you time while ensuring a smooth experience for both you and your clients! Ready to transform how you handle signatures? Let’s get started! 🚀 Utilities

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace. GearChain: Smart Inventory Management for Google Sheets™

Turn your everyday Google Sheets™ into a powerful, automated inventory management system. With GearChain, you can track items, scan barcodes, manage assets, and collaborate with your team directly inside the tools you already use. No new software to learn. No coding. Simply connect GearChain to Google Sheets™ and start managing inventory the smart way.

Why Choose GearChain

Most businesses already use Google Sheets™ for stock tracking because it is simple, accessible, and flexible. But as your inventory grows, manual updates, missing entries, and inconsistent data become unavoidable. GearChain upgrades your spreadsheet into a live inventory platform that connects your team, processes, and assets in real time. You keep the simplicity of Google Sheets™ but gain the automation, accuracy, and power of a modern inventory system.

Real Time Inventory Sync

Every scan, update, or adjustment instantly syncs to your connected Google Sheet. There is no double entry and no delayed reporting. You get accurate, real time inventory data that is accessible anywhere, on any device.

Barcode and NFC Scanning

Identify and update items instantly using 1D or 2D barcodes or NFC tags. Use your mobile device or camera to check in assets, adjust quantities, verify stock, or view item history on the spot. It also supports external barcode scanners.

Custom Fields for Any Workflow

Track the data that matters most to your operations. GearChain supports customizable fields for serial numbers, GPS location, timestamps, suppliers, item conditions, and more. Whether you are in retail, warehousing, healthcare, events, education, or manufacturing, you can tailor GearChain to your workflow.

Seamless Team Collaboration

Share your inventory workspace with team members, clients, or vendors in a few clicks. Role based permissions ensure every user sees only what they need. You stay in full control of changes, access, and data visibility.

AI Powered Insights and Forecasting

GearChain’s intelligent analytics help you understand usage patterns, forecast restock needs, detect anomalies, and prevent shortages before they happen. Instead of reacting to problems, you can plan with confidence.

Blockchain Transparency and Secure Data Logging

Every transaction can be logged on blockchain for traceability and compliance. This gives you an extra layer of transparency and data integrity while still managing everything inside Google Sheets™.

How GearChain Works

Step1. Connect GearChain to Google Sheets™:
Install the app and link it to your existing spreadsheet or start with a ready to use template.

Step 2. Scan and Track in Real Time:
Use your phone or desktop device to scan barcodes or NFC tags. All updates appear instantly in your connected Sheet.

Step 3. Collaborate With Your Team:
Assign roles, set permissions, and manage inventory together from anywhere.

Step 4. Analyze and Automate:
Use built in dashboards, AI analysis, and smart recommendations to optimize stock and reduce waste.

It is simple, fast, and requires no technical setup or training.

Who Uses GearChain

- Retailers managing products across stores and warehouses
- Event planners tracking equipment and supplies
- Healthcare facilities managing medical devices and assets
- Schools and universities tracking IT equipment and lab items
- Manufacturers monitoring materials and finished goods
- Service providers managing tools and field equipment

If you can list it, scan it, or count it, GearChain can manage it.

Core Value You Get

- Save hours of manual work every week
- Reduce stock discrepancies and errors
- Empower your team to update inventory from any device
- Eliminate the need for expensive, complex ERP systems
- Get enterprise level tracking with the simplicity of Google Sheets™

Simple, Scalable, and Secure

Whether you are running a small business or managing assets across multiple locations, GearChain grows with your needs. Start free, upgrade as you scale, and always stay in control of your inventory data within your Google Workspace™. GearChain is built for modern teams that need automation, transparency, and control without leaving Google Sheets™.

Ready to Transform Your Spreadsheet

Join thousands of businesses who have already turned Google Sheets™ into a real time, automated inventory management system.

Install GearChain Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ and experience effortless inventory control from barcode to balance sheet.

No coding. No complex setup. Just instant inventory clarity. Utilities

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Afi G Suite Backup
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Modern Google Workspace (G Suite) Backup with Europe, UK, USA, Australia, Canada datacenters, advanced admin roles, multi-geo compliance, scalable to 1,000,000s users
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Afi G Suite Backup Modern Google Workspace (G Suite) Backup with Europe, UK, USA, Australia, Canada datacenters, advanced admin roles, multi-geo compliance, scalable to 1,000,000s users NOTE: After you installed the app, you can sign in here (https://app.afi.ai/)

Afi Google Workspace™ (G Suite) Backup is the latest generation of data protection with fast & responsive UI and 2-3x faster backup/restore performance compared to legacy vendors. Afi was built from the ground-up to support Google Workspace™ apps with full fidelity. It is powered by modern cloud architecture based on micro-services and leverages AI technology to protect your data against ransomware, provide better resiliency and automate backup operations.

-   Backup all Google Workspace™ user data, including (Shared) Drives, Gmail™, Calendars, Contacts
-   [EXCLUSIVE FEATURE] AI anti-ransomware engine (detection, preemptive backups & recovery points labeling)
-   [EXCLUSIVE FEATURE] full-text search, instant online backup contents preview and flexible point-in-time data restore 
-   [EXCLUSIVE FEATURE] 100% fidelity Google Workspace™ backup - Afi preserves Google Drive™ document IDs, so the file URLs will remain the same after recovery and 3rd party apps integrated with Drive will continue to function
-   Leverage the most granular access control and permission management engine - Afi enables you to disable/limit access for Google Workspace™ super admins, or grant custom backup access permissions for non-admin users
-   Unlimited time-based retention, backup storage locations in EU, US, UK, Canada and Australia or external customer-owned cloud storage

⚫ NO BACKUP FAILURES
Afi intelligently handles Google API errors (4xx, 5xx) and uses a prediction engine to avoid the Google Workspace™ API calls limit. In case of any issues, Afi automatically reschedules & retries problematic backup runs. 

⚫ SIMPLE & FULLY AUTOMATED
Afi automatically manages backup schedules based on the protection levels (SLAs) assigned by admin for Google Workspace™ organizational units or user accounts. New users are automatically discovered & protected. Users deleted from Google Workspace™ are automatically archived and are always available for restore.

⚫ SECURITY & ACCESS CONTROL
Afi is the only cloud Google Workspace™ backup that enables to configure & restrict Google Workspace™ super admin access to user backed up data. Afi also provides a detailed audit log that retains session details (including WAN IP), backup & restore actions and all system events.

⚫ Q&A

➊ Why do you need to backup Google Workspace™?
Organizations use cloud Google Workspace™ backup to protect data from accidental data deletions, user errors and emerging threats such as cloud ransomware and hacker attacks. Based on IDC and Gartner surveys around 30% of businesses backup their cloud applications.

➋ Does Google Workspace™ provide any built-in recovery capabilities?
Google Workspace™ enables admins to partially recover data deleted within  20-25 days. Most organizations use a 3rd party backup solution because the the time frame is too short. Google Workspace™ also provides built-in versioning that protects your data against accidental overwrites and ransomware attacks, but some organizations find the capabilities insufficient.

➌ Do I need to backup user's Google Workspace™ data if my organization has Google Vault™?
Google Vault™ provides retention and e-discovery features and it can help to partially recover deleted G Suite data. However organizations often use a G Suite backup tool in addition to Google Vault™ to overcome its limitations (no data is retained for deleted G Suite users, no versioning and no recovery is available for Google Drive™ folder structures).

➍ Does Afi backs up Shared (Team) Drives?
Yes, we provide full-fidelity backup for Google Drive™ and Shared Drives, including the backup of complex folder structures, files metadata (author, creation/modification dates, etc) and Google document IDs.

➎ Can I backup user Gmail data without exposing the backup contents to IT team?
Yes, you can configure custom administrative roles that will enable your team to manage the backup and restore operations, without the ability to view the data. You can also disable admin access to Afi application for your Google Workspace™ super admins.

➏ What is the maximum backup frequency available in Afi?
You can configure 1-24x per day backup runs. In addition Afi AI engine will perform out of schedule preemptive backups of your G Suite data in case of any security threats (e.g. detected encryption activity or mass deletions of Google Drive™ files). 

➐ What are the main advantages of Afi compared to other G Suite backup solutions?
Afi provides 2-3x faster backup and restore performance compared to legacy solutions. Afi AI engine prevents backup errors and automatically manages the backup schedules in order to provide resilient service independent of admin supervision.

➑ Is Afi GDPR and HIPAA compliant?
Yes, we comply with GDPR and other major data protection regulations such as HIPAA, EU-U.S. Privacy Shield and CCPA. We will sign the DPA upon request. Business Tools

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Kanbanchi: Project and Task Management
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Task & Project management for Google Workspace™: Kanban, Gantt chart, Task board, Time tracking, Timeline, and Team dashboards in one app
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Kanbanchi: Project and Task Management Task & Project management for Google Workspace™: Kanban, Gantt chart, Task board, Time tracking, Timeline, and Team dashboards in one app Kanbanchi is a powerful Google project management tool that seamlessly integrates with Google Workspace™, including Google Drive™, Gmail™, Calendar™, Forms™, and more. Our Google task management solution features an intuitive Kanban board, Gantt Chart, Time Tracker, and more - designed specifically for Google users. The Google Kanban board visualizes workflows for your tasks and activities, letting teams collaborate in real-time and manage projects visually within the Google environment!

As the only project management tool natively integrated with Google Workspace™, Kanbanchi offers unmatched convenience. Sign up with your Google account and work with project boards stored directly in your Google Drive™, sharing them effortlessly with colleagues. Our Google task management tool provides flexible access permissions, Google Calendar™, Gmail™, and Forms integrations, and a familiar interface with no learning curve - simply deploy Kanbanchi to all your organization's users from the Google Admin Console™.

Security is paramount with our Google project management solution. Your files remain on YOUR Google Drive™ with authentication managed by Google - we never store your passwords. Boards are encrypted by default in Google Cloud™. Additionally, Kanbanchi's Google task management system is SOC2 Type II, ISO-27001, and CASA certified, GDPR and PCI DSS compliant, and follows HIPAA rules.

We ask for permission to access certain parts of your Google Drive™ because Kanbanchi doesn’t store data on its side. All your files and sensitive information will be stored on your Google Drive. However, the app should be able to operate this part of your Google Drive™.

Core functionality of our Google Workspace™ Kanban solution:

– Create and share unlimited project boards and cards in Google Workspace™
– Share internally and externally according to your company's Google policies
– Receive notifications about board updates
– Add events to Google Calendar™
– Attach files from Google Drive™ and Shared Drives
– Communicate with colleagues about tasks
– Organize cards with text and color tags
– Sort and filter cards as needed
– Create boards as files in Google Drive™ (Shared Drives for Enterprise users)
– Import Your Trello Boards or import data from CSV

Advanced functionality in our Google project management tool:

— Gantt Chart for Google Project Management
Convert your Kanbanchi board to a Gantt Chart with one click. See how all your cards relate in time and plan project schedules visually.

— Time Tracker for Google Task Management
Track time directly in Kanbanchi—choose a card, start the timer, and monitor your team's progress in the Timing tab, where all user timing data is recorded.

— Reports for Google Project Tracking
Monitor team progress to adjust the workflow quickly. Check user performance to manage resources effectively within your Google task management system.

— Task Prioritization in Google Workspace™
Simplify work by prioritizing each task and sorting accordingly. Automate this process for better control in your Google project management workflow.

— Corporate Branding for Google Workspace™ Projects
Customize Kanbanchi's look by adding your company's logo and background images.

— Export to Google Sheets™
Export all board data, including assignments, dates, checklists, and comments, directly to Google Spreadsheets.

— Card Creation from Gmail™
Create new cards by emailing your board's unique address or installing our Gmail add-on to send information to any accessible board.

— Backups for Google Project Security
Back up important Kanbanchi boards for easy recovery, ensuring your project data is always safe.

— List View for Google Task Organization
View all cards in a scrollable list, quickly navigate from top to bottom, and filter as needed.

— Subcards for Detailed Google Task Management
Organize complex tasks by breaking them into subcards that can be assigned and tracked separately.

— Templates for Google Project Efficiency
Speed up workflows with our template gallery or create custom board templates. Create card templates to streamline repetitive tasks.

— Shared Drives Integration
Attach files from Shared Drives to cards; enterprise users can create boards directly in their Shared Drives.

— Swimlanes for Project Organization
Easily manage multiple projects on a single board by using swimlanes. This feature lets you visually separate and track tasks from different projects in one place, giving you a clear overview of all your work within your Google Workspace™ Kanban board.

Latest release:

- Made a Chrome Extension to give you instant access to Kanbanchi from anywhere on the Web;
- Fixed appearance bugs;
- Smoothed user login experience;
- Tuned board settings.

Also, list view and board settings both got a new, fancy look!

*Gmail™ is a trademark of Google LLC 
*Google Workspace™ is a trademark of Google LLC
*Google Drive™ is a trademark of Google LLC
*Google Admin Console™ is a trademark of Google LL Productivity

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Folgo for Google Drive™
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: Audit, secure, organize and manage Google Drive™ at scale.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Folgo for Google Drive™ Audit, secure, organize and manage Google Drive™ at scale. Folgo is a powerful Google Drive™ management add-on designed for Google Workspace™ admins and users. It enables secure, large-scale actions such as permission management, user offboarding and data migration directly within Google Workspace™. Folgo empowers its users to manage Drive™ content at scale while maintaining full visibility and control.

Use Cases
-Drive Auditing: Generate detailed Sheets™ reports on folders and files metadata & permissions across your entire domain: individual accounts, Shared Drives™, or Google Groups™.
-Data Security: Instantly revoke public, external, or unwanted permissions at scale, protecting your organization's data.
-User Offboarding & Data Preservation: Identify and back up files shared with users from accounts scheduled for deletion or already suspended, ensuring data is preserved and accessible.
-Bulk Management Actions from Sheets™: Move, delete, copy, rename Drive™ content in bulk directly from Google Sheets™, simplifying large-scale Drive™ management for admins.
-Ownership Transfers & Requests: Transfer or request ownership of entire folders and their contents in one click.
-Shared Drive Migration: Move “My Drive” content to “Shared Drive™”, even bypassing permission issues cleanly.
-Folders copy: Duplicate entire folders including files and permissions, with a single action.
-Bulk Renaming: Rename files and folders in bulk to keep your Drive™ organized.
-AI Data Extraction: Extract structured data from PDFs and documents directly into spreadsheets using AI.

Pricing
-Try Folgo for free for 30 days! Get full access to all features, no charges, no credit card required. 
Discover all plans to match your organization's needs:
-Check our Pricing Page to view all plans: https://www.folgo.com/pricing
-Not sure which plan fits your needs? Read our guide to help you choose the best plan: https://help.folgo.com/article/323-which-plan-is-the-best-for-you

Need Help?
-Contact our team: support@folgo.app
-Or visit our Help Center for guides: https://help.folgo.com/

Why Choose Folgo?
-Built-in Integration: Execute actions directly within your Google Drive™ interface.
-Security First: All actions are performed directly on your Drive™ and never on an external server.
-Time-Saving: Perform domain-wide operations quickly and efficiently.
-Reliable & Scalable: Handle any folder or user size without limits, even in large enterprise environments.
-Intuitive & User-Friendly: Folgo’s clear interface makes Drive™ management straightforward, allowing users to take care of their own Drive™ tasks while reducing the admin’s workload.

🛡️ Is Folgo Safe?
-Folgo belongs to the latest generation of Google Drive™ add-ons, built with secure Apps Script technologies.
-Folgo never accesses or stores the contents of your files. Only essential information is securely stored necessary data on encrypted Google Cloud servers (Firebase).
-Folgo passed Google's rigorous security review, Folgo is approved for publishing and poses no risk to users.
-CASA Tier 3 validated with third-party Letter of Validation.
-Your data remains 100% safe with us. We never access, transfer, sell, or store the contents of your files.
-Managed by a committed, security-aware development team.
For full details, visit our pages: https://www.folgo.com/privacy-policy & https://www.folgo.com/security

⚠️Why Folgo Needs Access to Sheets™, Drive™, and Gmail™?
Folgo only requests the minimum permissions needed on Google Sheets™, Drive™, and Gmail™.
These permissions are used exclusively to perform Folgo operations and nothing else.
Google has reviewed and approved our use of these permissions.
Read our Privacy Policy to learn how we keep your data safe.

⭐ Support Folgo
-If you enjoy Folgo, please consider leaving a review on this page to help us continue improving! 
-You might also like our other apps, such as Mergo (https://www.mergo.app/) or Publigo (https://www.publigo.app/).

📖 About Folgo
Folgo was developed by Romain Vialard and Pierre Leroy at Scriptit. Romain is also the creator of Yet Another Mail Merge (YAMM), Awesome Table, and Form Publisher. He established Awesome Gapps to maintain these products but is no longer involved with the company. As a member of the Google Developer Expert (GDE) program, Romain has spent over a decade working on Google Apps Script and Google APIs.

Google Drive™ is a trademark of Google LLC. Creativity

Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.name: Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.description: YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™.
Org Efficiency & Hiring.docx.search_text:
Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™. YAMM is the most popular mail merge for Gmail™ and Google Sheets™. 

Send bulk personalized emails from your Gmail™ account to a contact list stored in Google Sheets™, and track if recipients open, click, respond, bounce or unsubscribe in real-time directly from your spreadsheet.

YAMM emails will land in the primary inbox more often than other solutions as emails are sent from your Gmail™ account.

With YAMM, you can use Gmail™ drafts to send your email campaign, making it easy to insert attachments, images, cc, bcc, signatures, as well as spell-check or use Gmail™ templates™.

With YAMM it’s very easy to segment your email blast from the comfort of Google Sheets™, and send follow-ups to the right recipients.
If you need to send over 1500 emails, YAMM will automatically split the mass emailing over a few days.
YAMM automates email communication with Gmail™.
More details on https://yamm.com

GETTING STARTED

After having installed the YAMM add-on: 
1. Write your draft in Gmail™ with variables such as {{First name}}.
2. List your contacts in a Google Sheet™ spreadsheet and the personalized data needed for your draft.
3. Launch YAMM from the “Extensions” menu, receive a test email to make sure everything works.
4. Click “Send emails” in YAMM to send all emails in one click!
5.Track the results in real-time from your spreadsheet.

If you want to write a good draft quickly, you can use ChatGPT. Open ChatGPT, ask it to write your email and copy/paste the contents into your Gmail™ draft. You can easily tell it to include mail merge markers in the draft.
Even more powerful though is using the GPT for Sheets add-on to bulk write 100% personalized emails directly in your spreadsheet, that you can then easily send with YAMM.


PRICING
See our plans here: https://yamm.com/pricing

USE CASES

Whether it be for personal or professional use, Yet Another Mail Merge has something for everyone to save time sending emails.
➤ Outbound sales: drive and generate new leads through targeted cold emails. YAMM is easier to use than complex sales automation like Woodpecker or marketing automation tools like Hubspot as it lets you create a simple CRM on top of Google Sheets™ and Gmail™.
➤ Link building: acquire more hyperlinks in less time thanks to YAMM’s personalized emails and links.
➤ Talent sourcing: source new and better candidates with personalized job descriptions.
➤ Education: communicate with your students or their parents all at once with personalized emails.
➤ Nonprofits, NGOs, and political organizations can create campaigns to find new voters, communicate with donors, and inform their members.
➤ Event invitations: for webinars, conferences, job-dating, meetups, weddings, fairs, etc.
➤ Google Forms™ email notifications: notify your form respondents after they’ve answered and send those submissions to the relevant people.
➤ Send a PR campaign to journalists, bloggers and influencers on platforms. 
➤ Send individual download links for a new internal app or corporate profile pictures to your employees.
➤ Send personalized Christmas wishes, holiday greetings, and Happy New Year’s emails.
➤ Send personalized thank you emails to friends, family, colleagues, recruiters, crowdfunding members, or upvoters.
➤ Send payment or rent reminders to a list of clients with their invoice attached.
➤ Send periodic newsletters on your latest products, features, or news.
➤ Distribute personalized invites to events and meetings.
➤ Announce a new feature to a select number of users that asked for it through support channels.
➤ Sales, marketing representatives, and recruiters can easily create targeted outbound campaigns by extracting their contact list from Salesforce.
➤ Account managers can manage their portfolio of clients, whether in an enterprise or Shopify store.

Our users come from all types and sizes of organizations, industries, and locations. 

MAIN BENEFITS AND FEATURES


Composing Features

➤ Create your message directly in Gmail™: you can use saved Gmail™ templates and Gmail™ Layouts.
➤ Personalize subject lines, email body, links, images to make your emails as convincing as possible.
➤ Send mail merge with attachments
➤ Send personalized attachments to each email (upload files to Google Drive™ and use YAMM to attach them to your email campaigns).
➤ Send individual PDF or GIF attachments with Gmail™
➤ Insert personalized links / images to each email (no need for HTML, just use the functions =HYPERLINK() and =IMAGE() in your sheet).
➤ Send a test email to review your email before sending it to all your recipients.
➤ Create beautiful email templates with Gmail™ Layouts
➤ Write your email in HTML and CSS directly inside your Gmail™ draft.
➤ Use media queries with HTML in your Gmail™ draft to send responsive emails that are mobile friendly.
➤ Import contacts data in one click (name, email, phone number…) from Google Contacts™.
➤ Add unsubscribe links and easily remain compliant with CAN-SPAM and other email delivery rules.
➤ Automatic  Communication
