Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.name: Neartail - Order form
Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.description: Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount.
Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.search_text:
Neartail - Order form Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount. You are a store owner who wants your customers to order online. You use Google Forms™ to take orders. But, it lacks key features to calculate order amount and accept payment. Use Neartail's Order form addon to enhance Google Forms™ with calculation and payment collection. Create order forms that are fully functional and easy-to-use for your customers. 

If you haven’t started on your form yet, you can use the prebuilt Neartail templates to create your order form. If you have already created your form in Google Forms™, then you can use the AI powered Neartail addon to automatically convert the questions in Google Forms™ into relevant products with prices and fields to collect customer details in your order form.

❇️ How Neartail leverages AI to convert your google form into order form?

When you customize the form using the Neartail addon, you can enable the Format prices option that:
➤ automatically identifies questions with prices and converts them into products to be sold by quantity, weight or with variants.
➤ converts simple question types into products that allows you to add product specific attributes such as description, tax, available stock & more.
➤ adds the formula to calculate the order amount based on the product prices in the form and displays an order summary in the bill format. 
➤ transforms responses into order line items to create aggregate reports for sales by product, customer & view sales trends by week or month.

❇️ Features: Calculate order amount in Google Forms™

➤ Dynamically calculate the total amount for the products ordered by the user and display it in your form in real time.
➤ Add coupon codes option in your order form to offer your customers a percentage discount, fixed amount discount or free shipping discount.
➤ Write formulas to enforce minimum order amount, offer free shipping for orders exceeding specified order amount threshold & more.
➤ Offering curbside pickup & delivery options? Add a delivery details section with the available options and the delivery fees for each option.

❇️ Features: Accept online payment in Google Forms™

➤ Collect payments before customers submit the form and fully automate your payment process.
➤ Accept fully automated payments such as credit or debit cards, Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Bancontact, iDeal, Paynow directly on Google Forms™.
➤ Accept peer to peer payment methods such as Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Paynow, Zelle, Lydia or UPI with zero transaction fees.
➤ Allow users to place orders without making payments by enabling offline payment methods such as cash on delivery, cheque, bank transfer.


❇️ Features: Customize order form for your needs

➤ Show a summary of the products ordered by the user so that they can review their order before they submit it for processing.
➤ Send order confirmation emails to your customers and get email notifications for new orders
➤ Choose the preferred layout: Compact (3 column card layout), comfortable (2 column list layout) or the default form layout
➤ Close your form to stop accepting orders and add a custom message to let your users know when they can order next.


❇️ Use case: Tailor-made for your business

Restaurants, Canteens, Meal prep: Whether you have a set menu or an a la carte menu or a daily menu, easily create your restaurant order form and start accepting online orders from your customers. Simply choose from our pre-designed restaurant templates to get started.

Bakery: Are you a bakery taking custom cake orders, selling a selection of cupcakes or doughnut boxes, or offering a wide range of products such as cookies, pastries, bagels etc? You can create an online order form that exactly meets your business needs.

Clubs, Apparel stores: Does your business sell apparel? You can now easily create a visually appealing and elegant apparel order form that works equally well for products without any variants, products with only color or size variants, and products with both color & size variants.

Grocery stores, Supermarkets, Farms: Sell daily essentials such as vegetables, fruits, grains, meat, baby care, personal care products and more by creating an online order form using our pre-designed grocery order form templates. Let your customers order products easily from the comforts of their home.

Once your customer submits the form, you can manage orders with Google Sheets™ or Google Forms™, you are comfortable with. Gain your customers' trust with a professional ordering experience, while still using G Suite™ / Google Workspace™.

❇️ Pricing:

Neartail's Order form addon is a paid product with a 7-day trial. You get the first 20 responses free during this trial period. If you would like to collect more than 20 responses or use Neartail after the trial ends, you can subscribe to the paid plan.

➤ $18 for 100 orders per month
➤ $28 for 200 orders per month
➤ $38 for 300 orders per month

You can either choose the monthly or annual subscription. For details, refer to the pricing page. For higher volumes, Business Tools

Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.name: Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail
Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.description: YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™.
Owner_ Founder Improvements.docx.search_text:
Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™. YAMM is the most popular mail merge for Gmail™ and Google Sheets™. 

Send bulk personalized emails from your Gmail™ account to a contact list stored in Google Sheets™, and track if recipients open, click, respond, bounce or unsubscribe in real-time directly from your spreadsheet.

YAMM emails will land in the primary inbox more often than other solutions as emails are sent from your Gmail™ account.

With YAMM, you can use Gmail™ drafts to send your email campaign, making it easy to insert attachments, images, cc, bcc, signatures, as well as spell-check or use Gmail™ templates™.

With YAMM it’s very easy to segment your email blast from the comfort of Google Sheets™, and send follow-ups to the right recipients.
If you need to send over 1500 emails, YAMM will automatically split the mass emailing over a few days.
YAMM automates email communication with Gmail™.
More details on https://yamm.com

GETTING STARTED

After having installed the YAMM add-on: 
1. Write your draft in Gmail™ with variables such as {{First name}}.
2. List your contacts in a Google Sheet™ spreadsheet and the personalized data needed for your draft.
3. Launch YAMM from the “Extensions” menu, receive a test email to make sure everything works.
4. Click “Send emails” in YAMM to send all emails in one click!
5.Track the results in real-time from your spreadsheet.

If you want to write a good draft quickly, you can use ChatGPT. Open ChatGPT, ask it to write your email and copy/paste the contents into your Gmail™ draft. You can easily tell it to include mail merge markers in the draft.
Even more powerful though is using the GPT for Sheets add-on to bulk write 100% personalized emails directly in your spreadsheet, that you can then easily send with YAMM.


PRICING
See our plans here: https://yamm.com/pricing

USE CASES

Whether it be for personal or professional use, Yet Another Mail Merge has something for everyone to save time sending emails.
➤ Outbound sales: drive and generate new leads through targeted cold emails. YAMM is easier to use than complex sales automation like Woodpecker or marketing automation tools like Hubspot as it lets you create a simple CRM on top of Google Sheets™ and Gmail™.
➤ Link building: acquire more hyperlinks in less time thanks to YAMM’s personalized emails and links.
➤ Talent sourcing: source new and better candidates with personalized job descriptions.
➤ Education: communicate with your students or their parents all at once with personalized emails.
➤ Nonprofits, NGOs, and political organizations can create campaigns to find new voters, communicate with donors, and inform their members.
➤ Event invitations: for webinars, conferences, job-dating, meetups, weddings, fairs, etc.
➤ Google Forms™ email notifications: notify your form respondents after they’ve answered and send those submissions to the relevant people.
➤ Send a PR campaign to journalists, bloggers and influencers on platforms. 
➤ Send individual download links for a new internal app or corporate profile pictures to your employees.
➤ Send personalized Christmas wishes, holiday greetings, and Happy New Year’s emails.
➤ Send personalized thank you emails to friends, family, colleagues, recruiters, crowdfunding members, or upvoters.
➤ Send payment or rent reminders to a list of clients with their invoice attached.
➤ Send periodic newsletters on your latest products, features, or news.
➤ Distribute personalized invites to events and meetings.
➤ Announce a new feature to a select number of users that asked for it through support channels.
➤ Sales, marketing representatives, and recruiters can easily create targeted outbound campaigns by extracting their contact list from Salesforce.
➤ Account managers can manage their portfolio of clients, whether in an enterprise or Shopify store.

Our users come from all types and sizes of organizations, industries, and locations. 

MAIN BENEFITS AND FEATURES


Composing Features

➤ Create your message directly in Gmail™: you can use saved Gmail™ templates and Gmail™ Layouts.
➤ Personalize subject lines, email body, links, images to make your emails as convincing as possible.
➤ Send mail merge with attachments
➤ Send personalized attachments to each email (upload files to Google Drive™ and use YAMM to attach them to your email campaigns).
➤ Send individual PDF or GIF attachments with Gmail™
➤ Insert personalized links / images to each email (no need for HTML, just use the functions =HYPERLINK() and =IMAGE() in your sheet).
➤ Send a test email to review your email before sending it to all your recipients.
➤ Create beautiful email templates with Gmail™ Layouts
➤ Write your email in HTML and CSS directly inside your Gmail™ draft.
➤ Use media queries with HTML in your Gmail™ draft to send responsive emails that are mobile friendly.
➤ Import contacts data in one click (name, email, phone number…) from Google Contacts™.
➤ Add unsubscribe links and easily remain compliant with CAN-SPAM and other email delivery rules.
➤ Automatic  Communication

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
GearChain: Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ GearChain turns your Google Sheets™ into a real-time inventory system so you can scan barcodes, track assets, sync updates, customize fields, and collaborate with your team inside Google Workspace. GearChain: Smart Inventory Management for Google Sheets™

Turn your everyday Google Sheets™ into a powerful, automated inventory management system. With GearChain, you can track items, scan barcodes, manage assets, and collaborate with your team directly inside the tools you already use. No new software to learn. No coding. Simply connect GearChain to Google Sheets™ and start managing inventory the smart way.

Why Choose GearChain

Most businesses already use Google Sheets™ for stock tracking because it is simple, accessible, and flexible. But as your inventory grows, manual updates, missing entries, and inconsistent data become unavoidable. GearChain upgrades your spreadsheet into a live inventory platform that connects your team, processes, and assets in real time. You keep the simplicity of Google Sheets™ but gain the automation, accuracy, and power of a modern inventory system.

Real Time Inventory Sync

Every scan, update, or adjustment instantly syncs to your connected Google Sheet. There is no double entry and no delayed reporting. You get accurate, real time inventory data that is accessible anywhere, on any device.

Barcode and NFC Scanning

Identify and update items instantly using 1D or 2D barcodes or NFC tags. Use your mobile device or camera to check in assets, adjust quantities, verify stock, or view item history on the spot. It also supports external barcode scanners.

Custom Fields for Any Workflow

Track the data that matters most to your operations. GearChain supports customizable fields for serial numbers, GPS location, timestamps, suppliers, item conditions, and more. Whether you are in retail, warehousing, healthcare, events, education, or manufacturing, you can tailor GearChain to your workflow.

Seamless Team Collaboration

Share your inventory workspace with team members, clients, or vendors in a few clicks. Role based permissions ensure every user sees only what they need. You stay in full control of changes, access, and data visibility.

AI Powered Insights and Forecasting

GearChain’s intelligent analytics help you understand usage patterns, forecast restock needs, detect anomalies, and prevent shortages before they happen. Instead of reacting to problems, you can plan with confidence.

Blockchain Transparency and Secure Data Logging

Every transaction can be logged on blockchain for traceability and compliance. This gives you an extra layer of transparency and data integrity while still managing everything inside Google Sheets™.

How GearChain Works

Step1. Connect GearChain to Google Sheets™:
Install the app and link it to your existing spreadsheet or start with a ready to use template.

Step 2. Scan and Track in Real Time:
Use your phone or desktop device to scan barcodes or NFC tags. All updates appear instantly in your connected Sheet.

Step 3. Collaborate With Your Team:
Assign roles, set permissions, and manage inventory together from anywhere.

Step 4. Analyze and Automate:
Use built in dashboards, AI analysis, and smart recommendations to optimize stock and reduce waste.

It is simple, fast, and requires no technical setup or training.

Who Uses GearChain

- Retailers managing products across stores and warehouses
- Event planners tracking equipment and supplies
- Healthcare facilities managing medical devices and assets
- Schools and universities tracking IT equipment and lab items
- Manufacturers monitoring materials and finished goods
- Service providers managing tools and field equipment

If you can list it, scan it, or count it, GearChain can manage it.

Core Value You Get

- Save hours of manual work every week
- Reduce stock discrepancies and errors
- Empower your team to update inventory from any device
- Eliminate the need for expensive, complex ERP systems
- Get enterprise level tracking with the simplicity of Google Sheets™

Simple, Scalable, and Secure

Whether you are running a small business or managing assets across multiple locations, GearChain grows with your needs. Start free, upgrade as you scale, and always stay in control of your inventory data within your Google Workspace™. GearChain is built for modern teams that need automation, transparency, and control without leaving Google Sheets™.

Ready to Transform Your Spreadsheet

Join thousands of businesses who have already turned Google Sheets™ into a real time, automated inventory management system.

Install GearChain Inventory Management for Google Sheets™ and experience effortless inventory control from barcode to balance sheet.

No coding. No complex setup. Just instant inventory clarity. Utilities

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Awesome Table
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Export data from Salesforce, Quickbooks, and many other sources to Google Sheets™. No technical skill required.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Awesome Table Export data from Salesforce, Quickbooks, and many other sources to Google Sheets™. No technical skill required. Awesome Table has two products:

➤ Connectors: schedule data exports from applications such as Salesforce, Quickbooks, Hubspot, Facebook Ads, Zendesk or databases like MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL or BigQuery (~40 different sources), into Google Sheets™ in a few clicks with the add-on for Google Sheets™

➤ Apps: Make your spreadsheet data accessible and searchable in a website or intranet as interactive catalogs, directories, FAQs, maps for Google Maps™, or Gantt charts with the app creation tool at app.awesome-table.com

Forget copy/paste and csv hell, focus on building reports and dashboards.

 
GETTING STARTED WITH CONNECTORS

After installing our add-on for Google Sheets™:
1) Connect to a data source you want to import data from
2) Choose the data you want to extract
3) Customize your spreadsheet columns and preview before importing
4) Run your request
In a matter of seconds, your data appears in your spreadsheet!

We integrate with roughly 40 sources. The full list is available here:
https://awesome-table.com/connectors/help/export-to-google-sheets

Instantly connect, integrate & sync with, export & pull reports from:

✅ Accounting, Tax, Finance Ops

🔹QuickBooks - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export any report (including Balance Sheet, Profit and Loss, Statement of Cash Flows, and other segmented, detailed or summary reports) or raw data (including Accounts, Bills, Customers, Employees, Invoices, Items, Payments, and Vendors).

✅ CRM, Customer Support, Customer Service, Customer Success, RevOps

🔹HubSpot - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export your Contacts, Companies, Deals, Products, Properties, Quotes, and Tickets.
🔹Salesforce - Connect to Google Sheets™ and export your Reports, build sales funnels, and understand your sales performance.
🔹Zendesk - Export and monitor Support Tickets, and Comments on Posts and Articles.

✅ Developer and Design tools, DevOps, REST API

🔹Any REST API - Connect to your favorite API using an API key or your username and password, and use a table to configure your query instead of editing long URL paths. Query like a pro using JMESPath and your pagination method of choice. 
🔹Figma - Keep track of comments, components, and frames by file and monitor your team components, projects, and styles.
🔹GitHub - Integrate with Google Sheets™ to sync your own or public repository issues, comments, commits and pull requests.
🔹Jira - Integrate with Google Sheets™ and export issues, comments, projects, and user details. Search through issues using Jira Query Language (JQL). Analyze your team’s performance and productivity.
🔹Unsplash - Easily log in with Unsplash and use Awesome Table’s intuitive API interface to get stats on photos, users, and collections.
🔹Vercel - Use OAuth 2 to connect to Vercel and query any endpoint.

✅ Productivity, project management

🔹Google Maps™ Geocode - Convert addresses into geographic coordinates and vice versa.

✅ Google Workspace™

🔹Google Contacts™ - Export and keep track of your contacts, groups, and directories.
🔹Google Drive™ - Search using advanced filters and export lists of files and folders to keep track of file changes, ownership, and permissions.
🔹Google Photos™ - Export details of all your photos and albums.
🔹Google Sheets™ - No more IMPORTRANGE, keep spreadsheets synced between themselves and your stakeholders up to date with what’s relevant to them.
🔹Google Tasks™ - Get a birds-eye view of all your todos and analyze your productivity.

✅ Marketing, agencies, Marketing Ops, performance marketing

🔹Facebook Ads - Export data related to your advertising campaigns, ad sets, and individual ads.
🔹Google Analytics 4™ - Run analytics, including pageviews, sessions, and users. Additionally, segment the data by device type, country, and page.
🔹Google Analytics 3™ - Run analytics, including pageviews, sessions, and users. Additionally, segment the data by device type, country, and page.
🔹Google Search Console™ - Run analytics, including clicks, impressions, CTR, and position by device, country, page, search query, or type. Keep track of changes to your site maps.
🔹Google Trends™ - Explore and analyze the popularity of search terms on Google Search over time and across different geographic regions.
🔹Youtube - Put Youtube’s API to work and monitor comments for individual videos or across your channel or other channels, export and analyze lists of videos, subscriptions, and more.
🔹YouTube Analytics - Run analytics and access videos and playlist reports from your channels.

✅Databases


🔹Google BigQuery - Input an SQL query and get the data directly in your spreadsheet
🔹MySQL - Export data from tables, databases, and query results in various formats, including SQL, CSV (Comma-Separated Values), and XML.
🔹PostgreSQL - Export data from tables, databases, and query results in various formats, including SQL, CSV (Comma-Separated Values), and other text-based formats.
🔹SQL server - Export data from tables, databases, views, and query results in various formats, inc Productivity

Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Easily personalize emails, letters, envelopes & certificates. Auto send emails on a Google Form ™ submit.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Mail Merge Easily personalize emails, letters, envelopes & certificates. Auto send emails on a Google Form ™ submit. ✔️ The best mail merge add-on for Gmail ™, Google Docs™, Sheets™, Forms™ and Slides™. ✔️ No sign-up required. ✔️ Free and fast customer service. ✔️ Free from advertising or watermarks. ✔️ Mail Merge into emails, envelopes, letters and certificates. ✔️ Mail Merge images including profile pictures, QR codes and barcodes. 
👇 Read more about our features, help, tutorials and pricing.


🎯 HOW IS THIS ADDON USEFUL?

No need to download anything. Everything is online, powered by Google Workspace ™. Whether it’s for personal, education or other professional use, this is a simple and powerful tool for sending mass personalized emails with Gmail ™. Easily insert place holders (or Merge Fields) in your document, slide or email body. Common use cases include:


➤ Mail Merge certificates from Google Slides ™ templates. Email classroom their certificate of achievement. Ideal for public/private schools and online educational institutions.
➤ Automatically send a personalized email when a Google Forms ™ is submitted online. Test the Google Forms ™ email notification using the Google Forms ™ link.
➤ Inviting people to an event such as a webinar, wedding, job-dating, fair, conference or meetup (using apps such as Zoom, CISCO Webex, Microsoft Teams, etc.)
➤ Generate certificates or application forms. Each document/form can have its own image (such a profile picture).
➤ Get answers from a large list of guests and invitees. 
➤ Get potential new clients with a custom email campaign.
➤ Drive and generate new leads with efficient cold emailing.
➤ Send commercial offers suited to each recipient.
➤ Apply to many job offers at once.
➤ Manage PR campaigns by contacting journalists or influencers.
➤ Send payment reminders to a list of clients with their invoice attached.
➤ Share information on each student with their parents the easiest way.
➤ Greetings for birthday, happy new year, new year's eve wishes, holidays, thanksgiving, halloween, secret santa, christmas, xmas holiday to your friends, family or colleagues.
➤ Renew your audience commitment to your blog with an email that presents the latest blog posts
➤ A newsletter solution to send periodic newsletters on your latest products, features, promotion, discount, coupon, news, reports, metrics or polls. 
➤ Address personalized thank you emails to HR recruiters, crowdfunding supports, product hunt upvoters, business angels, a friend or family.
➤ Run efficient cold emailing or follow-up campaign to drive and generate new leads for sales people. 
➤ Generate and print envelopes. Make each envelope unique to each recipient.
➤ Send Personalized Emails with Mail Merge in Gmail ™ to your classroom, school, office, team, NGO or State and Federal Government departments.
➤ With Email Notifications for Google Forms ™, you can automatically send email messages every time a respondent submits your Google Forms ™. You can notify the form respondent and/or your team members. These form confirmation emails will add peace of mind to your workflow.
➤ Use a standard HTML Editor to help you write the email body or insert HTML code from another marketing editor tool. This will help you create professional and elegant email templates.
➤ Track which emails have been read and which links have been clicked.
 
🆘 NEED HELP AND SUPPORT?

Don’t worry. We don’t use robots with artificial intelligence. We have real intelligent people answering your questions with an average response time of less than 3 hours. However, we usually reply much faster than that. Whether you are using the free or premium version, we do not charge for customer support. Help comes in the form of email communication, or as an alternative, we also provide a remote desktop session.

We are therefore geared up to handle high profile clients from NGOs, health institutions and Government departments worldwide.

We offer a 30 day MONEY BACK GUARANTEE. We pride ourselves on having the best customer care.

You can also help yourself by searching our FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions):
https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/help
 
If you don’t find the answer feel free to contact us here:
https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/contact-us

WHAT DOES ‘MAIL MERGE’ MEAN?
Mail Merge is a powerful tool for writing a personalized E-mail to many people at the same time. It uses the data from GSheet and then uses that to replace placeholders/merge fields throughout the message with the relevant information for each individual that is being messaged.


📼 INTRODUCTORY VIDEO

If you feel that the add-on is not intuitive and easy enough you can quickly watch this step-by-step tutorial on YouTube ™ https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/home#h.4pdgrekmgbwm
 

𝍁 PREPARE A GOOGLE SHEETS ™ FILE FOR MAIL MERGE
➤ Make sure the first row in your sheet contains column names. Such as ‘Fullname’, ‘Address’, ‘Email’, etc.
➤ These column names will be used as *|Merge Fields|* when you design your email or letter template.
➤ To be able to merge you need to have at least one row of data un Creativity

Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Team Time Tracker 📆 Keep projects profitable with automatic project time tracking and budgets for Google Calendar™. 📊 Categorize, label, and calculate time directly from Google Calendar events. Boost project profitability and gain full transparency into your time costs with TimeNavi. TimeNavi reads your calendar and finds events with project codes or colors to categorize automatically. Effortlessly track billable hours and manage project costs by categorizing and calculating time from Calendar events. Here are the key benefits:


➤ Increased Profitability 🤑 : Rank your projects by value - see which clients are your most and least profitable. Boost your project's profitability by accurately tracking time and setting budgets.

➤ Budgeting and Planning 📊 : Set accurate budgets based on detailed historical time tracking data. Reduce costs by staying within budget - keep watch on which clients and projects take up the most time.

➤ Resource Management 🔍 : Transparency on internal hours burned. Decide whether clients are a large enough profit margin.

➤ Accurate Billing 🎉: Ensure precise billing for future projects with detailed time tracking data - understand how long the project took last time to create the correct proposal for the next project.

➤ Significant Cost Savings 💸: Save tens of thousands of dollars by eliminating guesswork in project budgets and timelines.

➤ Business Transparency 👀 : Gain full transparency into your real-time project timelines and budgets.



With TimeNavi, you can eliminate the need for manual timesheets and streamline your workflow by automatically categorizing time directly from your calendar events. Keep your projects on track, profitable, and transparent with the power of TimeNavi’s AI-driven time tracking.

Here’s what some of our customers say: 

➤ Less work tracking time: “[TimeNavi] is so much less work. You don’t have to remember to do your start and stop time, it just brings it in on a system that we’re already using [Google Calendar].” 

➤ Full time transparency: “We were kind of making our best guess in a lot of instances of what things should cost or how much time we think something is going to take but it benefited us to actually be able to look at numbers and say like, “Oh! We spent way more time on this, we need to charge more, or whatever the case might be.”

➤ Increased profitability: “TimeNavi is proving to be really valuable for our business, and a total game changer for anyone that is using Google Calendar to track time for billing or productivity. As a business that needs to track multiple projects, with differing chargeable rates this App has absolutely nailed it! Great work” 

➤ C-Suite Management: “TimeNavi has been an amazing tool for me.  In fact, so good that I have hooked up my entire executive and management time with it.  The time insights we get from TimeNavi have helped us focus on what matters most and have allowed us all to become more effective and productive with our time.  I highly recommend this tool!”


Getting Started
---

1. Open TimeNavi in the sidebar of your Google Calendar™.
2. Complete the onboarding process and create your first project to track employee time.
3. Set a project budget and manage your team to monitor progress and stay within budget.
4. Gain valuable insights into time allocation, identify potential budget overruns, and enhance your business profitability.


Use Cases
---

Whether for personal or professional use, TimeNavi has something for everyone to save time calculating time.

➤ Digital Marketing and Creative Agencies: Track time across multiple calendars for a single project—TimeNavi automates hours of manual tracking in seconds. Add an hourly rate to ensure your project is profitable and see if you’re breaking even.

➤ Sales teams: Track the performance time of your sales team. Teams track the number of new sales meetings, the time spent on account management and other performance metrics. Export your own or their Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Managers: Track time and measure the performance of your team by choosing a metric and calculating how much time they have spent on those key metrics. Export that data from your Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or export your Google Calendar™ to Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Tutoring companies: Calculate the time and the pay of tutors by calculating the number of hours and adding a $/hour to the project. You can see the number of hours worked and the money they've made.

➤ Lawyers: Calculate your time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting time and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to calculate your bills.

➤ Freelancers: Track time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting hours and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to see if you broke even on your project.

➤ Construction businesses: Contracting employees and need to calculate their time? TimeNavi calculates your events in Google Calendar™ events quickly and easily. It is a low-tech, simple solution for businesses that want to Project Management

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Timer + AI Proctor Limiter for Forms | Quilgo
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Timer + AI Proctor Limiter for Forms | Quilgo Elevate your Google Forms™ into powerful, secure assessments for education, hiring, and business. Effortlessly reduce cheating with automated camera and screen proctoring. Overview

• Transform Google Forms™ into a proctored testing powerhouse with Quilgo— the trusted choice of over 30 million+ online assessments.
• Free to try, easy to set up, Quilgo’s innovative countdown timer and AI-driven proctoring ensure a secure, reliable testing experience.
• Bring ultimate integrity to your exams with Quilgo today!

⏱️ Test management and setup

→ Timer. Enable time limit in your tests. Perfect for online assessments and exams
→ Exam Mode. Schedule a date and time for your test and turn it into an online assessment.
→ Deadlines. Set a start time and time frames for your assignment.
→ Access Control. Restrict your quiz to specific people or enable registration.
→ Auto Close. Automatically turn the quiz off and stop once the time is over.
Easy Delivery. Send personal test links via email or post a group link.

🧑‍💻 Cheating Prevention

→ Camera Tracking. Reduce cheating by capturing the faces of test-takers
Screen Recording. Track the screen activity for increased cheating protection.
→ Enforce Tracking. Require all selected tracking methods to start a session.
→ Behaviour Analysis. Track suspicious actions like tab switch or multiple faces.
→ Trust Score. Get a single trust score based on click, screen and camera tracking.

📊 Analytics & Data-Driven Insights

→ Team Collaboration. Collaborate on forms and share results and reports.
→ Analytics & Reports. See the score, marked confidence levels and responses. Export in PDF.
→ Excel Export. Export reports in Excel or Spreadsheets for further analytics.
→ Single Dashboard. Use a secure real-time dashboard to manage your online tests.
→ Notifications. Receive real-time updates in your dashboard.

🔒 Security & Compliance

→ Secure Tests. Ensure your respondents cannot use the same test twice.
→ Secure. Keep the data secure and in compliance with GDPR.
→ Compliance. Screen and camera tracking mechanisms require explicit approval from test-takers.

✨ Brand Customization & Ease of Use

→ Simple. Quilgo works like native Google Forms™ on any device and browser.
→ Branding. Add your custom logo and customize colors to your test.
→ No additional software. Quilgo is software as a service and does not require any additional software installation.
→ User-friendly. Quilgo provides all needed instructions and tutorial videos to respondents.
→ Support. Speak with our team if you have any questions.

⚙️ HOW TO SETUP

Watch this video: https://youtu.be/6TBXa2y4k5k

1. Install this add-on
2. Go to your Google Forms™ form, click the "puzzle" icon and choose "Quilgo". Click "Configure".
3. Click "Enable Quilgo", then "Go to your Dashboard".

Free trial. No card is required.

🧑‍🏫 WHO USES QUILGO?

Quilgo supports secure proctoring for organizations of all sizes—from small businesses to leading institutions. It’s trusted by educators, corporate teams, training providers, recruiters, government agencies, and certification bodies to assess students, employees, candidates, and external participants.

Key Use Cases:

• Educational Institutions: Secure testing for schools and top universities like Harvard, MIT, and Oxford.
• Businesses and Recruiters: Candidate assessments and employee training in companies like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon.

From private practices to large enterprises, Quilgo scales to meet diverse assessment needs.

💎 COMPARE QUILGO TO OTHERS

Watch this video to compare to Boloforms, Extended Forms, Autoproctor, Form Limiter, Presenter, AddonForge and other similar extensions:

https://youtu.be/GmmTHMpSJAg?feature=shared

Here’s what makes Quilgo the ultimate choice:

• Unlimited Team Size: Perfect for organizations of any scale.
• Comprehensive Quiz Bank: Organize and store all your assessments in one place.
• Automatic Submission: Never miss a submission deadline.
• Detailed Reporting: Access both individual and group reports with ease.
• AI-Enhanced Quiz Creation: Generate questions with GPT for faster test prep.
• AI Proctoring Across Devices: Available on Android, with iOS support coming soon.
• Flexible Access Modes: Public and restricted options to match your needs.
• Unlimited Monthly Testing: No cap on proctored assessments.
• Built for Scale: Seamlessly host exams for thousands, from 1,000 up to 10,000+ users.
• Compliance & Security: GDPR-compliant, with data stored securely in Google for Google Forms users.

📎 USEFUL LINKS

Installation Guide - https://quilgo.com/google-forms-integration
Privacy Policy: https://quilgo.com/privacy
Compliance and DPA: https://quilgo.com/dpa

Our team would love to see you on board!

All Yours,
Quilgo Team

Google Forms™, Google Classroom™, Android™, and YouTube™ are trademarks of Google LLC.

Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
GPT for Sheets™ and Docs™ GPT for Sheets™ is the AI agent for bulk tasks in Google Sheets. Up to 400 prompts per minute, 200k rows at once, choose your LLM from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Mistral, Grok. GPT for Sheets™ is the leading bulk AI processing agent for Google Sheets, which enables you to:
    🚀 Run up to 400 prompts per minute
    ✅ Execute up to 200k rows in one run reliably
    🔄 Choose from the world’s best AIs: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini™, Perplexity, Grok and more
ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant.
    Brought to you by Talarian: makers of YAMM, Form Publisher, and Awesome Table, some of the most popular add-ons in the Google Workspace Marketplace.

    CAPABILITIES GPT for SHEETS™ EXCELS AT:
    ➤ Bulk content generation and review
    ➤ Bulk translation into multiple languages
    ➤ Bulk web research
    ➤ Bulk data preparation and segmentation
    ➤ Bulk data analysis
    ➤ Data summarization
    ➤ Generate, fix, and explain formulas
    
    FEATURES EXCLUSIVE TO GPT for SHEETS™:
    ➤ Agent — talk to your sheet the way you would talk to a person
    ➤ Bulk processing — run prompts across thousands of rows for maximum speed and reliability
    ➤ Image inputs — analyze and describe images directly in Sheets™
    ➤ Web searching — pull fresh data directly into your spreadsheet
    ➤ Prompt history — review, reuse, and refine past prompts for speed and consistency
    ➤ AI choice — choose between GPT, Claude, Gemini™, Perplexity, Grok, and more based on quality, speed, and cost
    ➤ Custom API keys supported — not required, but you can bring your own API key for more control, enhanced privacy and access to more models.

    POPULAR BUSINESS APPLICATIONS:

E-commerce:
     ➤ SEO
- Generate SEO-optimized product pages
- Optimize titles and meta descriptions
    ➤ Merchandising
- Create compelling titles & descriptions
- Automate listings categorization
- Enhance attribute consistency across listings
- Extract product attributes
    ➤ Localization
	-Translate to multiple languages with instructions and glossaries
Digital Agencies:
    ➤ Lead Generation
- Extract information from company websites
- Extract company names from data
     ➤ Content/Copywriting
- Summarize company descriptions
- Draft outreach messages
     ➤ Paid Ads
- Generate ads aligned with platform guidelines in seconds
    ➤ Social Media
- Create social media posts in bulk

Consulting Firms and Data analyst teams:
    ➤ Market Research
- Generate market overviews
- Retrieve targeted market data
     ➤ Company Research & Data Enrichment
- Generate company profiles
- Retrieve targeted company data
- Classify companies by industry or business model
     ➤ Competitive & Offering Analysis
- Summarize product/service offerings
- Retrieve revenue breakdowns and performance by offering
- Categorize offerings using standard codes

    FLEXIBLE USER INTERFACE:
    Whether you need simplicity, scale, or precision, GPT for Sheets adapts to your workflow.

    🧑‍🚀 Agent
Best for multi-step spreadsheet tasks. Simple prompts to manage your sheet from start to finish
    ➤ Populate your sheet from one prompt
    ➤ Talk in plain language, in any language
    ➤ The Agent understands your sheet so you don’t have to spell everything out

    ⚡ Bulk tools
Best for large, repeatable tasks where you need control over a single process
    ➤ Easy configuration, no need to know how to use formulas
    ➤ Results are inserted directly in cells, no need to replace formulas
    ➤ Easily stop a bulk process
    ➤ Reuse thanks to bulk tool history
    ➤ Reliable at very high volume
    ➤ Per-run custom instructions

    🧩 Functions
Best for precise, cell-level control for when accuracy and grid reactivity matter most
    ➤ Prompt from inside cells with GPT functions.
    ➤ Reference cells and ranges in your prompts.
    ➤ Run a prompt in bulk by simply dragging a formula over rows or columns.
    
    List of functions:
    GPT to prompt ChatGPT from cells
    GPT_TRANSLATE to translate your cells content
    GPT_CLASSIFY to classify your cells content
    GPT_EXTRACT to extract from your cells
    GPT_SUMMARIZE to summarize your cells
    GPT_FORMAT to sanitize or reformat your cells content
    GPT_EDIT to edit your spreadsheet content
    GPT_TAG to apply tags to your cells
    GPT_MATCH to match values from two columns
    GPT_SPLIT to split text semantically, such as by section, paragraph, sentence, customer…
    GPT_LIST to get multiple results in a column (one item per cell)
    GPT_WEB to fetch answers from Perplexity

    PRIVACY AND SECURITY:
    ➤ Talarian is ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant.

    ➤ If you use your own API key, we do not store any of your prompts or responses. Your API usage is bound by your terms of service with the AI provider.

    LEARN MORE:

    📖 Documentation: https://gptforwork.com/help
    🆘 Support: https://gptforwork.com/support
    🎥 Video tutorials: https://www.youtube.com/@gptforwork
    🔒Privacy and security: https://gptforwork.com/help/security-privacy-faq
        
    GPT for Sheets is also available for Microsoft Excel.

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Coefficient: Salesforce, HubSpot Data Connector
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: GPT powered 2-way connector to your CRM, Accounting tools, ERP, BI tool, database, or any other API to Google Sheets™. Sync and analyze data faster than ever with AI. No coding required!
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Coefficient: Salesforce, HubSpot Data Connector GPT powered 2-way connector to your CRM, Accounting tools, ERP, BI tool, database, or any other API to Google Sheets™. Sync and analyze data faster than ever with AI. No coding required! Coefficient is a no-code productivity solution that connects your spreadsheets to your company systems to accelerate your work. Use our 2-way spreadsheet sync when you need to pull data from or write back data to critical systems like your CRM and database. 

Couple live data connectivity with your very own AI Sheets Assistant—an always-on copilot inside your spreadsheet that helps you write formulas, create charts, and answer questions using your data—and you’ll be empowered to build the reports and dashboards you need in the fastest and most flexible way.

Easily sync Google Sheets™ to business systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Looker™, Tableau, Airtable, Notion, any JSON API, SQL databases, and data warehouses. Then, use AI to speed up your analysis. Ask Sheets Assistant to explain what’s in your data, recommend visuals, or guide your next move—all directly from your spreadsheet.

Using Coefficient you can automatically import all of your data into one place in Google Sheets™, and easily summarize it, filter it, create pivot tables or cloud pivot tables, chart it, and integrate it with other data. You can build custom dashboards and reports, alters, query, join, sync, and manipulate your data.  No more manual cutting and pasting CSV files, importrange or other difficult ways like Apps Script to combine data and spreadsheets. Coefficient offers the easiest path to data extraction. You can import from Excel files as well.

Plus, with Sheets Assistant, you can skip the setup altogether—just ask for what you need in plain language and get a working report, chart, or insight instantly.

Anyone pulling data into a spreadsheet can find value in Coefficient. The most impactful professionals leveraging Coefficient include Sales Leaders, RevOps, Sales Operations, and Marketing Operations professionals, Performance Marketers, FP&A and Financial Operations teams, and Data teams.

-------------------------------------------

► 1-Click Connections
Connect to your systems in one click and pull your data instantly into Google Sheets™.

• Sync with systems like Salesforce, Hubspot, Wordpress, Google Analytics™ (UA and GA4), Chargebee, Stripe, Zendesk, Outreach and more. See the list of categories below.
• Pull from CSV and Excel files and other Google Sheets™

► Customizable Imports
Work with only the data you need. Filter, sort, segment & limit any data set. Built for G Suite

• Leverage existing reports or build a custom report using data from any system
• Use Coefficient filters to work with only the data you need

► Auto-Refreshes
Never build the same analysis twice. Automatically refresh your data connector on any schedule. Google Sheets™ automation at its finest.

• Live refreshes at the click of a button
• Schedule data to update hourly, daily or weekly
• Share any report and let team members refresh data across your organization

► Data Snapshots
Snapshots allow you to capture the exact moment in time you need for deeper insights. Select your snapshot mode, either tab-level or range level, select the amount of snapshots you need, and choose your snapshot frequency.

• Track changes in your sales pipeline
• Monitor marketing trends
• Analyze financial data month-over-month
• Maintain a history of deal statuses for analysis

► 2-way Sync
Push Back Data to Your CRM or Database without ever leaving your spreadsheet

• Currently supported for CRMs, including Pipedrive, and Databases like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redshift, Snowflake and more

► Alerting
Track the signals you care about. Trigger Slack & email notifications to your team on any changes in your spreadsheet or any connector

• Choose any cell or range of cells to trigger a notification when data changes
• Trigger a notification when new data is added, such as a new signup
• Send a daily or weekly digest of the changes you care about

► Pre-Built Report Dashboards
Instant insights out of the box. Leverage pre-built Google Sheets™ report dashboards to effortlessly monitor and analyze your data.

• Customizable to your data and needs, and drill down to company, team, individual, region, and more
• Sales and revenue dashboards for your CRM
• Financial and accounting dashboards for systems like Quickbooks, Netsuite, Xero and Stripe
• Paid marketing dashboards for ads performance on the networks of Google, Facebook, Microsoft Bing, Linkedin and more
• Organic marketing reports for insights on engagement and pages on Instagram, Twitter, Youtube and more

► Sheets Assistant, your AI auto analyst
Sheets Assistant combines the power of GPT-4 with live spreadsheet data to handle your requests instantly.

• Ask questions about your data
• Get formulas, charts, and pivot tables generated for you
• Use spreadsheet context to get smarter answers
• Make faster decisions without writing a single formula

► Cloud Pivot Tables
Pivot on data in your cloud systems. Visualize real-time data in a pivot table directly from your systems. Refresh it on any schedule.

• Aggregate and visua Business Tools

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Yet Another Mail Merge: Mail Merge for Gmail YAMM: Send mass personalized emails with your Gmail™. Track each email in real-time from Sheets™. YAMM is the most popular mail merge for Gmail™ and Google Sheets™. 

Send bulk personalized emails from your Gmail™ account to a contact list stored in Google Sheets™, and track if recipients open, click, respond, bounce or unsubscribe in real-time directly from your spreadsheet.

YAMM emails will land in the primary inbox more often than other solutions as emails are sent from your Gmail™ account.

With YAMM, you can use Gmail™ drafts to send your email campaign, making it easy to insert attachments, images, cc, bcc, signatures, as well as spell-check or use Gmail™ templates™.

With YAMM it’s very easy to segment your email blast from the comfort of Google Sheets™, and send follow-ups to the right recipients.
If you need to send over 1500 emails, YAMM will automatically split the mass emailing over a few days.
YAMM automates email communication with Gmail™.
More details on https://yamm.com

GETTING STARTED

After having installed the YAMM add-on: 
1. Write your draft in Gmail™ with variables such as {{First name}}.
2. List your contacts in a Google Sheet™ spreadsheet and the personalized data needed for your draft.
3. Launch YAMM from the “Extensions” menu, receive a test email to make sure everything works.
4. Click “Send emails” in YAMM to send all emails in one click!
5.Track the results in real-time from your spreadsheet.

If you want to write a good draft quickly, you can use ChatGPT. Open ChatGPT, ask it to write your email and copy/paste the contents into your Gmail™ draft. You can easily tell it to include mail merge markers in the draft.
Even more powerful though is using the GPT for Sheets add-on to bulk write 100% personalized emails directly in your spreadsheet, that you can then easily send with YAMM.


PRICING
See our plans here: https://yamm.com/pricing

USE CASES

Whether it be for personal or professional use, Yet Another Mail Merge has something for everyone to save time sending emails.
➤ Outbound sales: drive and generate new leads through targeted cold emails. YAMM is easier to use than complex sales automation like Woodpecker or marketing automation tools like Hubspot as it lets you create a simple CRM on top of Google Sheets™ and Gmail™.
➤ Link building: acquire more hyperlinks in less time thanks to YAMM’s personalized emails and links.
➤ Talent sourcing: source new and better candidates with personalized job descriptions.
➤ Education: communicate with your students or their parents all at once with personalized emails.
➤ Nonprofits, NGOs, and political organizations can create campaigns to find new voters, communicate with donors, and inform their members.
➤ Event invitations: for webinars, conferences, job-dating, meetups, weddings, fairs, etc.
➤ Google Forms™ email notifications: notify your form respondents after they’ve answered and send those submissions to the relevant people.
➤ Send a PR campaign to journalists, bloggers and influencers on platforms. 
➤ Send individual download links for a new internal app or corporate profile pictures to your employees.
➤ Send personalized Christmas wishes, holiday greetings, and Happy New Year’s emails.
➤ Send personalized thank you emails to friends, family, colleagues, recruiters, crowdfunding members, or upvoters.
➤ Send payment or rent reminders to a list of clients with their invoice attached.
➤ Send periodic newsletters on your latest products, features, or news.
➤ Distribute personalized invites to events and meetings.
➤ Announce a new feature to a select number of users that asked for it through support channels.
➤ Sales, marketing representatives, and recruiters can easily create targeted outbound campaigns by extracting their contact list from Salesforce.
➤ Account managers can manage their portfolio of clients, whether in an enterprise or Shopify store.

Our users come from all types and sizes of organizations, industries, and locations. 

MAIN BENEFITS AND FEATURES


Composing Features

➤ Create your message directly in Gmail™: you can use saved Gmail™ templates and Gmail™ Layouts.
➤ Personalize subject lines, email body, links, images to make your emails as convincing as possible.
➤ Send mail merge with attachments
➤ Send personalized attachments to each email (upload files to Google Drive™ and use YAMM to attach them to your email campaigns).
➤ Send individual PDF or GIF attachments with Gmail™
➤ Insert personalized links / images to each email (no need for HTML, just use the functions =HYPERLINK() and =IMAGE() in your sheet).
➤ Send a test email to review your email before sending it to all your recipients.
➤ Create beautiful email templates with Gmail™ Layouts
➤ Write your email in HTML and CSS directly inside your Gmail™ draft.
➤ Use media queries with HTML in your Gmail™ draft to send responsive emails that are mobile friendly.
➤ Import contacts data in one click (name, email, phone number…) from Google Contacts™.
➤ Add unsubscribe links and easily remain compliant with CAN-SPAM and other email delivery rules.
➤ Automatic  Communication

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Folgo for Google Drive™
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Audit, secure, organize and manage Google Drive™ at scale.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Folgo for Google Drive™ Audit, secure, organize and manage Google Drive™ at scale. Folgo is a powerful Google Drive™ management add-on designed for Google Workspace™ admins and users. It enables secure, large-scale actions such as permission management, user offboarding and data migration directly within Google Workspace™. Folgo empowers its users to manage Drive™ content at scale while maintaining full visibility and control.

Use Cases
-Drive Auditing: Generate detailed Sheets™ reports on folders and files metadata & permissions across your entire domain: individual accounts, Shared Drives™, or Google Groups™.
-Data Security: Instantly revoke public, external, or unwanted permissions at scale, protecting your organization's data.
-User Offboarding & Data Preservation: Identify and back up files shared with users from accounts scheduled for deletion or already suspended, ensuring data is preserved and accessible.
-Bulk Management Actions from Sheets™: Move, delete, copy, rename Drive™ content in bulk directly from Google Sheets™, simplifying large-scale Drive™ management for admins.
-Ownership Transfers & Requests: Transfer or request ownership of entire folders and their contents in one click.
-Shared Drive Migration: Move “My Drive” content to “Shared Drive™”, even bypassing permission issues cleanly.
-Folders copy: Duplicate entire folders including files and permissions, with a single action.
-Bulk Renaming: Rename files and folders in bulk to keep your Drive™ organized.
-AI Data Extraction: Extract structured data from PDFs and documents directly into spreadsheets using AI.

Pricing
-Try Folgo for free for 30 days! Get full access to all features, no charges, no credit card required. 
Discover all plans to match your organization's needs:
-Check our Pricing Page to view all plans: https://www.folgo.com/pricing
-Not sure which plan fits your needs? Read our guide to help you choose the best plan: https://help.folgo.com/article/323-which-plan-is-the-best-for-you

Need Help?
-Contact our team: support@folgo.app
-Or visit our Help Center for guides: https://help.folgo.com/

Why Choose Folgo?
-Built-in Integration: Execute actions directly within your Google Drive™ interface.
-Security First: All actions are performed directly on your Drive™ and never on an external server.
-Time-Saving: Perform domain-wide operations quickly and efficiently.
-Reliable & Scalable: Handle any folder or user size without limits, even in large enterprise environments.
-Intuitive & User-Friendly: Folgo’s clear interface makes Drive™ management straightforward, allowing users to take care of their own Drive™ tasks while reducing the admin’s workload.

🛡️ Is Folgo Safe?
-Folgo belongs to the latest generation of Google Drive™ add-ons, built with secure Apps Script technologies.
-Folgo never accesses or stores the contents of your files. Only essential information is securely stored necessary data on encrypted Google Cloud servers (Firebase).
-Folgo passed Google's rigorous security review, Folgo is approved for publishing and poses no risk to users.
-CASA Tier 3 validated with third-party Letter of Validation.
-Your data remains 100% safe with us. We never access, transfer, sell, or store the contents of your files.
-Managed by a committed, security-aware development team.
For full details, visit our pages: https://www.folgo.com/privacy-policy & https://www.folgo.com/security

⚠️Why Folgo Needs Access to Sheets™, Drive™, and Gmail™?
Folgo only requests the minimum permissions needed on Google Sheets™, Drive™, and Gmail™.
These permissions are used exclusively to perform Folgo operations and nothing else.
Google has reviewed and approved our use of these permissions.
Read our Privacy Policy to learn how we keep your data safe.

⭐ Support Folgo
-If you enjoy Folgo, please consider leaving a review on this page to help us continue improving! 
-You might also like our other apps, such as Mergo (https://www.mergo.app/) or Publigo (https://www.publigo.app/).

📖 About Folgo
Folgo was developed by Romain Vialard and Pierre Leroy at Scriptit. Romain is also the creator of Yet Another Mail Merge (YAMM), Awesome Table, and Form Publisher. He established Awesome Gapps to maintain these products but is no longer involved with the company. As a member of the Google Developer Expert (GDE) program, Romain has spent over a decade working on Google Apps Script and Google APIs.

Google Drive™ is a trademark of Google LLC. Creativity

Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Mailmeteor - Mail merge for Gmail ™ Send hundreds of personalized emails with your Gmail™. Includes: mail merge, tracking, scheduling, follow-ups, automations and AI features. Try it now, it's free! Mailmeteor is the top-rated mail merge tool for Gmail™, Google Sheets™ and Google Docs™. 

Easy-to-use and privacy-focused, you can start sending 50 personalized emails per day for FREE. Then unlock powerful features to send much more emails, track emails in real-time, automate your campaigns and send follow-ups.

Here's how to get started:

1. Click the "Install" button at the top of this page.
2. Add your contacts in a Google Sheets™ spreadsheet.
3. Launch Mailmeteor from your spreadsheet by selecting "Extensions" > "Mailmeteor"
4. Write your email and receive a test email to make sure everything works.
5. Click "Send emails'' in Mailmeteor and you're done!

To learn more and start using advanced features, take a course at the Mailmeteor Academy : https://mailmeteor.com/learning/getting-started

WHY MAILMETEOR?

- #1 Best-rated mail merge for Gmail™
- 7 million installs - Rated 4.9/5
- Available in Google Sheets™, Docs™ and Gmail™

PRICING

➤ Free plan: 50 emails / day
➤ Paid plans: https://mailmeteor.com/pricing
➤ Free for schools and universities: https://mailmeteor.com/education-program

MAILMETEOR BENEFITS

💌 Save time sending emails with Gmail™. Send mass emails at once without your recipients knowing. Make your contacts feel special.
🎯 Make sure your emails land in the Inbox. We maximize your email deliverability and send emails directly from Gmail™. 
🔒 Designed to respect your privacy. Mailmeteor needs only minimal permissions to send emails on your behalf, contrary to most other mail merge add-ons.

⚡️ FEATURES

✓ Free mail merge: Send up to 50 emails per day, for free
✓ Personalization: send customized emails extracting recipient data from Google Sheets™
✓ Campaigns: send up 10,000 emails at a time from Gmail™
✓ Email tracking: know when someone opens or clicks on the links in your mails
✓ AI-powered: Generate your email with AI
✓ Auto follow-up: send a reminder when not opened, not replied… 
✓ Attachments, Scheduling, Send from an alias, ...
✓ Hubspot / CRM integration 
✓ CSV data Export
✓ Available in English, Spanish and French

Discover all our unique features: https://mailmeteor.com/features

👋 TUTORIAL

➢ Send your first email campaign with Mailmeteor using our guide:
https://mailmeteor.com/mail-merge-gmail/tutorial
➢ Start our online course on emailing with the Mailmeteor Academy: https://mailmeteor.com/learning/getting-started
➢ Have a look at all the advanced features (such as Auto follow-up, Autopilot, scheduling and more): https://mailmeteor.com/features

🧑‍🎓 MAIL MERGE FOR EDUCATION

Have a .EDU email address? Mailmeteor provides free licenses with up to 500 emails/day, as part of its Education Program. Learn more:

➢ https://mailmeteor.com/education-program

🙌 WHAT MAKES MAILMETEOR THE BEST EMAIL MARKETING TOOL FOR GMAIL™?

Mailmeteor is not just yet another mail merge:

★ Mailmeteor is the best free mail merge for Gmail™. Mailmeteor offers twice more free quota than other mail merge tools (like Yamm or Gmass) to send batch personalized emails. Send up to 50 emails a day for free and track openings & clicks rates with the built-in mailtrack function. 
★ Affordable pricing options from $4 per month per user, if you just need a cheap mail merge solution to send personalized email campaigns. Mailmeteor is a great place to start if you need a free unlimited mail merge for Gmail™.
★ Mailmeteor is a verified Google™ mail merge add-on that ensures your privacy remains protected at all times. It requires the lowest permissions needed to run. Contrary to most mail merge add-ons, Mailmeteor does not request to read your inbox or Drive ™ folder.
★ Mailmeteor also helps you transition to the Google ™ suite easily, if you’re a long-time user of Outlook and Microsoft Word mail merge, you won’t get lost. 

Mailmeteor can be combined with other services to make it even more powerful: 

➥ Gather emails from Typeform or Google Forms ™ notifications into a Gsheet by connecting them with Zapier. Then you can send a personalized email campaign to these people with Mail meteor.
➥ Use Mailmeteor to distribute personalized Calendly, Twitch or Zoom links to schedule a meeting, a conference call, or a live stream. Way better time management! 
➥ Interact with a service like Shopify or Prestashop clients to follow up on their order, collect reviews or send an invoice. 

🐞SUPPORT & DOCUMENTATION

Need a helping hand? Check our support center: https://mailmeteor.com/support
Suggest a missing feature: https://mailmeteor.com/contact#others/features-request

🔒 PRIVACY, SAFETY AND AUDIT

Mailmeteor complies with privacy laws (especially GDPR) to protect your data. Learn more about how we respect your privacy in our Privacy Policy.

Mailmeteor is audited by Google™ every year for optimal security.

—

WEBSITE: https://mailmeteor.com
SALES: https://mailmeteor.com/sales
SUPPORT: https://mailmeteor.com/support Business Tools

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Shared Contacts AI Auto-Updater for Gmail™
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Shared Contacts AI Auto-Updater for Gmail™ AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox. Keep all your  contacts always up to date automatically with the help of AI.
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is the simplest way to share, manage and sync Google™ Contacts across your entire organization directly from Gmail™ and other apps and devices. Whether you’re a small team or a large enterprise, this tool ensures that every employee has instant access to the latest contact information, anywhere, anytime.

🧠 Empowered by AI automation:
Once this Gmail™ Add-on is installed, its Smart AI Contact Updater runs in the background. It reads your emails and finds names, phone numbers, job titles, and more (email signature),  then automatically creates or updates contacts with the new information. It even writes helpful notes, like summarising your email conversation and updates custom fields (like customer ID, birth date, favourite colour).

🌐 One install — complete  access: 
Installing the Gmail™ Add-on also gives you access to the full Shared Contacts management platform. That means all shared contact management, advanced permission controls, custom fields & filters, directory sync, and integrations are at your fingertips from day one. 

What you can do with Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

✅Share and sync contacts effortlessly

Share any Google™ Contact label (list) with individuals or Google™ Groups

Instantly sync shared contacts to Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, mobile devices (iPhones, Android, Google phones), Calendar, Drive, and more

Keep your team’s contact list consistent and centralized across the company

✅Automate updates with AI

Detect contact info from emails and create and update contacts automatically

Reduce contact duplication, outdated records, and manual edits

Create new contacts from audio notes, email signatures, and messages

✅Control permissions and visibility

Set permission levels: “View Only, Can Edit, Can Share, Can Delete”

Hide sensitive contact fields from unauthorized users

Ensure data sharing complies with internal privacy and security policies

✅Centralise and manage your Google™ Workspace directory

Sync your Google™ Workspace Directory and LDAP with users’ devices (iPhones, Android, Google Phones)

Let employees update their own directory profiles

Build and manage a unified, always up-to-date company address book

✅Access shared contacts everywhere

Your users can access shared contacts in Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, Android, iPhone, Outlook, WhatsApp, Zoom, and CRM.

No installation required on user devices — sync happens in real time

Enable autocomplete in Gmail™ and other Google™ apps

✅Comments, Notes and notifications

Add internal notes or comments to contacts directly from Gmail™

Mention teammates in notes using @mentions — they’ll get notified instantly

With the help of notifications, you can revert any edits made on the contact list

✅Custom Fields to personalize your contact cards

Set custom fields like “Customer ID,” “Plan Type,” “Onboarding Date,” “Birthday” or anything your team needs

You can define custom contact fields using free text input or dropdown menus with preset options

Then when your contacts are created or updated by your users or the AI, custom fields can be filled out manually or selected from predefined dropdown menus

Structure contacts based on your workflow or industry - set custom fields like “Customer Type,” “Sales Region,” or “Project Name” to organize your contacts in a way that fits your industry — whether you’re in sales, education, healthcare, or real estate. This makes your contact lists more useful and easier to manage

Improve searchability and categorization of shared contacts - categories like "Millennials”, “Buyer  Priority,” “Renewal Due,” or “Favourite colour - Blue” so your team can quickly find the right contacts. This improves search results and helps everyone stay organized.

✅Search, filter, and organize contacts

Use advanced search to find contacts by company, location, job title, or tags

Filter by custom fields, roles, teams, clients, or vendors

Organize your database your way with flexible labeling and grouping options

✅History logs : 

Track every change made to a contact, including who edited what and when

Revert edit  of the contact data from notifications

Improve transparency and audit readiness

✅Unlimited Backup/Restore

Restore deleted contacts anytime — no time limits

With Shared Contacts admin logs, track any update made in contacts by your users.

Use multi-criteria search to run investigations , revert updates and restore in one click any deleted contact.

✅Integrate with the tools you already use

Works natively with Gmail™ and Google™ Contacts

Synchronize contacts from your Active Directory, CRM, ERP, and mobile devices — all in one place

Connect with CRMs

Integrate with helpdesks, IP phone systems, and 3,000+ apps via workflow automations or our Public API


Why Choose Shared Contacts for Gmail™?
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is one of the top-rated solutions for sharing and managing Google™ Contacts ac Creativity
