Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Walution - Send Personalized WhatsApp Messages
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Send unlimited bulk and personalized WhatsApp messages from your own number. Free customer support. Free to try.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Walution - Send Personalized WhatsApp Messages Send unlimited bulk and personalized WhatsApp messages from your own number. Free customer support. Free to try. ✔️ The best Google add-on/extension to send unlimited personalized unique WhatsApp messages directly from Google Sheets. ✔️ No sign-up required. ✔️ Free and fast customer service. ✔️ Free from advertising or branding.  ✔️ Send messages without saving numbers or contacts to your phone. ✔️ Ideal for marketing.

👇 Read more about our features, help, tutorials and pricing.


𝍁 HOW DOES THIS BULK WHATSAPP SENDER  FOR G SHEETS WORK?

➤ Start the add-on from Google Sheet > Extensions > Walution > Start
➤ Make sure the first row in your sheet contains column names. Such as ‘Fullname’, ‘Address’, ‘Phone’, ‘Email’,  etc.
➤ To be able to merge you need to have at least one row of data under your column names.
➤ These column names will be used as *|Merge Fields|* into your message.
➤ From the Sidebar Select the Sheet tab you want to merge data from.
➤ Select the ‘WhatsApp Number' Column. This will be the column in your sheet which contains a list of mobile numbers. Typically this is a column name called ‘Mobile’. All values in this column must have a valid phone number. If the phone number does not have a country code (such as +1) the default country code will be used. To set the Default Country code go to Extensions > Walution > Default Country Code
➤ Write the content of your message in the box provided and insert Personalized Fields wherever you want in the message. For example: Dear *|Fullname|*,
➤ When ready click ‘Send Test’ to send a message to any number you want. The test merge will merge data from the 1st row of data. That is row 2 since row 1 only contains column headers.
➤ Once you’re happy with how your message looks you can go ahead with a full merge.
➤ A column called ‘Message Status’ is automatically created for you by the add-on. This will be automatically populated with the date and time the row was successfully merged. If you want to re-send/merge the row, just delete the content of that cell under the ‘Message  Status’ column. If there is text in all the data rows for the ‘‘Message Status’ column you will get an error when you attempt to merge telling you that there are no rows to merge.

 
🎯 HOW IS THIS GOOGLE SHEETS EXTENSION FOR WA USEFUL?

No need to download any software. A bulk WhatsApp sender online, powered by Google Workspace. Whether it’s for personal, education or other professional business use, this is a simple and powerful tool for sending mass personalized WhatsApp messages. Easily insert place holders (or Merge Fields) in your message and you are ready to go. 

★ Unlimited usage for a fixed cheap price. Send messages with out limits.
★ Send WhatsApp message directly without adding contact to your phone.
★ Send messages from your own phone number. This way you can get replies directly to you.
★ It does not use a generic phone number to send messages.
★ Personalize WhatsApp messages to send unique messages to your contacts.
★ Broadcast your message with this 
hatsApp sender and test for free.
★ Send a test message to get a good idea on how your text message will look like.
★ Opt to merge only selected/filtered rows of data.
★ Operate online over the web without hassle.
★ No limit to how many merge fields you can enter.
★ Track which rows have been merged.
★ Messages can be sent to all platforms: Apple iOS (iPhone) and Google Android.
 

🕵️ COMMON USE CASES INCLUDE

➤ Inviting people to an event such as a webinar, wedding, job-dating, fair, conference, meetup. 
➤ Get answers from a large list of guests and invitees. 
➤ Get potential new clients with a custom message campaign.
➤ Drive and generate new leads with efficient cold messages.
➤ Send commercial offers suited to each recipient.
➤ Apply to many job offers at once.
➤ Manage PR campaigns by contacting journalists or influencers.
➤ Send payment reminders to a list of clients with their invoice attached.
➤ Share information on each student with their parents the easiest way.
➤ Greetings for birthday, happy new year, new year's eve wishes, holidays, thanksgiving, Halloween, Secret Santa, Christmas, Xmas holiday to your friends, family or colleagues.
➤ Renew your audience commitment to your blog with a message that present the latest blog posts
➤ Send personalized thank-you messages to HR recruiters, crowdfunding supports, product hunt upvoters, business angels, a friend or family.
➤ Run efficient cold messages or follow-up campaign to drive & generate new leads, for sales people. 
 
 
💰 PRICING / COST

Buy and unlimited month or year package.
https://whatsapp-sender.quicklution.com/pricing


🆘 NEED HELP AND SUPPORT?

Don’t worry. We don’t use robots with artificial intelligence. We have real intelligent people answering your questions with an average response time of less than 3 hours. However, we usually reply much faster than that. Whether you are using the free or premium version, we do not charge for customer support. Help comes in the form of email communication, or as an alternative, we also provide a remote desktop session.

We Creativity

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Zoho CRM
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Zoho CRM is a flexible cloud-based CRM for your business that helps you attract, retain and delight customers.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Zoho CRM Zoho CRM is a flexible cloud-based CRM for your business that helps you attract, retain and delight customers. The Most used CRM software with Google Workspace

Zoho CRM empowers more than 150,000 businesses of all sizes and types to build great customer relationships and improve customer retention. 
Businesses can convert more leads to deals, interact with prospects and customers from within the cloud-based platform and grow their revenue. Businesses and industries can conduct their sales and marketing and customer support activities through streamlined processes, policies and managing people all from within a single platform. 

Zoho CRM for Google Workspace helps you bring all your emails, files, calendar appointments and tasks together in one place. 

Nurture leads, close more deals, and engage with customers across every stage of the customer life-cycle. Easily automate your sales process and let Zoho CRM take care of your regular sales activities and follow-ups so that you get more time to sell. 
 
FEATURES 
Customize your CRM layout using Canvas, a built-in drag and drop layout builder or just pick from a list of industry specific layouts 
Use workflows and save time spent on reptitive sales tasks with Salesforce automation 
Make AI powered data-driven decisions with in-depth Analytics tools, detect anomalies, build customizable reports across modules and get consolidated data at your fingertips 
Track, manage and sort sales performance data across teams and region using Sales Performance tracker
Omnichannel communication to keep conversations streamlined and across various channels like email, telephony, social media.
Run powerful targeted marketing campaigns and generate quality leads, convert and import them directly into the CRM using Sales and Marketing automation tools 
Take all of the above features on-the-go with the top rated mobile app

BENEFITS 
● Get a 360-degree view of your customer interactions. 
● Track leads, prospects, and business opportunities. 
● Customize Zoho CRM to specific industry needs.
● Get real-time notifications about customer actions. 
● Build and automate your sales and marketing processes. 
● Industry's first conversational AI sales assistant.
● Analyze trends and key metrics with reports and built-in CRM analytics. 
● Access more than 250 world-class apps from inside CRM. Integrate with popular third-party apps like Zendesk, MailChimp, SurveyMonkey, etc and a host of other business apps from Zoho. 

Pricing
● Zoho CRM is free for up to 3 users. 
● Pricing plans begin at $14/user/month. 
● No long term contracts. No hidden pricing. 
● Pay as you go.
 
Why Google Workspace and Zoho CRM go well together
* Stop juggling between email and CRM
Get a better perspective of your customers' needs by tracking every email interaction from Gmail inside Zoho CRM.

* Easily share files
Attach files from Google Docs in Zoho CRM, and share documents that open online and work on any platform.
   
* Two-way synchronization of tasks
Add tasks from Zoho CRM to Google Tasks. Plan your work time, never miss your deadlines, and ensure important work doesn’t fall through the cracks.

* The best CRM for Google Ads 
Get a complete picture of your online ad campaigns. Get insights on your return on investment. 
 
* Web forms for Google Sites
Use Zoho CRM to publish web forms to your Google Sites and get quality leads online. 
 
* Single Sign On
Forget about remembering multiple passwords to log into your system and just use your Google Credentials to log into Zoho CRM. Once you set this up, you also get notifications from your CRM activities from the Google Universal Navigation Bar. Business Tools

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Neartail - Order form
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Neartail - Order form Create order form in Google Forms & collect payment. Extract price & product details to calculate order amount. You are a store owner who wants your customers to order online. You use Google Forms™ to take orders. But, it lacks key features to calculate order amount and accept payment. Use Neartail's Order form addon to enhance Google Forms™ with calculation and payment collection. Create order forms that are fully functional and easy-to-use for your customers. 

If you haven’t started on your form yet, you can use the prebuilt Neartail templates to create your order form. If you have already created your form in Google Forms™, then you can use the AI powered Neartail addon to automatically convert the questions in Google Forms™ into relevant products with prices and fields to collect customer details in your order form.

❇️ How Neartail leverages AI to convert your google form into order form?

When you customize the form using the Neartail addon, you can enable the Format prices option that:
➤ automatically identifies questions with prices and converts them into products to be sold by quantity, weight or with variants.
➤ converts simple question types into products that allows you to add product specific attributes such as description, tax, available stock & more.
➤ adds the formula to calculate the order amount based on the product prices in the form and displays an order summary in the bill format. 
➤ transforms responses into order line items to create aggregate reports for sales by product, customer & view sales trends by week or month.

❇️ Features: Calculate order amount in Google Forms™

➤ Dynamically calculate the total amount for the products ordered by the user and display it in your form in real time.
➤ Add coupon codes option in your order form to offer your customers a percentage discount, fixed amount discount or free shipping discount.
➤ Write formulas to enforce minimum order amount, offer free shipping for orders exceeding specified order amount threshold & more.
➤ Offering curbside pickup & delivery options? Add a delivery details section with the available options and the delivery fees for each option.

❇️ Features: Accept online payment in Google Forms™

➤ Collect payments before customers submit the form and fully automate your payment process.
➤ Accept fully automated payments such as credit or debit cards, Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Bancontact, iDeal, Paynow directly on Google Forms™.
➤ Accept peer to peer payment methods such as Paypal, Venmo, Cash App, Paynow, Zelle, Lydia or UPI with zero transaction fees.
➤ Allow users to place orders without making payments by enabling offline payment methods such as cash on delivery, cheque, bank transfer.


❇️ Features: Customize order form for your needs

➤ Show a summary of the products ordered by the user so that they can review their order before they submit it for processing.
➤ Send order confirmation emails to your customers and get email notifications for new orders
➤ Choose the preferred layout: Compact (3 column card layout), comfortable (2 column list layout) or the default form layout
➤ Close your form to stop accepting orders and add a custom message to let your users know when they can order next.


❇️ Use case: Tailor-made for your business

Restaurants, Canteens, Meal prep: Whether you have a set menu or an a la carte menu or a daily menu, easily create your restaurant order form and start accepting online orders from your customers. Simply choose from our pre-designed restaurant templates to get started.

Bakery: Are you a bakery taking custom cake orders, selling a selection of cupcakes or doughnut boxes, or offering a wide range of products such as cookies, pastries, bagels etc? You can create an online order form that exactly meets your business needs.

Clubs, Apparel stores: Does your business sell apparel? You can now easily create a visually appealing and elegant apparel order form that works equally well for products without any variants, products with only color or size variants, and products with both color & size variants.

Grocery stores, Supermarkets, Farms: Sell daily essentials such as vegetables, fruits, grains, meat, baby care, personal care products and more by creating an online order form using our pre-designed grocery order form templates. Let your customers order products easily from the comforts of their home.

Once your customer submits the form, you can manage orders with Google Sheets™ or Google Forms™, you are comfortable with. Gain your customers' trust with a professional ordering experience, while still using G Suite™ / Google Workspace™.

❇️ Pricing:

Neartail's Order form addon is a paid product with a 7-day trial. You get the first 20 responses free during this trial period. If you would like to collect more than 20 responses or use Neartail after the trial ends, you can subscribe to the paid plan.

➤ $18 for 100 orders per month
➤ $28 for 200 orders per month
➤ $38 for 300 orders per month

You can either choose the monthly or annual subscription. For details, refer to the pricing page. For higher volumes, Business Tools

3️⃣ Create your email template

🕵️‍♂️ Realtime emails tracking
👁  Preview emails
⏲  Schedule send
📫 Manage unsubscribes
📎 Add attachments files


⚫️ PRICING

Mail Merge for Gmail™ is not limited (all features are free).
Sending 250 emails per day costs $3 per month for a yearly license.
Sending 2000 emails per day costs $4 per month for a yearly license.


⚫️ PRIVACY

Mail Merge for Gmail™ complies with privacy laws such as GDPR & California Privacy Act to protect your data.

By design, your data stays at all times on your Google Sheets™. We don’t ask for access to your emailing data, Mail Merge for Gmail™ cannot read your emails.

Here's all the data we need in order to make Mail Merge for Gmail™ work:
- Your email address to know who you are
- Campaigns sent metadata (spreadsheet name, date of sending - that's all)
- Emails sent metadata (date of sending, open / clicks events - that's all again)


⚫️ SUPPORT

Need a helping hand? Have a look at our extensive guides. 
Documentation link: https://documentation.merge.email


⚫️ USE CASES

You can use Mail Merge for Gmail™ in many different ways, some use cases:

👥 Send bulk emails to your clients, partners or prospects, whether you are part of a large enterprise corporate or running a small business (marketplace, e-commerce...)
🗞️ A newsletter solution to send periodic newsletters on your latest products, features, promotion, discount, coupon, news, reports, metrics, polls. 
📅 Greetings at different period of the year (happy new year, new year's eve wishes, birthdays, holidays, Thanksgiving, Halloween, secret santa and Christmas holiday).
🎫 Inviting people to an event (webinar, wedding, job-dating, fair, conference, meetup...) and get answers from a large list of guests and invitees. 
👔 Job hunt : apply to many job offers at once and track the status of your application, like a task manager.
🎁 Address personalized thank-you emails to HR recruiters, crowdfunding supports, product hunt upvoters, business angels, a friend or family.
🛍️ Run efficient cold emailing or follow-up campaign to drive & generate new leads, for sales people. 
👨🏻‍🦱 Manage PR campaigns by contacting journalists or influencers.
🏠 Mail Merge for Gmail™ is currently being used by organizations to quickly send email updates to employees who are working from home during the Coronavirus (COVID-19) crisis.


⚫️ OUR USERS ARE

👩‍💻 Large companies & small businesses, entrepreneurs or indiehackers in need of an inbound & outbound email campaign tool to contact prospects and potential new clients. 
👩‍🏫 Teachers, universities (and more broadly education) who want to send courses and/or exams grades to their student (at school, university and college) at the end of the week, month or semester.
👩‍⚕️ Associations, NGO & clubs in order to receive new applications, promote a contest, a call for project, interact with their crew, send communicate with their database of members.
🧑‍💼 Businesses and professionals of all kinds looking to send payment reminder to a list of clients based on the unpaid status of their invoices.
🤵 And also startups, digital marketing agencies, consultancy groups...


⚫️ UNLIMITED MAIL MERGE ON GOOGLE WORKSPACE™

📣 No restrictions on features, no trial period. Send up to 2000 emails a day and track openings & clicks rates with the built-in mailtrack function.
⚙️ Mail Merge for Gmail™ is built on the latest technologies for Google Workspace™ so as to ensures your privacy remains protected at all time. Mail Merge for Gmail™ is fast, reliable and powerful. 

Some CRM apps have mail merge features (i.e: Streak, Boomerang, Hubspot, Sortd, Copper, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Woodpecker, Intercom or Zendesk). However, you may just need to send mass personalized emails from Email or maybe looking for a free mail merge solution rather than heavy marketing tools. 

There are also email marketing solution such as Mailchimp, Sendgrid or Mailjet, Sendinblue, Mailgun, Convertkit, CampaignMonitor, Lemlist, Yesware, Mailshake or SalesHandy. These might be heavy and costly solutions whereas you just need a tool to send news letters with Email. Make your recipients feels like emails were written by hand, only for them with Mail Merge for Gmail™. It gives a more personal approach to your communication.

Mail Merge for Gmail™ can be combined with other services to make it even more powerful. Some examples: 

🧾 Gather emails from Typeform or Google Forms answers into a Google Sheets™ by connecting them with Zapier. Then you can send a personalized email campaign to these people with Mail meteor. To ensure your email is perfect, use Grammarly to check misspelling in your emails.

📅 Use Mail Merge for Gmail™ to distribute personalized Calendly, Tw Communication

Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Automate Your Google Workspace Workflow Without Coding
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
xFanatical Foresight Automate Your Google Workspace Workflow Without Coding Overview
====================================
Experience seamless Google Workspace automation with xFanatical Foresight - your no-code automation tool. Simplify tasks, create automated workflows, and enhance productivity effortlessly. 

xFanatical Foresight is an innovative SaaS platform that revolutionizes the way businesses optimize their operational processes and supercharge their Google Workspace workflows effortlessly. Using Foresight, Google Workspace admins and Google Workspace users can now streamline their workflow automation without any coding expertise. Transform your Google Workspace experience today!

Benefits
====================================
► Google Workspace Synergy. Achieve unparalleled synergy with Google Workspace, as xFanatical Foresight automates your workflows seamlessly.
► No Code Automation. Experience the ease of automation without the need for coding skills, enabling anyone to harness its power.
► Increased Efficiency. Foresight Automation Tool revolutionizes operations by automating tasks, minimizing errors, and accelerating workflows.
► Improved Accuracy. With the Foresight Automation Tool, accuracy soars. Eliminating human errors, ensures precise results in complex tasks, safeguarding your business and boosting overall performance.
► Enhanced Productivity. Foresight automates repetitive tasks, enabling your team to focus on high-impact activities, leading to faster project completion and exponential growth.
► Cost Savings. Foresight Automation Tool streamlines workflows. It reduces the need for manual labor. Leads to substantial cost savings.
► Improved Data Visibility. Foresight automation tool provides real-time insights and analytics, helping you make informed decisions and gain a clear picture of your operations for smarter, more efficient strategies.
► Enhanced Customer Experience. It ensures customers get special treatment, quick answers, and a consistent, hassle-free experience, making them happy each time they interact with your business.

Use Cases
====================================
👉 For Google Workspace Administrators 👩‍🔧 👨‍🔧
►   Know How to Bulk Update Google Workspace Licenses
►   Create users, suspend users or delete users by schedule
►   Automatically send personalized welcome emails to new users
►   Automatically assign new users to specific groups
►   Automatically share Calendars to new Group members
►   Automate Google Workspace offboarding workflow
►   Automatically suspend inactive users after a set amount of time
►   Auto Add Users to Groups After Changing User’s OU
►   Schedule mobile device management, e.g. schedule approving / blocking / unblocking / wiping / deleting a mobile device
►   Auto Report, Block And Wipe Inactive Mobile Devices In Google Workspace
►   Automated email to new user’s manager in Google Workspace
►   Automatically move users to organizational units or add users to groups based on the user's employee information, including employee id, job title, direct manager email, building, floor, floor section, cost center etc.
►   Bulk archive / unarchive Google users
►   Bulk suspend / reactivate users
►   Bulk delete / restore users
►   Bulk add / delete group members
►   Bulk move Chrome devices to another organizational unit (OU)
►   Bulk disable / re-enable / deprovision Chrome devices
►   Bulk update Chrome device custom fields, user, location, notes, asset id etc.
►   Bulk block / unblock / approve / wipe mobile devices
►   Bulk reset user passwords for users
►   Bulk move users to another organizational unit
►   Bulk creates data transfers between users, including calendar, drive and docs, brand account and data studio.
►   Bulk force users to change their passwords at next sign-in 
►   Bulk show / hide users from the organization directory
►   Bulk update group settings, name, description, permissions
►   Search and export suspended / active / recently deleted users as a CSV file by organizational units, managers, 2sv enrollment etc.
►   Export groups as a CSV file
►   Find and export a user's groups as a CSV file
►   Export a group's members as a CSV file
►   Search and export Chrome devices as a CSV file by enrollment time, last policy sync time, provision status, recent user, location, notes etc.
►   Search and export mobile devices as a CSV file by owners and last policy sync
►   Export Google Workspace User License Assignments as a CSV file
►   Bulk manages Google Workspace user license assignments, assigning, revoking, updating licenses.
►   Automate Google Calendar Resources management, e.g. building, resources, features. 
►   Remind new users for 2FA sign up for better security.
►   Periodically export admin activity logs as CSV files and save them to your Google Drive folder.
►   Periodically export user apps usage reports as CSV files and save them to your Google Drive folder.

👉For Google Workspace Users 👩‍🔧 👨‍🔧
====================================
►   Get daily or weekly agenda emails to you and your team
►   Automat Business Tools

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Gmelius: Shared Inboxes & AI Assistants for Gmail
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Reclaim 1 hour every day. Our AI Email Assistants sort your emails and draft replies, while Gmelius shared inboxes help your team take over conversations—so you don't have to.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Gmelius: Shared Inboxes & AI Assistants for Gmail Reclaim 1 hour every day. Our AI Email Assistants sort your emails and draft replies, while Gmelius shared inboxes help your team take over conversations—so you don't have to. Once the Google Workspace application installed, please head to https://app.gmelius.com to finalize the configuration.

Gmelius brings Genius to your Gmail. Managing emails in your primary inbox or your organization's shared inboxes becomes clear, efficient and quick.

Gmelius is the AI-powered email management platform built natively for Gmail. It lets generative-AI assistants sort, draft replies and dispatch messages, offers shared inboxes and shared labels inside Gmail, and keeps everything in perfect sync across your team and tools.

✨ AI Assistants for Gmail – Reply, Sorting and Dispatch agents cut routine email work by an hour a day.

📨 Shared Inbox inside Gmail – manage support@, sales@ or any group address with clear open → pending → closed statuses, assignees, tags, @mentions and notes.

🏷 Shared Gmail Labels – turn any Gmail label into a live thread your whole team can follow.

🎛 Kanban & custom views – flip an inbox or label into a board or bookmark specific views depending on your operational needs.

🤖 Automation rules and SLA timers – create “If-This-Then-That” flows, auto-assign owners and stay inside promised response times.

📊 Analytics dashboards – track volumes, resolution time and teammate workload at a glance.

All features live where you already work, so your team keeps its Gmail muscle memory and gains new productivity super-powers.

===============================

✨ Highest Star Rating in our Class.
🏆 Leader of the shared inbox space.
🚀 Y Combinator S19

===============================

This is our browser extension that completes our solution for Gmail and Google Workspace customers. Key features:

✨ AI Assistants for Gmail: Meet AI assistants whose job it is to manage your Gmail inbox.
✓ AI Reply Assistants - They draft replies to your emails.
✓ AI Sorting Assistants - They sort and classify your incoming emails.
✓ AI Dispatching Assistants - They route emails to the right teammates.

Our AI assistants can replace solutions like ChatGPT, MailMaestro, AutoGmail, Fyxer, Superhuman.

📨 Shared Inbox: Transform Gmail into a collaboration platform.
Make great teamwork possible in Gmail by reinventing how your team manages inboxes like support@ or invoices@. Replace cluttered Google Groups and help desks with a shared inbox built for Gmail. Discover the smartest alternative to Google Groups, Help Desks, Hiver, Front, etc.

🏷️ Gmail Shared Labels
✓ Share existing or new Gmail labels with members of your team
✓ Synchronize conversations in real-time across all devices (e.g., mobile, desktop)

👥 Team Collaboration
✓ Real-time syncing across all devices
✓ No more bcc nor fwd!
✓ Email Notes and @mentions to add context to any conversation
✓ Assign or delegate emails to members of your team

 🧮 Kanban Project Boards
✓ Turn your shared inbox or label into a project board similarly to what Sortd and DragApp offer – bring visibility to your team
✓ Manage your columns by team member or status – optimize your team’s workload
✓ Convert emails into task cards for clear visibility
✓ Drag and drop cards to assign emails and complete tasks
✓ Add due dates, synced 2-way with your Google Calendar – stay up to date everywhere
✓ 2-way synchronization with Trello

🤓 Workflow Intelligence
✓ Automate repetitive tasks with rules for internal and external workflows
✓ SLA rules, auto responder, auto assignment and more
✓ Ex: “when this email gets answered add automatically reply and assign it to that team member”

📧 Shareable Email Templates for Gmail
✓ Make email writing easy and fast
✓ Improve your team's consistency and performance
✓ Proposal, Sales, Marketing, Custom Templates - easily created and shared

===============================

Swiss-grade privacy and security

Headquartered in Switzerland, Gmelius follows a strict Privacy-by-Design framework. Your data stays confidential, is securely processed, and is never used to train AI models. Explore our Trust Center any time. For more details, please see https://gmelius.com/legal/security

===============================

Try it free

Install the extension, start your 7-day free trial, and see how AI + Gmail can unlock real email productivity for your team. Need a guided tour? Book a demo at gmelius.com/request-demo

===============================
© Gmelius. Less Email. More Life.
Gmail is a registered trademark of Google Inc.; Gmelius is not affiliated with Google. Communication

Paid Media & Ads.docx.name: Form Director
Paid Media & Ads.docx.description: Direct Google Forms™ submission to apps in Google Workspace™, CRM, Accounting, Productivity, Marketing, etc.
Paid Media & Ads.docx.search_text:
Form Director Direct Google Forms™ submission to apps in Google Workspace™, CRM, Accounting, Productivity, Marketing, etc. Form Director turns your Google Forms™ submissions into Google Docs™, Slides™, Sheets™, Calendar™ events, Contacts™, Tasks™, Cloud Database records, Email notifications, QuickBooks posts, Trello cards, Insightly objects, Slack messages, Asana tasks, Hubspot contacts, etc.

FREE quota to try your integrations and automation with Google Workspace™ apps and other external applications.

Form Director is a comprehensive integration and automation solution designed to streamline all of your business and professional workflows simply from Google Forms. 


APP INTEGRATIONS

✔ Google Forms™ to Google Workspace™ apps — Google Calendar™, Contacts™, Tasks™, Docs™, Sheets™

✔ Google Forms™ to Databases — MySQL and more

✔ Google Forms™ Email Notifications via Gmail™ and other custom email providers

✔ Google Forms™ to CRM systems — Salesforce and more

✔ Google Forms™ to Communication tools — Google Chat™, Slack, and more

Refer to https://formdirector.jivrus.com/apps for the full set of integrations.


KEY FEATURES

►  Flexible Service Management: Effortlessly enable or disable various services to suit your specific workflow needs.

►  Document Generation and Distribution: Generate, store, and email documents in multiple formats (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint) with ease.
►  Precise File Sharing: Share generated files with multiple recipients, granting edit, view, or comment access to ensure seamless collaboration.


►  Instant Notification System: Stay informed through prompt success notifications via templated email messages.

►  Error Alerting: Proactively address issues with automatic error notifications in the event of service processing failure.

►  Robust Mapping Infrastructure: Connect and map various fields, including form, templated, calculated, result, and lookup fields, for comprehensive data alignment.

►  Intelligent Field Mapping Automation: Achieve efficiency and accuracy with intelligent field mapping that reduces manual effort.


►  User-Friendly Field Picker: Easily select form fields, app fields, system fields, and result fields using an intuitive graphical interface.


►  Conditional Service Execution: Tailor your processes by executing services based on specific conditions, providing dynamic flexibility.

►  Seamless Service Chaining: Streamline your workflow by passing the response of one service to the next, ensuring a cohesive and integrated process.

►  Automated Numbering: Form Director automatically generates document and field numbers in a preferred incremental order, enhancing organization and consistency.


►  Comprehensive Toolkit: Access a suite of bundled tools, including Response Manager, Cloner, and Form Limiter, to manage forms and optimize workflows.

Refer https://formdirector.jivrus.com/features


USE CASES

Discover the boundless potential of Form Director as we delve into a myriad of supported applications and their corresponding use cases. Unleash your creative ingenuity to harness the power of Form Director, applying it wherever it aligns with your needs, regardless of the diverse range of use cases at your disposal.

Some of the sample use cases are listed below:
►  Seamlessly publish proposals, agreements, invoices, estimates, contracts, bills, letters, and more by submitting information through Google Forms. Automatically generate professional documents in Google Docs™ with the gathered data.

►  Effortlessly create sales and marketing presentations, pitch decks, monthly meeting slides, and more by merging your template with data collected from Google Forms™. Streamline the process of building engaging presentations in Google Slides™.

►  Simplify record-keeping by generating entries in as many different Google Sheets™ accessible to distinct teams for every form submission. Enhance data management and collaboration within your organization.

►  Streamline appointment booking, table reservations, and meeting scheduling by creating events in Google Calendar™ from form submissions. Ensure efficient time management and scheduling. 

►  Automatically transform leads into Google Contacts™ for efficient customer relationship management. Build a centralized database of potential clients effortlessly.

►  Capture various data points, such as customer information, orders, tickets, invoices, and payments, and integrate them into your database with ease. Flexibly customize your data collection process using Google Forms™.

►  Boost productivity by creating to-do items in Google Tasks™ when leads sign up on your website. Manage tasks efficiently and stay organized.

►  Automatically send templated emails to confirm order submissions to customers, project teams, and delivery teams. Enhance communication and streamline order processing.

►  Simplify onboarding processes for employees, vendors, and customers in QuickBooks by using Google Forms. Accelerate financial record-keeping and management.

►  Create Trello cards and organize work items directly from form submissions. Enhance task ma Utilities

Personal & Team Productivity.docx.name: Zoho Connect
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.description: Employee experience app to level up your work culture.
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.search_text:
Zoho Connect Employee experience app to level up your work culture. Giving employees the ability to express themselves is very empowering. By doing this, employees naturally learn to trust the organization and form a connection with peers and the company's values, creating a pleasant environment for all employees and the organization as a whole.

But how can companies empower employees this way? The answer is simple: Zoho Connect is a platform built for this. With familiar social features and dedicated tools for internal communication, employee recognition, knowledge sharing, file management, automation, and advanced admin functions, Connect is the perfect solution for elevating the employee experience in your organization.  

Our main goal is to help organizations build an informed workforce and assist teams and employees across hierarchies at every step along the way to achieve individual and collective goals.  


Features

Communication for dynamic teams 
With familiar social-media themed Feeds, you can start conversations with co-workers, @mention users, or groups; like, comment, share, and follow co-workers; or start a poll to find out what your team thinks.

Use the Company Wall to stay up-to-date with the latest developments, announcements from company executives, company events, and important news. 

Additionally, create meetings, view team schedules, and hold video conferences with your team members.

Collaborative spaces to streamline work
Organize teams into groups, discuss, share ideas, and work together. Use the built-in apps or integrations to ensure your team has what they need to accomplish their goals.

A bird's eye view of everything important
Use the customizable Dashboard to keep everything important in one place. Choose from an array of widgets to create an information architecture that's easy on the eye, relevant, and accessible for all employees. 

Recognition where it is due
With our peer-to-peer recognition module, you can recognize peers and managers for their contribution. A simple "Good Job" or a "Thank You" can go a long way in making anyone's day, and with Connect, you have the option to award badges to each other and let gratitude drive your interactions with other members of the organization.

Company-wide live broadcasts, simplified
Use live broadcast to elevate employee engagement and internal communications. From company-wide updates to interactive Q&A sessions with the leadership, to internal training, reach 10,000 plus employees in one go. Ensure that all your employees feel like they belong in the organization, helping you build a more cohesive company culture.

Easily accessible information
Use the built-in knowledge management and document repository to share policies, guides, goals, and values. Build an archive for employees to draw on when needed.

Bridging the gap 
Use Town Halls and Live Broadcasts to conduct regular AMAs with company leadership or topic experts. Cultivate transparency, build trust, and co-create a healthy company culture.

Exclusive space for idea sharing 
Inspiration can come from anywhere. Using the Ideas module in Zoho Connect, employees have a platform to share ideas and tap into their collective potential. Users can vote on and comment to show support for an idea, making it easier to plan, prioritize, and implement it. 

Work plans help you get ahead
Whether it's a team project or a personal to-do list, you can create a work plan using Kanban-style task Boards. Break complex projects into smaller tasks, assign them to the right people, set priority levels, and track the progress of work, so you and your team can focus on what's important.

Create positive feedback loops
Run employee surveys to take the pulse of your organization. Get an understanding of what employees require, and incorporate their feedback to ensure they're engaged and happy at work.
	
A schedule that you can carry anywhere
From personal appointments and team meetings to the office football tournament, you can create events in Connect's calendar and invite colleagues. Track who will be attending using the RSVP feature. 

Automate work to improve productivity
Build custom apps to solve use cases such as work-related bookings and travel, register details of new hires, or gather the details on the volunteers for your charity programs. Through Workflows and Schedulers, you can automate regular and repetitive work.

Bring your apps together
Get the Zoho advantage. Connect integrates with multiple apps within the Zoho ecosystem to provide you with a seamless experience. Through integrations with popular apps like Zapier, Trello, Google Drive, and more, you can keep track of what's going on without switching tabs. 

Advanced admin capabilities
Decentralize admin responsibilities and assign them to employees using custom roles, automate adding users to groups/boards using workflow-based dynamic membership, and gain insights on your intranet performance with richer analytics.

Never miss an update, but don't let them overwhelm you
With push notifica Communication

Use our 2-way spreadsheet sync when you need to pull data from or write back data to critical systems like your CRM and database. 

Couple live data connectivity with your very own AI Sheets Assistant—an always-on copilot inside your spreadsheet that helps you write formulas, create charts, and answer questions using your data—and you’ll be empowered to build the reports and dashboards you need in the fastest and most flexible way.

Easily sync Google Sheets™ to business systems like Salesforce, HubSpot, Looker™, Tableau, Airtable, Notion, any JSON API, SQL databases, and data warehouses. Then, use AI to speed up your analysis. Ask Sheets Assistant to explain what’s in your data, recommend visuals, or guide your next move—all directly from your spreadsheet.

Using Coefficient you can automatically import all of your data into one place in Google Sheets™, and easily summarize it, filter it, create pivot tables or cloud pivot tables, chart it, and integrate it with other data. You can build custom dashboards and reports, alters, query, join, sync, and manipulate your data.  No more manual cutting and pasting CSV files, importrange or other difficult ways like Apps Script to combine data and spreadsheets. Coefficient offers the easiest path to data extraction. You can import from Excel files as well.

Plus, with Sheets Assistant, you can skip the setup altogether—just ask for what you need in plain language and get a working report, chart, or insight instantly.

Anyone pulling data into a spreadsheet can find value in Coefficient. The most impactful professionals leveraging Coefficient include Sales Leaders, RevOps, Sales Operations, and Marketing Operations professionals, Performance Marketers, FP&A and Financial Operations teams, and Data teams.

► 1-Click Connections

► Alerting

• Paid marketing dashboards for ads performance on the networks of Google, Facebook, Microsoft Bing, Linkedin and more
• Organic marketing reports for insights on engagement and pages on Instagram, Twitter, Youtube and more

► Sheets Assistant, your AI auto analyst
Sheets Assistant combines the power of GPT-4 with live spreadsheet data to handle your requests instantly.

• Ask questions about your data
• Get formulas, charts, and pivot tables generated for you
• Use spreadsheet context to get smarter answers
• Make faster decisions without writing a single formula

► Cloud Pivot Tables
Pivot on data in your cloud systems. Visualize real-time data in a pivot table directly from your systems. Refresh it on any schedule.

Personal & Team Productivity.docx.description: AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox.
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.search_text:
Shared Contacts AI Auto-Updater for Gmail™ AI-based add-on that detects new contacts and contacts changes in Gmail™ and auto-updates your Google™ Contacts instantly. Add notes and share contacts with your team, right from your inbox. Keep all your  contacts always up to date automatically with the help of AI.
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is the simplest way to share, manage and sync Google™ Contacts across your entire organization directly from Gmail™ and other apps and devices. Whether you’re a small team or a large enterprise, this tool ensures that every employee has instant access to the latest contact information, anywhere, anytime.

🧠 Empowered by AI automation:
Once this Gmail™ Add-on is installed, its Smart AI Contact Updater runs in the background. It reads your emails and finds names, phone numbers, job titles, and more (email signature),  then automatically creates or updates contacts with the new information. It even writes helpful notes, like summarising your email conversation and updates custom fields (like customer ID, birth date, favourite colour).

🌐 One install — complete  access: 
Installing the Gmail™ Add-on also gives you access to the full Shared Contacts management platform. That means all shared contact management, advanced permission controls, custom fields & filters, directory sync, and integrations are at your fingertips from day one. 

What you can do with Shared Contacts for Gmail™?

✅Share and sync contacts effortlessly

Share any Google™ Contact label (list) with individuals or Google™ Groups

Instantly sync shared contacts to Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, mobile devices (iPhones, Android, Google phones), Calendar, Drive, and more

Keep your team’s contact list consistent and centralized across the company

✅Automate updates with AI

Detect contact info from emails and create and update contacts automatically

Reduce contact duplication, outdated records, and manual edits

Create new contacts from audio notes, email signatures, and messages

✅Control permissions and visibility

Set permission levels: “View Only, Can Edit, Can Share, Can Delete”

Hide sensitive contact fields from unauthorized users

Ensure data sharing complies with internal privacy and security policies

✅Centralise and manage your Google™ Workspace directory

Sync your Google™ Workspace Directory and LDAP with users’ devices (iPhones, Android, Google Phones)

Let employees update their own directory profiles

Build and manage a unified, always up-to-date company address book

✅Access shared contacts everywhere

Your users can access shared contacts in Gmail™, Google™ Contacts, Android, iPhone, Outlook, WhatsApp, Zoom, and CRM.

No installation required on user devices — sync happens in real time

Enable autocomplete in Gmail™ and other Google™ apps

✅Comments, Notes and notifications

Add internal notes or comments to contacts directly from Gmail™

Mention teammates in notes using @mentions — they’ll get notified instantly

With the help of notifications, you can revert any edits made on the contact list

✅Custom Fields to personalize your contact cards

Set custom fields like “Customer ID,” “Plan Type,” “Onboarding Date,” “Birthday” or anything your team needs

You can define custom contact fields using free text input or dropdown menus with preset options

Then when your contacts are created or updated by your users or the AI, custom fields can be filled out manually or selected from predefined dropdown menus

Structure contacts based on your workflow or industry - set custom fields like “Customer Type,” “Sales Region,” or “Project Name” to organize your contacts in a way that fits your industry — whether you’re in sales, education, healthcare, or real estate. This makes your contact lists more useful and easier to manage

Improve searchability and categorization of shared contacts - categories like "Millennials”, “Buyer  Priority,” “Renewal Due,” or “Favourite colour - Blue” so your team can quickly find the right contacts. This improves search results and helps everyone stay organized.

✅Search, filter, and organize contacts

Use advanced search to find contacts by company, location, job title, or tags

Filter by custom fields, roles, teams, clients, or vendors

Organize your database your way with flexible labeling and grouping options

✅History logs : 

Track every change made to a contact, including who edited what and when

Revert edit  of the contact data from notifications

Improve transparency and audit readiness

✅Unlimited Backup/Restore

Restore deleted contacts anytime — no time limits

With Shared Contacts admin logs, track any update made in contacts by your users.

Use multi-criteria search to run investigations , revert updates and restore in one click any deleted contact.

✅Integrate with the tools you already use

Works natively with Gmail™ and Google™ Contacts

Synchronize contacts from your Active Directory, CRM, ERP, and mobile devices — all in one place

Connect with CRMs

Integrate with helpdesks, IP phone systems, and 3,000+ apps via workflow automations or our Public API


Why Choose Shared Contacts for Gmail™?
Shared Contacts for Gmail™ is one of the top-rated solutions for sharing and managing Google™ Contacts ac Creativity

Personal & Team Productivity.docx.name: Team Time Tracker
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.description: 📆 Keep projects profitable with automatic project time tracking and budgets for Google Calendar™. 📊 Categorize, label, and calculate time directly from Google Calendar events.
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.search_text:
Team Time Tracker 📆 Keep projects profitable with automatic project time tracking and budgets for Google Calendar™. 📊 Categorize, label, and calculate time directly from Google Calendar events. Boost project profitability and gain full transparency into your time costs with TimeNavi. TimeNavi reads your calendar and finds events with project codes or colors to categorize automatically. Effortlessly track billable hours and manage project costs by categorizing and calculating time from Calendar events. Here are the key benefits:


➤ Increased Profitability 🤑 : Rank your projects by value - see which clients are your most and least profitable. Boost your project's profitability by accurately tracking time and setting budgets.

➤ Budgeting and Planning 📊 : Set accurate budgets based on detailed historical time tracking data. Reduce costs by staying within budget - keep watch on which clients and projects take up the most time.

➤ Resource Management 🔍 : Transparency on internal hours burned. Decide whether clients are a large enough profit margin.

➤ Accurate Billing 🎉: Ensure precise billing for future projects with detailed time tracking data - understand how long the project took last time to create the correct proposal for the next project.

➤ Significant Cost Savings 💸: Save tens of thousands of dollars by eliminating guesswork in project budgets and timelines.

➤ Business Transparency 👀 : Gain full transparency into your real-time project timelines and budgets.



With TimeNavi, you can eliminate the need for manual timesheets and streamline your workflow by automatically categorizing time directly from your calendar events. Keep your projects on track, profitable, and transparent with the power of TimeNavi’s AI-driven time tracking.

Here’s what some of our customers say: 

➤ Less work tracking time: “[TimeNavi] is so much less work. You don’t have to remember to do your start and stop time, it just brings it in on a system that we’re already using [Google Calendar].” 

➤ Full time transparency: “We were kind of making our best guess in a lot of instances of what things should cost or how much time we think something is going to take but it benefited us to actually be able to look at numbers and say like, “Oh! We spent way more time on this, we need to charge more, or whatever the case might be.”

➤ Increased profitability: “TimeNavi is proving to be really valuable for our business, and a total game changer for anyone that is using Google Calendar to track time for billing or productivity. As a business that needs to track multiple projects, with differing chargeable rates this App has absolutely nailed it! Great work” 

➤ C-Suite Management: “TimeNavi has been an amazing tool for me.  In fact, so good that I have hooked up my entire executive and management time with it.  The time insights we get from TimeNavi have helped us focus on what matters most and have allowed us all to become more effective and productive with our time.  I highly recommend this tool!”


Getting Started
---

1. Open TimeNavi in the sidebar of your Google Calendar™.
2. Complete the onboarding process and create your first project to track employee time.
3. Set a project budget and manage your team to monitor progress and stay within budget.
4. Gain valuable insights into time allocation, identify potential budget overruns, and enhance your business profitability.


Use Cases
---

Whether for personal or professional use, TimeNavi has something for everyone to save time calculating time.

➤ Digital Marketing and Creative Agencies: Track time across multiple calendars for a single project—TimeNavi automates hours of manual tracking in seconds. Add an hourly rate to ensure your project is profitable and see if you’re breaking even.

➤ Sales teams: Track the performance time of your sales team. Teams track the number of new sales meetings, the time spent on account management and other performance metrics. Export your own or their Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Managers: Track time and measure the performance of your team by choosing a metric and calculating how much time they have spent on those key metrics. Export that data from your Google Calendar™ to Excel™ or export your Google Calendar™ to Google Sheets™ to manipulate that data further.

➤ Tutoring companies: Calculate the time and the pay of tutors by calculating the number of hours and adding a $/hour to the project. You can see the number of hours worked and the money they've made.

➤ Lawyers: Calculate your time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting time and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to calculate your bills.

➤ Freelancers: Track time across multiple calendars for one project - TimeNavi takes hours of manually counting hours and does it in a couple of minutes. Add an hourly rate to see if you broke even on your project.

➤ Construction businesses: Contracting employees and need to calculate their time? TimeNavi calculates your events in Google Calendar™ events quickly and easily. It is a low-tech, simple solution for businesses that want to Project Management

https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/help
 
If you don’t find the answer feel free to contact us here:
https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/contact-us

WHAT DOES ‘MAIL MERGE’ MEAN?
Mail Merge is a powerful tool for writing a personalized E-mail to many people at the same time. It uses the data from GSheet and then uses that to replace placeholders/merge fields throughout the message with the relevant information for each individual that is being messaged.


📼 INTRODUCTORY VIDEO

If you feel that the add-on is not intuitive and easy enough you can quickly watch this step-by-step tutorial on YouTube ™ https://mail-merge.quicklution.com/home#h.4pdgrekmgbwm
 

𝍁 PREPARE A GOOGLE SHEETS ™ FILE FOR MAIL MERGE
➤ Make sure the first row in your sheet contains column names. Such as ‘Fullname’, ‘Address’, ‘Email’, etc.
➤ These column names will be used as *|Merge Fields|* when you design your email or letter template.

Personal & Team Productivity.docx.name: Kanbanchi: Project and Task Management
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.description: Task & Project management for Google Workspace™: Kanban, Gantt chart, Task board, Time tracking, Timeline, and Team dashboards in one app
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.search_text:
Kanbanchi: Project and Task Management Task & Project management for Google Workspace™: Kanban, Gantt chart, Task board, Time tracking, Timeline, and Team dashboards in one app Kanbanchi is a powerful Google project management tool that seamlessly integrates with Google Workspace™, including Google Drive™, Gmail™, Calendar™, Forms™, and more. Our Google task management solution features an intuitive Kanban board, Gantt Chart, Time Tracker, and more - designed specifically for Google users. The Google Kanban board visualizes workflows for your tasks and activities, letting teams collaborate in real-time and manage projects visually within the Google environment!

As the only project management tool natively integrated with Google Workspace™, Kanbanchi offers unmatched convenience. Sign up with your Google account and work with project boards stored directly in your Google Drive™, sharing them effortlessly with colleagues. Our Google task management tool provides flexible access permissions, Google Calendar™, Gmail™, and Forms integrations, and a familiar interface with no learning curve - simply deploy Kanbanchi to all your organization's users from the Google Admin Console™.

Security is paramount with our Google project management solution. Your files remain on YOUR Google Drive™ with authentication managed by Google - we never store your passwords. Boards are encrypted by default in Google Cloud™. Additionally, Kanbanchi's Google task management system is SOC2 Type II, ISO-27001, and CASA certified, GDPR and PCI DSS compliant, and follows HIPAA rules.

We ask for permission to access certain parts of your Google Drive™ because Kanbanchi doesn’t store data on its side. All your files and sensitive information will be stored on your Google Drive. However, the app should be able to operate this part of your Google Drive™.

Core functionality of our Google Workspace™ Kanban solution:

– Create and share unlimited project boards and cards in Google Workspace™
– Share internally and externally according to your company's Google policies
– Receive notifications about board updates
– Add events to Google Calendar™
– Attach files from Google Drive™ and Shared Drives
– Communicate with colleagues about tasks
– Organize cards with text and color tags
– Sort and filter cards as needed
– Create boards as files in Google Drive™ (Shared Drives for Enterprise users)
– Import Your Trello Boards or import data from CSV

Advanced functionality in our Google project management tool:

— Gantt Chart for Google Project Management
Convert your Kanbanchi board to a Gantt Chart with one click. See how all your cards relate in time and plan project schedules visually.

— Time Tracker for Google Task Management
Track time directly in Kanbanchi—choose a card, start the timer, and monitor your team's progress in the Timing tab, where all user timing data is recorded.

— Reports for Google Project Tracking
Monitor team progress to adjust the workflow quickly. Check user performance to manage resources effectively within your Google task management system.

— Task Prioritization in Google Workspace™
Simplify work by prioritizing each task and sorting accordingly. Automate this process for better control in your Google project management workflow.

— Corporate Branding for Google Workspace™ Projects
Customize Kanbanchi's look by adding your company's logo and background images.

— Export to Google Sheets™
Export all board data, including assignments, dates, checklists, and comments, directly to Google Spreadsheets.

— Card Creation from Gmail™
Create new cards by emailing your board's unique address or installing our Gmail add-on to send information to any accessible board.

— Backups for Google Project Security
Back up important Kanbanchi boards for easy recovery, ensuring your project data is always safe.

— List View for Google Task Organization
View all cards in a scrollable list, quickly navigate from top to bottom, and filter as needed.

— Subcards for Detailed Google Task Management
Organize complex tasks by breaking them into subcards that can be assigned and tracked separately.

— Templates for Google Project Efficiency
Speed up workflows with our template gallery or create custom board templates. Create card templates to streamline repetitive tasks.

— Shared Drives Integration
Attach files from Shared Drives to cards; enterprise users can create boards directly in their Shared Drives.

— Swimlanes for Project Organization
Easily manage multiple projects on a single board by using swimlanes. This feature lets you visually separate and track tasks from different projects in one place, giving you a clear overview of all your work within your Google Workspace™ Kanban board.

Latest release:

- Made a Chrome Extension to give you instant access to Kanbanchi from anywhere on the Web;
- Fixed appearance bugs;
- Smoothed user login experience;
- Tuned board settings.

Also, list view and board settings both got a new, fancy look!

*Gmail™ is a trademark of Google LLC 
*Google Workspace™ is a trademark of Google LLC
*Google Drive™ is a trademark of Google LLC
*Google Admin Console™ is a trademark of Google LL Productivity

Personal & Team Productivity.docx.name: Power Tools
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.description: A set of 40+ solutions for daily tasks in Google Sheets.
Personal & Team Productivity.docx.search_text:
Power Tools A set of 40+ solutions for daily tasks in Google Sheets. This must-have add-on simplifies data management with 40+ tools for cleaning, analyzing, transforming, and automating tasks directly in your Google spreadsheets ⚡

Among its add-ons you'll find those that remove duplicates, compare and vlookup sheets, import ranges from multiple sheets, merge cells, find and replace data, sum and count colored cells, generate numbers and other records. Text toolkit utilities are also included and let you change case, add and remove strings and characters, trim whitespaces, and split text to columns.

All the tools are divided into 10 different groups based on their main purpose:

1️⃣ Smart toolbar offers some one-click actions. The main ones are:
- Advanced Find and Replace. Search in values, formatting, formulas, links, errors, notes
- Sum and Count colored cells (other functions included)
- Sort rows by font or fill colors
- Change text case. Capitalize first or all letters, apply sentence and lowercase, toggle text
- Sheets Manager. Handle multiple sheets in one go: (un)hide, (un)protect, copy, move, change color, reorder, delete.

Other toolbar instruments let you:
- Remove empty rows and columns
- Flip data
- (Un)freeze top rows and left columns
- Unpivot tables
- Unmerge all or selected cells
- Auto calculate all numbers

2️⃣ Dedupe and Compare data:
- Find and remove duplicates in any combination of columns in your sheet
- Compare two columns to find duplicates
- Compare sheets against the main one for dupe or unique rows
- Compare sheets cell by cell for differences
- Highlight duplicates or uniques, copy or move them to another location
- Identify dupes in a status column
- Combine duplicate rows and merge unique data referring to the same record

3️⃣ Merge and Combine sheets:
- Merge cells in rows, columns, or the entire range and keep all records
- Merge multiple Google sheets by key columns: vlookup data from other table considering text case and ignoring blanks
- Combine duplicate rows and merge unique data referring to the same record
- Combine data from multiple sheets into one based on column headers
- Consolidate data from several sheets into one summary report

4️⃣ Work with text:
- Capitalize each word or cell, change case to uppercase or lowercase, toggle and polish text
- Manage multiple substrings at the same time: remove, replace, extract, add
- Add text by position:
    1. At the beginning or at the end of the selected cells
    2. Before or after certain text
    3. At any other position you need
- Remove unwanted data:
    1. Get rid of any characters or strings in the range
    2. Remove line breaks, commas, and any characters or strings in the range
    3. Remove characters by position, or when they follow or precede certain text
    4. Delete leading and trailing spaces
    5. Reduce spaces between words to one
    6. Remove HTML entities and tags, non-printing characters, and delimiters
- Split cells in different ways:
    1. By any characters
    2. By capital letters
    3. By strings
    4. By position
    5. Separate names by name units
- Extract text from different positions:
    1. Before/after/between certain text
    2. From the beginning / the end / or the exact position
    3. Extract numbers, links, email addresses
- Replace accented characters with regular, smart quotes with straight ones, turn codes to symbols and back

5️⃣ Process data with one-step tools:
- Filter multiple columns by multiple criteria & extract multiple matches
- Sum and count cells by their color
- Sort whole rows or only the selected range by the fill/font colors
- Find and replace in values, formatting, formulas, links, errors, notes
- Handle several Google sheets in one go with ease
- Fill empty cells with values from adjacent cells and autofill formulas

6️⃣ Split toolset:
- Separate values by any character or strings
- Split text by position 
- Separate first and last name in Google Sheets, extract titles and other name parts into individual columns
- Split one table into multiple sheets by common columns or N rows
- Split 'Date time' cells into cells with the date and time units 

7️⃣ Randomize:
- Shuffle values in rows, columns, or the entire range
- Generate random numbers, dates, booleans, custom lists, or strings 

8️⃣ Try out the formula tools:
- Toggle between relative and absolute cell references
- Convert formulas to values
- Autosum columns and automatically add other functions to all selected columns
- Add new calculations to all Google Sheets formulas at once

9️⃣ Clear contents in Google Sheets by type with these data cleanup tools:
- Erase any combination of data types from the selected range: formatting, numbers, dates, booleans, notes, text, formulas, hyperlinks, or validation
- Delete all empty or unused rows and columns
- Remove blanks & shift data up or left

🔟 Convert data format:
- Convert text-formatted numbers and dates to numeric and date format
- Change number sign
- Export Google Sheets range to JSON or XML
- Convert Japanese chars Utilities
